source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

source_doc:
@kagan Just use anything, even the cashier receipts from your grocery shopping - whatever you want. A friend of mine who exhibits a lot put a sheet of toilet roll from every place he's exhibiting in his scrapbook another friend got injured while hanging her frames and eventually used the cast from the injury and some gouache to stamp patters on the pages. Hence: everything's involved you want involved.

@aurora And then you... take all these things, and glue, staple, or otherwise attach them into a book? Is that it?
I'm unclear on what happens next, or why.
Honestly, I may just not be a scrapbooking person.

@kagan Yes, that's exactly the way to go! Intentionally spill your coffee, drop an ink cartridge... whatever suits you. One just needs to get all these fancy ideas shown on pinterest or whatever out of one's head. It's about documenting the process instead of being a visual dainty. Use it like a wrecking journal if that suits. It's totally up to the person who makes it.

:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

source_doc:
Tinkering with my stereo system this week has got me thinking about an oddity that I've never been able to get to the bottom of...let's see if the Mastodon hive mine can help.
The amp is a Philips FA454 and the CD Player is a Philips CD150.
According to the amp manual I can connect the units with a "8-pole DIN to 5-pole DIN + 2 x single-pole CINCH" cable."
I take this to mean an 8 pin din to a 5 pin + stereo RCA cable...which sounds cursed.
Never been able to find one. Can anyone make one?

The service manual for the amp is nice and clear (picture 2 in above toot), but I can't find anything as nice for the CD player. I've attached a picture (picture 4 in the above toot) from the service manual that I *think* is the relevant section.
Currently I have the CD player hooked up with just the RCA cables and it all works fine, but if I could find/make the correct Din to Din + RCA cable then I could use some additional functionality and free up the only RCA stereo inputs on my amp.

There's a repair café this weekend in the town where I live...if I'm still puzzling over it all by then I might take it all along there and see if they can help me hack together a cable.

Sto smanaciant con le mie sistema stereo chesta setemana m’à fat pensé a na roba strana che no soi mai stat bon de capì enscin ala fin... vedun sce la mente colètiva de Mastodon me po dà na man.
L’amplificadur é un Philips FA454 y l letor CD é un Philips CD150.
Do la manual del amplificadur possi colegé i aparac con un cavo “DIN a 8 poli a DIN a 5 poli + 2 x CINCH a polo singol”.
Jo la tolch scu un cavo DIN a 8 pin a 5 pin + RCA stereo... che sona proprio maledet.
No n’ai mai podù trovè un. Ciodalo n podess fé un?

La manual de assistenza del amplificadur é bela clara (fota 2 tl toot de sora), ma per l letor CD no riesci a trovè nia de cialt tan clar. Ai taché n malet (fota 4 tl toot de sora) dal manual de assistenza che *crei* che sie la pert che conta.
Al moment ai colegé l letor CD demò coi cavi RCA y dut va ben, ma sce podess trovè/fé l cavo giüst DIN a DIN + RCA, alor podess adoré qualche funzionalité en plu y liberé i únics ingressi RCA stereo dl mi amplificadur.

Chest fin de setemana é n repair café tla zità olache stëi... sce sun ciamò chi che me strussi l chel en chël moment, forscia me n portes dut sön para por odëi sce i me po judé a metù adöm n cavo.

Oh, everything.
Everything.
I was a big foodie.
Like junk food.

source_doc:
Tonight in #MMRPG! My back finally shuts up enough that I can GM again as the heroes continue their search for the missing girl Cammie. Vega the Digital Dragon surprises a trio of mischievous scamps who snuck into her arcade in the middle of the night but one of them recognizes her as a town superhero and they end up having a heartwarming moment geeking out over video games. Unfortunately, the moment is interrupted by somebody or something landing on the roof of the arcade... 1/?

Vega goes to investigate and finds Dr. Vesper, in his monstrous bat form that the press has dubbed the "Gargoyle Man," along with a harpy-like creature that Vesper describes as his "little protegee." Vesper says that they have come to introduce themselves and invite Vega to join their society of man-creature misfits that is led by "The Madame," Dr. Diana Laughton of the Laughton Institute. 2/?

Vega buys some time to get the mischievous scamps out of the arcade and call the rest of the Mythics for backup, then plays along at being interested in joining this "new family." Vesper and Harpy (who does not speak once during the interaction) lead Vega to a ship in the harbor, where the Laughton Institute appears to be packing up their things... presumably because they know they're drawing attention from Agent Carter and A.R.G.E.N.T. among others. 3/?

source_doc:
I am waiting, professor.
Well, what do you see in my hand?
I see the hand of a of a charming young man.
Within the next few months Lord Arthur will go on a voyage.
Naturally, his honeymoon.
And lose a relative.
Well, we all lose relatives.
Sometimes I think they were created for the purpose.
Can you tell us any more?
No, Lady Clementine.
That's all I can say.

source_doc:
What is it?
It's my daughter, Esther, sir.
You know Ana's girl.
She wants to go to that wedding more than anything.
So it'd mean the world to her.
Well, of course she can attend the latest.
Is that all?
Yes, sir.
Thank you very much, sir.

source_doc:
Ironing the lightweight green corduroy for my first try at the Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern. I don't know how I feel about the recommendation to use interfacing but it probably does want something to stiffen and thicken it a bit.
#millinery

Sachi's newsboy cap pattern advises to cut the crown pieces diagonal to the weave ("on the bias") to allow more stretch around the circumference but that will make the corduroy rows run aslant, where I prefer them vertical.
We shall see. This is the test cookie to get a feel for the pattern. I like corduroy for texture but green wouldn't be my first choice, and this fabric is lightweight enough that I should add a layer, whether interfacing or what-have-you from the stash.

On a second look, my fabric isn't corduroy at all, it's just velvet, so I can cut at 45° to the fabric weave like Sachi suggests in the Newsboy Cap pattern and it won't look strange.
#millinery

Stiré l vellù verd liejer per mi pröm tentatif cun l model Newsboy Cap de Sachi's Studio. Ne sai nia coche me sentei sun la racomanazion de duré n rinforz, ma probabel al à debojëgn de valch che lu rende n pô' plu rigid y spëss.
#chapeliere

L model de newsboy cap de Sachi conseia de taié i toc de la corona en diagonal al tessü ("sön sbias") por lascé plu de elasticité ntorn le zircunferënza, ma chest farà che les righe dl vellù vae a sturt, olache i les preferësc verticales.
Vedun. Chësta é la prova por ciapé n'idea dl model. Me plaj l vellù por la testöra, ma l verd ne sarissa nia mi pröma chirida, y chest tessü é assé liejer che i messarà jonté n stradé de plu, che sie n rinforz o ciodi che i à te la scorta.

A n secont cialé, mi tessü n'é nia vellù a coste gnanca, al é demé velvet, spo i poi taié a 45° dal fil dl tessü coche Sachi conseia tl model Newsboy Cap y al ne pararà nia stran.
#chapeliere

source_doc:
In a surprise Inspector Clouseau twist, I now have an extra thing to investigate for Spooky Kitties Sciences!
I was doing a quick scroll through the evenings secondary camera video, when I spotted a curious The Inspector standing on the trunk of the tree near the feeding station. Kept jumping around, finding him near where the magpies had been, so I initially suspect(edit) he was simply chasing them as they sometimes let him do, until I randomly chance stop...
#SpookyKittiesSciences

There Inspector Clouseau was, rolling around like crazing about 2 meters NE of the tree, mostly hidden by the unfortunate placement of the awnings east post. Still, there he was for 5 minutes, at which point he ran back up the tree, walked across the lawn to the hill, flattened himself at the bottom, and then ran off camera, presumably in the middle of The Zoomies.
2/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Now, as some of my Spooky Kitties Sciences readers may know, the motivations behind that tests are not just to entertain the kitties. While the most important aspect is the genuine curiosity I had seeing the kitties rolling around in the snow, I really wanted to find something that The Inspector liked. I came out of the initial testing with only a single moment to hint that he liked something. What that was is still a mystery.
3/
#SpookyKittiesSciences

Stévi scorran adora n vidio dla secunda camera dla sëira, canche ai vi n curios The Inspector sö sül tronch dl lëgn dlungia la staziun de miné. Al saltéa dant y indô, y lo cjatévi dlungia al post olà che les gazes é stades, porchël al cumënz ai pensé(curé) che al les stes ma dré a i jì do, coche a öd i lascé fé da vire, fin canche a me sëi fermé a cajo...

Ece che l’aspet plü important é la curiosité vera che ai vi canche i cićins se rodéa ntëur tla nëif, ai oress propi ciafé valch che The Inspector ge piajëssa. It's raining, man.
It's raining man.
The rain has begun.
It said 90% chance of rain today.
So it's pretty happy that it wasn't raining when we arrived.
But it's like 230 now and the rain is coming down.
I'm glad I actually remembered to pack my umbrella.
We're covering you with two.

Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Bun dé Mondes!
En cianon chësta dadoman al recort. Chësc arà fora n valgünes di robes che on metü a post dagnier dal vial. Ne crëi nia che podun liberé dut, nce sciöche se tloessons la remorca, mo la remorca é plena de azel da porté a pesé.
Pü inant forsa vae inant a impaché casses tote.
#BunDéMondes

Viage al recort fat, y n'atra ciamena de auto fora.
Ai tut fora l'asse nuef dla remorca, y l sistem de motor de traziun dla remorca, dal ciamen de metal vedl da rottamé. Chësc vel dí che podun mëte ite plü metal vedl danter y ence nia pesé per sbad i toc che voi tegní.
Crëi che do, scomenciaré a sposté l'azel vedl dal jardin da do ite te la remorca, por che al sie pront da jí.
Ai momënt i prëisc dl azel da rottamé n'é nia massa alti, mo al é amëi che nia, sce nde porté asëz döt d'un colp.
I messa ciamó selezioné l rottam nia ferus.

Chëla roba canche te toes fora i gomes marsc dai ciarec pitsci, larc, de traturs de prà....
N sfors enorme por smonté üna banda dl gome, mo dall'atra banda al jëra proprü dut ruginà y blocà su strënt sö sora al cerch.
Te l tëmp che m'à tut da liberé l bead, m'ëi desmentié che l'atra banda l'ëi bele fata, y ala fin ai arjunt da avëi l cerch liber mo dal dut dedant te l gome!
Ai messü remonté l gome da chëla banda, y do lauré d'intourn per trá fora l cerch.
Ai messü ence tajé sö la ciamera d'aria por la trá fora!
Me damandi tanć i gomes che mësc ciamó smonté? Cater fac fin ades.

Pü inant forsa vae inant a impaché les casses tote.
#BunDéMondes

source_doc:
right, so, as i was saying, i dmed this very well known and very friendly seeming artist-type person and gave em the usual spiel:
- how bridge works
- how to bridge
- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.

source_doc:
Local stable out to cash in at Coffs with four contenders

Local trainer Noel Mayfield-Smith is hoping to have a lucrative day at Sunday's Coffs Harbour meeting with four runners stepping out for the stable on the six-race card.

The Group 1-winning horseman will start his day in the second event of the day when Ausbred Yahoo contests the Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) with two-kilogram claiming apprentice Ella Drew taking the ride.

Racing returns to Coffs Harbour on Sunday.

Ausbred Yahoo has been racing in good form with a third placing at Kempsey three starts ago being followed by two successive seconds at Coffs Harbour, the latest when beaten by Sunday's rival Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith links with another apprentice, three-kilogram claimer Leanne Boyd, when Never Island starts in the Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

A winner of three of her 15 starts, Never Island will carry 59.5 kilograms after Boyd's allowance. Never Island was beaten less than a length when second behind Montgomery at Grafton and backed that up with a last-start fifth at Coffs Harbour behind In The Fine Print when again beaten less than a length.

Raymond Spokes takes the ride on the Mayfield-Smith-prepared Monte Cruise in the O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise is also a three-time winner from just the nine starts. She hasn't raced since July when finishing last of eight at Eagle Farm and has had two trials at this track in preparation for her return, finishing second behind Saturday's Wyong winner Petticoat before winning the latest of them.

Mayfield-Smith rounds out the day when he again links with Boyd when she rides Cardsharp in the Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

hypo_0:
Stala locala punta a incassé a Coffs cun cater concorrënc

L’alenadëur local Noel Mayfield-Smith spera de avëi na giornata profitëusa al meeting de Coffs Harbour de dumania, cun cater cavai dla stala che va a corëi tl program de sies corse.

L’òmen di cavai vincidëur de na Group 1 scumenzarà sia giornada te la segunda corsa dl di, canche Ausbred Yahoo parteziparà al Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m), cun l’aprendista Ella Drew che reclama doi chili a monté.

Les corse turna a Coffs Harbour dumania.

Ausbred Yahoo é stat te buna forma, cun n terz post a Kempsey trei partenze indaô, suandé da doi secundo posć consecutifs a Coffs Harbour, l’ultim canche al é stat batü da l’aversar de dumania Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith s’unesc cun n’atra apprendista, Leanne Boyd, che reclama trei chili, canche Never Island partëis tl Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Vincidëura de trëis de si 15 partenze, Never Island portarâ 59,5 chili do l’abuono de Boyd. Never Island é stada batüda de manco co na lungjeza canche é rivada secunda do Montgomery a Grafton, y à confermé chest cun n cuint post te sia ultima partenza a Coffs Harbour do In The Fine Print, canche é gnüda danü batüda de manco co na lungjeza.

Raymond Spokes montarà Monte Cruise, preparé da Mayfield-Smith, tl O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise é ence na vincidëura de trëis corse da bele nuef partenze. Ne à nia corü daldöta da messëdl dl ann canche é rivada ultima de ot a Eagle Farm y à fat doi trials sun chësc traciat per se preparé al rienter, finind secunda do la vincidëura de Wyong de sabeda Petticoat, dan che vincé l’ultim de chi.

Mayfield-Smith completarà la giornada canche s’unirà danü cun Boyd, canche ela montarà Cardsharp tl Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

source_doc:
Campanīle
A #poetry thread
i.
A Roman church belfry,
gold cross reaching for clouds:
bell tolls, sets brass note free,
sings out through misty shroud,
its high peal an appeal
to the faithful long gone.
No more piety’s zeal:
many sunsetted dawns.
Its stone tower keeps watch
through the mask of dusk-rain,
skies loosing their barrage
upon roof tiles again.
🧵👇🏼
#poem #poemaday #moody #neoclassical #church #night #photography

ii.
Who pulled on the bell cord?
Lone monk in his cloister
with none left in accord.
He, grain in church oyster —
yet no cell holds his bed,
no dust stirred by his shoes,
his name never was said,
no old books that he used.
The bell rope hangs, worn, frayed,
gnawed by church mice’s teeth.
It’s been long since it swayed,
pulled by hands underneath.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
The night wind whispers psalms
and breathes canticles’ chant
to swing the clapper of bronze,
I answer in descant —
but not with my own voice.
The wind swallows my call,
chimes its own holy noise
with the hands of its squall.
✋🏼🧵

Ciampanil
Un thread de #poejia
i.
Un ciampanil de gescia romana,
na crous d’or che toca les nües:
la ciampana suna, lascia jí la nota de bronz,
cianëda fora tras la cortina de nìa,
so sun aut n apel
ai fedei da sëgn incà jí.
Nia plü de zel de pietà:
tröpes albes de sorëdl a tramont.
So tor de pera tign sot ödl
tras la mascrina de sëra e plöia,
i ciels che lascia jí la tempesta
sun les töes del tet endò n’ater iade.
🧵👇🏼
#poejia #poejiadeldi #atmosferich #neoclassich #gescia #net #fotografia

ii.
Chi à tiré la soga dla ciampana?
Un münich sulet tl so clauster
cence plü degügn en acord.
El, gran te l’ostrica dla gescia —
mo gnanca na cela tegn so liet,
gnun polver movü dai sö cialzá,
so inom ne fo mai dit,
gnun vedl liber ch’el dovrâ.
La soga dla ciampana pënn, consumeda, sfranjeda,
rujeda dai dënc di mîs dla gescia.
L’é da n gran toc che ara ne se mova plü,
tirada da mans da sot.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
Le vent de net susura salms
e spira le cianties di ciantich
por fa balé le batac de bronz,
iu respogn en descant —
mo nia cun la mia propria usc.
Le vent se ngola mi ciamada,
suna so rumur sant da su
cun les mans dla so burascada.
✋🏼🧵

Un thread de #poejia
i.
Un ciampanil de na dlijia romana,
cun na crous d’or che se stënn vers les nües:
la ciampana sona, lëura la nota de bronz,
cianëda fora tras la coltra de nìa,
so sun alt, n apel,
ai fedei da gran tèmp jí via.
Nia plü l’ardëur dla pietà:
massa albades unjöda tl tramont.
La sö tor de pera vigila
tras la mascrina de plöia dal crëp dl dé,
cun i ciels che scioia endò so sfuech
sun les töes dl tet n’ater iade.
🧵👇🏼
#poejia #poejiadaldé #malinconich #neoclassich #dlijia #net #fotografia

Chi âl tiré la soga dla ciampana?
Un münich sulet tl so clauster,
cence gnanca ügn plü en acord.

mo gnanca na cela ne tign so liet,
gnun polver ne se muef sot sü cialzá,
so inom ne fo mai pronunzié,
gnügnc vedli libri ch’al dovrâ.
La soga dla ciampana pënn, consümada, sfranjeda,
rujada dai dënc di mîs dla dlijia.
L’é da n gran toc che ara ne se balancea plü,
tirada da mans da sot.

iii.
Le vent dla net susura salms
e spira le ciant di ciantich
por fá balé le batac de bronz,
iu respogn en descant —
mo nia cun la mia propria usc.
Le vent se ngola mia ciamada,
e sona so rumur sant
cun les mans dla so burascada.
✋🏼🧵

hypo_6:
Ciampanil
Un thread de #poejia
i.
Un ciampanil de dlijia romana,
cun na crous d’oro che se slunga vërs i nüc:
la ciampana sona, lëura na nota de bronz,
e cianta fora tras n vel de nìa,
so sun alt é n apel
ai fedei da gran toc jì.
Degün zel de pietà plü:
massa albades tramontades.
La so tor de pera sta de vijila
tras la mascrina dla plöia dl ciarüsc,
mentri i ciels slarga endò so sfuech
sö i cop dai têc endò.
🧵👇🏼
#poejia #poejiadaldé #malincunich #neoclassich #dlijia #net #fotografia

ii.
Chi âl tiré la soga dla ciampana?
Un münich sulet tl so clauster,
cen degün plü en acord.
El, n gran tla ustriga dla dlijia —
eppure degüna cela ne tegn so liet,
degüna polvara movida dai sü cialzá,
so inom ne fo mai dit,
degügn libri vedli ch’al dovrâ.
La soga dla ciampana pënn, consümada, sfranjeda,
rugada dai dënc di mîs dla dlijia.
L’é da n gran toc che ara ne se mova plü,
tirada da mans da sot.
🧵👇🏼

iii.
Le vent dla net susura salms
e spira le ciant di ciantich
por fá balé le batac de bronz,
iu respogn en descant —
mo nia cun mia propria usc.
Le vent se ngola mia ciamada,
e sona so rumur sant
cun les mans dla so burascada.
✋🏼🧵

source_doc:
I just saw Kendall Coyne Schofield in her jersey during warmups... is she playing today??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS at MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Whatever Heise did to put a Fleet player on her butt at center ice, that Fleet player paid back HARD 10 seconds later. Yeesh. 😬🫣
On the one hand, I want the Fleet's goalie's PWHL debut to go well, but on the other hand, I want the Frost to win.
Kendall Coyne Schofield was PISSED at the front of the net with that little stick scramble after the Fleet's second goal. I'm glad to have her fury back on the ice. She is ferocious!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Looks like Klees changed back to his regular first line and Kendall et al needed to get a MFing goal and they got that hot damn MF goal! YES

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
YES! THEY TIED THAT SHIT UP!
Nooooooo, the Fleet is back up.
Roller-coaster of a game, here!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Wowza, Fleet is *still* gunning for Heise. Yee-ouch. That's two Fleet penalties to that one center-ice unpenalized shove by Heise.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
It is so so good to see Kendall Coyne Schofield parked back at the top of the crease, getting shoved around by women a head taller than her, yet pushing right back, making plays.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Crowd is not convinced from what we saw that Curl deserved a double minot for roughing.
Crowd is not happy about this illegal hit call against Fleet on 71's injury.
I don't think we got a single SOG in that last power play.
Boston's defense is just too good. They aren't giving us any openings.

Ci che Heise à fat per meter na giiadëura di Fleet cul cul sö al zenter dl ghiac, chëra giiadëura di Fleet i l’à fat paié CARA 10 secondes plü tert. Uff. 😬🫣
Da na pert, iö oresi che l debüt PWHL dla portiera di Fleet ji vae ben, ma da l’atra pert, iö oresi che l Frost venza.
Kendall Coyne Schofield ê FURIUSA dan dala rëi cun chël pice combatimënt cun i bastuns do le second gol di Fleet. I sun contenta de avëi süa furia endò sö dl ghiac. Ela é ferocia!

#PWHL #saĵonHizzacky
Par che Klees à mudé endò a süa pröma lingia regolare y Kendall et al orea propi n gol da cazo y l’à fat, chël bel n goal da cazo! SCI

La jënt n’é nia contenta de chësta ciamada de colp ilegal cuntra Fleet sö l’iniuria de 71.
I ne crëi nia che i un ciafé gnanca n SOG te chël ultim power play.

source_doc:
My brother in He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, what you are describing is a consequence of _misogyny_, not "misandry."

I desperately need men to realize that just because it's directed at them and an actual serious problem doesn't mean it is "misandry."
Just saw someone describe being discriminated against _for being considered effeminate_ as "misandry" and I just.

It's not that you aren't experiencing something real. You very well may be. But it isn't "misandry." Because "misandry" doesn't exist.
Yes, this applies to trans men as well. "Transmisandry" _also_ isn't a thing and just contributes to anti-feminist narratives. It treats itself as a mirror of transmisogyny, but transmisogyny is _intersective_: we experience transphobia _and_ we experience misogyny _and_ we experience this unholy thing that happens when the two interact. It's not a subset, even an exclusive subset, it's an intersection.
But the following all are absolutely problems that can be talked about!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmasculity
* Transemasculation
* Misogyny
It sucks to be discriminated against, but the language that we use is so, so important here.

Ai apënna odù un che descrijëa l’esser discriminà _perché considerà efeminà_ desche "misandria" y iei prope boh.

No vel dì che te no stas sperimentan valch de real. Te podesses de sigur sté passan tras valch de ver. Ma no é "misandria". Perché la "misandria" no esist.

Ma dut chësc che vën do é al 100% problemis de chi che se pò parlé!

source_doc:
I'm doing a eekly 1hr meeting where I'm going over with a director of engineering my soap box on managing a product management organization and actually it's coming out to be a pretty good episodic thing

Topics have been
- different types of product managers and the basic skill sets in developing requirements
- how product managers ensure an ongoing cadence for an engineering team
- dealing with product managers with varying backgrounds (engineering, data analyst, operational SME, consulting etc)
what's been fun is that this Director and I worked at a previous company with product managers that I didn't manage and I'm able to reference "hey remember that person? that person was awesome and here's why."

so in various email chains and slack threads I'll forward them to said director (if he's already not in there) and be like "ok a GOOD product manager would do THIS" and a "BAD product maanger would do THAT" rememember when so and so did THIS? that was good.
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Stoi fascent n debat setemanal de 1 ora olache che stoi passan en revista cun n diretur de ingegneria la mia idea fixa su co gestí n'organisazion de product management, y en realtà al sta vignin fora n bel format episodich.

I argomënc à ince:
- desvalis sorts de product manager y les cumpetënzes de basa per svilupé i requisic
- co i product manager se assegura n ritm cuntinué per n team de ingegneria
- gestí product manager cun backgrounds desvalis (ingegneria, analist de dac, SME operatif, consulënza etc.)
la roba bela ie che chest Diretùr y ie n i à lauré te n'atra aziënda cun product manager che ie ne gestie nia, y ie posc podëi di "hei, te regordes de chëla persona? chëla persona ea fantastica y chesta ie la rajun."

donca, te desvalis catenes de email y thread de Slack, ie ge les mandi inant a chest diretùr (sce al n'é nia bele ite) y ge digo "ok, n product manager BON fajess CHËST" y n "product manager SCARSO fajess CHËL" te regordes canche tal y tal à fat CHËST? chël ea bun.
hypo_1:
Stoi fascent n incontr setemanal de 1 ora olache che voi tras cun n diretur de ingegneria la mia idea fixa su co mené n'organisazion de product management, y a dì la verità al sta vignin fora cërta n bel format a episodi.

I argomënc é stac:
- desvalis tipes de product manager y les cumpetënzes de basa per svilupé i requisic
- co i product manager mantëgn n ritm cuntinué per n team de ingegneria
- co afronté product manager cun esperiënzes desvalies (ingegneria, analist de dac, SME operatif, consulënza etc.)
la roba plü divertida ie che chest Diretùr y ie n i à lauré te n'atra aziënda cun product manager che ie ne menae nia, y ie poi fá referimënt y dì: "hei, te regordes de chëla persona? chëla persona ea super, y chësta ie la rajun."

donca, te desvalis cadenes de email y thread de Slack, ie ge les mandi inant a chest diretùr (sce al n'é nia bele dedans) y ge digo: "ok, n product manager BON fajess CHËST" y "n product manager SCARSO fajess CHËL". Te regordes canche un o l'ater à fat CHËST? chël ea fat dër bel.
hypo_2:
Stoi fasciendo n incontr setemanal de 1 ora olache che discor cun n diretur de ingegneria de mia idea fixa su co mené n’organisazion de product management, y a dì la verità al ven fora desche na roba a episodi propi buna.

- i diferënc tipi de product manager y les cumpetënzes de basa per svilupé i requisic

source_doc:
$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
$partner à na consultazion video cun Ikea per avëi n preventif per na cüjina fata su misüra. L é n ciantun fascinant te ecossistem di servisc online per i boomers.
1. Ai manda n link per la consultazion video, trëi stemanes indô. Al doura la soluzione de videoconferenza proprietara de Ikea
2. Ai damana i disegns & i render 3D per la cüjina nöia
3. ai manda n email che dij "gracia per avëi mandé i disegns
4. Incö te sunon, ai tacâ la chiamada cun "nôsc sistem à blocâ i tü files, fajun adöm la to cüjina"
1/x

5. Partner domanda sce al é n valgüna maniera de condividé i disegns (miga detaliá, n’é costé presciape na setimana intera de laur da n om per metei adöm), ma le vendidù de Ikea l é tacâ al copion y no ne vel savai de nü.
6. Le pass sö do te copion é "refajé laboriusamenter le projet da zero al telefon cun le client, ciariann y picann sö la tastiera y nia migo sveltesc cun la UI de so software de projetazion"
2/x

7. Ai ne possa nia condividé so schermo, spo l é n show da paiasc cun malintignüs repetüs su chela pert de chela imagina che vegn nominada

8. L’óra é bele passada sorëdlà de chel che messarai ester düt la consultazion, y ai é ma al 35% del via cun les misüres che a serf.

9. Enscin a sen é sté literalmenter 8 menüc de vendidù che inserësc laboriusamenter les misüres dates

1. Ai manda n link por la consulënza video, trëi stemanes indô. Al doura la soluziun proprietara de videoconferënza de Ikea
2. Ai domanda i disegns & i render 3D por la cüjina nöia
3. ai manda n email che dij "gracia por avëi mandé le disegn
4. Encuei nos se colegion, ai comënza la chamada cun "nosc sistem à blocâ i tü files, fajun adöm la to cüjina"
1/x

5. Partner domanda sce al é n valgüna maniera de condividé i disegns (möt detaliá, nos n'i é metü adöm presciape na setimana de laur intiera), ma le vendidù de Ikea l é tacà a n copion, y no ne vel savai nia.
6. Le pass do tel copion é "fajé laboriusamënter le progett da zero al telefon cun le client, cirian y pician sö la tastiera y nia sveltesc cun la UI de so software de progettazion"
2/x

7. Ai ne possa nia condividé so schermo, spo l é n show da paiasc cun malintignüs che se repetëi de contignü su ciüna pert de ciüna imagina che vegn menzionada

8. L’óra é bele passada sora le temp che messarà ester la consulënza intiera, y ai é ma al 35% de ciapé les misüres che serf.

9. Enscin ades él sté literalmenter 8 menüc de vendidù che à metü ite laboriusamënter les misüres che ge é gnüdes dates

  "ProductDetails.Loyalty.Available.WithBalance.subtitle": "Redeem Loyalty at checkout for {{balanceAmount}} off, earn {{rewardAmount}} for your next purchase",
  "ProductDetails.Loyalty.tooltip": "Loyalty is a discount program that lets you buy products and earn points to redeem on your next purchase. Your Loyalty balance is updated when you pay online or in-store. The Loyalty amount shown on this page can be recalculated at the checkout.",
  "ProductDetails.Subscriptions.Details.Annually.description.setup_fee": "Once you subscribe, we will place a new order with this product every year. You will be charged {{firstChargeAmount}} for your first order, and then {{repeatChargeAmount}} for each repeat order. You can easily manage your subscription or cancel it anytime with no additional charges.",
  "ProductDetails.Subscriptions.Details.Daily.description.setup_fee": "Once you subscribe, we will place a new order with this product every day. You will be charged {{firstChargeAmount}} for your first order, and then {{repeatChargeAmount}} for each repeat order. You can easily manage your subscription or cancel it anytime with no additional charges.",
  "ProductDetails.Subscriptions.question": "Would you like to buy this product one time or subscribe for it?",
  "ProductDetails.CompositeProduct.Savings.description": "{{discount}}% off this item if bought in a bundle:",
  "ProductDetails.CompositeProduct.NoSavings.description": "This item can be bought in a bundle:",
  "Account.XE.Loyalty.tooltip": "Loyalty is a discount program that lets you buy products and earn points to redeem on your next purchase. Your Loyalty balance is updated when you pay online or in-store.",
  "Account.XE.StoreCredit.tooltip": "Store credit is a balance issued by a store, for example, after a return. You can use it on future online or in-store purchases.",
  "Account.LoyaltyBalance.description": "Balance: {{amount}} available to redeem",
  "Account.Orders.CantFindOrder.description": "If you can’t find your purchase, it may be linked to another email address. Try signing in with the email address you provided during in-store checkout. If you still don’t see any orders or the list looks wrong, contact our store. We will be happy to help!"
}
```

All right, I'm gonna be over here making pasta.
With, like, I don't know if it's gonna work.
The way you do it is.
Wait, what are you doing?
I'm doing it.
I don't like.
It.
This is how you do it.
I've watched.
Guys.
This is.
Nothing's gonna go wrong.
You're gonna take a clump of flour, a little bit of salt, mix it around, you're gonna make a little well in the middle, and that's where you're gonna pour a touch of olive oil.
But mainly like an egg's worth of the liquid aquafaba.

source_doc:
A couple of weeks ago, my boyfriend and I did pottery.
I mean, actual pottery.
And it's now time to collect our masterpieces.
So I'm in the office today, and it is literally just a 20 minute walk away from the office.
But the one time I went, I obviously used my phone map because I'd never been in that area before.
So let's hope I can remember some orientation skills and use this thing.

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle

Chëles altres é de pel vernizada.
Ci él pa de mal cun la pel vernizada?
A jera coche sce a cridass “1995”.
Al jera dal dut imbarazant.
Basta insciö.
Les scarpe ne crida pa.
Che an che al é.
Chësta to dipendënza dal shopping mëss finì.
Ma, pere.
Da ades inant, degün pit stop sön Rodeo.
Degüna vijita al mall, degüna piciola passegiada sön Melrose.

{
  "landing_page.why_join_company.free.description": "We don't get in the way of you interacting with people and having fun. People can support us for nice to have features.",
  "landing_page.testimonials.description": "Thousands of members have found friendships, a community, love, and much more with us. Here are just a few of their stories:",
  "advertise.page_title": "Advertise on {{website_name}}",
  "advertise.why_advertise.title": "Why Advertise on with us?",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.description": "Here are just a few reasons:",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_2": "With ~100,000 new members joining us every month, you'll reach new customers daily.",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_3": "You'll have access to a dashboard so you know how your ads are doing 24/7.",
  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_4": "You can change up your ads throughout the month to keep things fresh.",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.description": "Rather than selling impressions or clicks, we’ve divided our ad space into equally sized slots:",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.item_3": "Ads run from the 1st to the last day of the month",
  "advertise.cost.content.description": "A slot starts at $500 USD per month. If you would like to run more than one slot a month, each additional slot starts at $400 USD per month.",
  "advertise.cost.content.note": "Renew by the 15th of the month to guarantee your slots for the next month.",
  "advertise.contact_us.content.description": "If you have any questions or would like to advertise on our website please email us at:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.title": "Ad Image Specs",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.specs.aspect_ratio": "Aspect ratio:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_image_specs.specs.display_size": "Display size:",
  "advertise.aside.ad_text_specs.title": "Ad Text Specs",
  "advertise.aside.ad_text_specs.specs.lines_label": "# of lines:",
  "advertise.aside.help_note": "Don't have an ad? We can help you with that. All you have to do is just get into {{link_tag_start}}contact with us{{link_tag_end}}.",
  "advertise.sample_ads.title": "Sample Ads",
  "advertise.sample_ads.cta_label": "view all",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.heading": "Welcome Home",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.subheading": "Setting yourself up for success.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.pace.heading": "Go at Your Own Pace",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.consent.description": "You will get the most out of the app by respecting people’s boundaries.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.love.description": "Love what you find appealing and interesting. The more you love, the better we can recommend stuff you'll enjoy.",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.scene.heading": "Find Your Local Scene"
}
```

source_doc:
and it's not a bad film — it's a spectacular-looking one in spots — but it is also a film entirely made out of other, better and more thematically cohesive films. so it's 2001 and the three-body problem and arrival and wall-e a little bit, but it's also Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII and ultimately just not that lot

while watching i wondered why the earth needed to be in peril, and if the other two members of the multicultural crew dying to leave the White Man in charge was some kind of an anti-woke statement; but in light of some of the book author andy weir's 'most media literate libertarian' comments about how star trek should be just about spaceships going pew-pew, at least to him the answer is yes to the latter and 'fascism' to the former

@esvrld I read the book a little while back and I may have given him too much credit, especially given his recent decision to open his mouth, but I took the death of the international crew to strand the white boy as an understanding that his second book failed because he is not any good at writing people interacting with each other and his only skill is creating clever little puzzles for his self-insert to solve in complete isolation. Giving him an alien buddy was a good move because it opens the possibility of character interaction without requiring it to resemble the way humans relate to one another

e nol é nia n film cativ — al é un che à toc che par spetacol — ma al é ence un film fat daldut fora de n'autres films, meiù e plu coesi a livel tematic. donca al é 2001 e The Three-Body Problem e Arrival e n pôc de Wall-E, ma al é ence Battutines Sexyman Salva l Mond Parte XVII e ala fin no tant gran roba

mentr che l vardâi me domanâi perche la tera messâ da ester en prigol, e sce che i lòtres dui membres dla crew multiculturala che mör per lascé l Hom Blanc a comandé fossa n sort de declarazion anti-woke; ma vedù lüs de certi comentars dl autor dl liber Andy Weir da "libertarian plu alfabetisà dai media" su co Star Trek dovessa ester demé de naus spaziales che va pew-pew, almanco per ël la resposta al segon é de sce e al pröm "fascism"

@esvrld I ai let l liber n pôc de temp a do, e magari i ti ai dat massa credit, soraldut vedù sia dezijion recenta da vierí la boca, ma i ai tout la mort dla crew internazionala che la lassa l mut blanc blocià da bëgn capì che sie segon liber à falì perche nol é brâ da scrive jënt che interagesc un cun l lòt, e che sie unica abilidad é de creé pici enigmes inteligënc por sie alter ego da resolvé daldut da su. Ti dé n cumpagn alien al é sté na buna mossa perche al vier la possibilità de interazion de personajes senza che al cognëssa someié al manier che i umans se raporta un cun l lòt

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery

Ai mess da descusì y cüsì danüch la cusidüra a màchina deaché ai metü i spili dlungia y nia travers la cusidüra y ai ji fora tru. Forsc refai la visiera sce o voi n pü de profonité.
#modisteria

Ot panele dla corona y dui panele dla visiera monté adöm te trëi toc y metü coi spili per la forma generala. Patron Newsboy Cap de Sachi's Studio te velü verd. Cüsüda te gran pert a màchina.
Le patron domana na cusidüra de rifiniment dlungia les cusidüres di panele dla corona, che podarëi sugerì o fil a ton o a contrast.

Na juntöra n pô desordenada olache i ot panele s'unësc al pic dla newsboy cap, porchël o pënsi che n boton plü gran podarëss ester la soluzion per scundëi les cusidüres.

source_doc:
Whoa, you mean Blender Market, the thing I said was the first step towards the Blender environment becoming a shitty subscription service, renamed itself to the oh-so-appealing name "Superhive" and then decided to mandate subscriptions?
WHOA WHO COULD HAVE GUESSED?! Not me, that's for sure. This is completely out of left field!

TBH, I have never seen a single company with "Hive" in the name that wasn't a complete shitshow run by assholes, so I never bought anything on that platform -
Sorry
I didn't RENT anything on that platform if I could help it.
Maybe it's unfair, but "clearly we, a company that specializes in connecting creators with their audience, should name ourselves HIVE, because the creators are just our loyal little bees, and audience is our loyal little bees, work for us!" always gives me bad vibes.

"Hive implies busy crowds!"
Hive implies a queen.

hypo_0:
Uau, vëst dì Blender Market, chel che ie à dit che fossa stat l pröm pass verso n ambient Blender che doventa n servici de abunamënt de merda, à mudé inom te l inom ciamó tant “atraënt” "Superhive" y pò à dezidù de rënder obligators i abunamënc?
UAU CHI L’ARËSSA MAI PODÙ IMAGINÉ?! Mie io, chësc de segur. Chësc vëgn fora dal nïe!

Par dì la verità, ne ài mai odü n’anterpresa cun "Hive" tl inom che no fossa n desaster total mené da stronzi, porchël ne ài mai cumpré nia sun chëla plataforma -
Scusa
Ne ài nia AFITÉ nia sun chëla plataforma, sce podëi evité.
Forse al é ingiüst, mo “cleramënter nos, n’anterpresa spezialisada tl meter en contat i creaturs cun so public, messons avëi inom HIVE, ajache i creaturs é demé nostes fideles pitles avëis, y l public é nostre fideles pitles avëis, lauré per nos!” me dà semper vibes burtes.

"Hive impliches müries ocupades!"
Hive impliches na regina.

Forsc al é nia giüst, mo “cleramënter nos, n’anterpresa spezialisada tl meter en contat i creaturs cun so public, messons se ciamé HIVE, ajache i creaturs é demé nostes fideles pitles avëis, y l public é nostre fideles pitles avëis, lauré per nos!” me dà dagnora n mal sentimënt.

"Hive impliches na mësa de jënt ocupada!"
Hive impliches na regina.
hypo_4:

UAU, CHI L’ARËSSA MAI PODÙ INDOVINÉ?! Mie no, chësc de segur. Chësc vëgn dal nïe dal dut!

source_doc:
I expected to love Project Hail Mary, I LOVED Project Hail Mary, it also destroyed me in a particularly unique way as the wife of a science teacher after a year of watching all science teaching be relentlessly attacked and defunded. People love this movie, which I'm sure will be a success, and they hate my wife's work and destroy her programs and want us to lose our careers. How is it possible for all this to be true at once.

She left at 7am to go teach the hands on labs that she teaches where they handle cells, where they've increased class sizes and reduced TAs, she spends more contact hours with students in lab basements than any other class on the campus. She created a program for community college transfer students to get funded jobs in labs, opening up STEM pathways for those who never would've gotten the chance. For all her above and beyond work she's demonized as "doing DEI in science" which they call illegal

But you know, I guess if she were a white male software engineer writing fanfic about science teaching.... she'd be safe.

@grimalkina the same roots are already in Hail Mary tbh. I like Andy Weir a lot and I don't think he meant it, but the whole "bureaucracy and cooperation are truly the barrier to getting things done, and when shit hits the fan we get a powerful anti-bureaucrat to forego diplomacy and strongarm everyone into doing the project, ethics or what the participants want be damned" struck me as a very American individualism power fantasy, and I would guess an American wrote it if I didn't know

@jcachada @grimalkina
For what it's worth, the book contains this passage that didn't make it to the movie.
---
“I’m curious,” I say to Stratt. “Once we launch Hail Mary. What will you do then?”
“Me?” she said. “Doesn’t matter. Once the Hail Mary launches, my authority ends. I’ll probably be put on trial by a bunch of pissed-off governments for abuse of power. Might spend the rest of my life in jail.”
“I’ll be in the cell next to you,” said Leclerc.
“Are you at all concerned about that?”
She shrugged. “We all have to make sacrifices. If I have to be the world’s whipping boy to secure our salvation, then that’s my sacrifice to make.”
---
Is she better or worse if she thinks she's sacrificing herself?

hypo_0:
Me spetâi de adoré Project Hail Mary, me O ADORÉ Project Hail Mary, al m’à ence destrut a na maniera particolarmënter unica sciöche mojë dl’amò de scënzes do n ann de vardé co dut l’insegnamënt de scënzes vën atacà sensa pietà y lascé zënza fondaziuns. La jënt adora chest film, che sëi sigüra che al sarà n succes, y odia lëur de mia mojë y destrüsc sü programes y uel che perdiun nosta carieres. Co él pa possibel che dut chest sii vëi te n medemo temp.

Ëila é jüda via ai 7 dl matina per jí a insigné i labs pratics che ëila insegna olache ai laorëia cun zeles, olache ai à aumenté la grandëza di classes y redujù i assistënc, ëila passa plü ores de contat cun i studënc ti sotetërs di labs che cualsise autra classa dl campus. Ëila à creat n program per studënc de transfer di community college por avëi laurs finanzés ti labs, davrind la strades STEM por chi che no arëssa mai abù la possibilità. Per dut sü lëur sora y dantor, ëila vën demonizada sciöche “fé DEI te la scënza”, che ai ciamëia ilegal

Ma sai coche, me sa che sce ëila fossa n ingenier de software om blanc che scrî fanfic sun l’insegnamënt de scënzes.... ëila fossa al sigur.

@grimalkina les medemes raïjes é jà te Hail Mary, tbh. Me plaj n muin Andy Weir y no crëi che al l’abia fat a posta, ma dutl “la burocrazia y la cooperazion é te verdad la bariera por fé les robes, y canche dut va a ramengo ciafun n anti-burocrat potent che lasa sté la diplomazia y sforza duc a fé le projet, l’etica o chel che i partezipanc uel no conta” m’à parü n fantasy de podëi dl individualism american, y me sa che indovinassi che l’à scrit n american sce no savëssi nia

@jcachada @grimalkina
Per chel che al vala, tl liber él chest passaje che no é rué tl film.

“I?” àra dit. “No importa. Na ota che Hail Mary vën lanciada, mia autorità finësc. Probabel vëgni metüda sot a prozes da n branc de governi furibonc per abus de podëi. Me sa che passa le rest de mia vita te n ciastel.”
“I sarai te la zëla dessota a tia,” à dit Leclerc.
“Sëstela nia minga preocupada de chest?”
Ëila à sclipé les spales. “Duc nosc i messa fé sacrifici. Sce i messa ester le sac de bóte dl monn per arseguré nosta salvazion, spo chest é le mio sacrifici da fé.”
---

Ëila é jüda fora ai 7 dl doman por jí a insigné i labs pratics che dà, olache ai laora cun zeles, olache ai à aumenté la grandëza dles classes y redujì i assistënc, y ëila passa plü ores de contat cun i studënc ti sotetërs di labs che cualsëssa autra classa dl campus. Ëila á metü sö n program por studënc che passa dai community college por ciafé posć de laur finanzés ti labs, daurind strades tl STEM a chi che no arëssa mai abü chësta ciajun. Per dut chest laur fat massa sora de chel che ge tocaria, ëila vëgn demonizada desche “fé DEI te la scienzes”, che ai ciamëia ilegal

Ma saśe coche, me sa che sce ëila fossa n ingenier de software, om y blanc, che scrîf fanfic sun l’insegnamënt de scienzes.... aló sí che ëila fossa al sigur.

@grimalkina les medemes raïjes é bele te Hail Mary, tbh. Andy Weir me plaj dër y no crëi che al l’abies fat aposta, ma dut chel “la burocrazia y la cooperazion é propi la vera bariera por arjonje a fé les robes, y canche dut va a ramengo i ciafun n anti-burocrat potent che lascia sté la diplomazia y strën para duc a fé le projet, al diavol l’etica o chel che i partezipanc uel” m’à suné desche na fantasy de podëi dër americana dl individualism, y sce no savëssi de ci che l’é, i indovinassi che l’à scrit n american

@jcachada @grimalkina
Per chel che al vala, tl liber él chest passaje che no é rué tl film.
---
“Sun curiosa,” dijei a Stratt. “Na ota che lancion Hail Mary. Ciasa fajëis po?”
“I?” ára dit. “No conta. Na ota che Hail Mary vëgn lanciada, mia autorità finësc. Probabel vëgni metüda sot a prozes da na manada de governi neri de rabia per abus de podëi. Me sa che passi le rest de mia vita te n ciastel.”
“I sarai te la zëla de banda a tia,” á dit Leclerc.
“Sëstela dal dut nia preocupada per chest?”
Ëila á alzé les spales. “Duc nosc i messa fé sacrificis. Sce i messa ester chëla su cui le monn sfòia dut por arseguré nosta salvazion, aló chest é le mio sacrifici da fé.”
---
Éra miour o peior sce ëila crëi che ëila se stëssa sacrifiché?

Not at all, Mr. Dreiser.
Tell Paul I said goodbye.
I will.
What are you sniffling about, Theodore?
I'm not sniffling.
Look here, son, I'm tired of having you mope around because Paul's going away to school.
You should be happy that your brother's going to be a minister.
I am happy.

source_doc:
1
Stephen King: submitted for the approval of the midnight
Elon Musk [rising from bushes]: eeyyyyy stephano king
Barker: hey look steve it's your best friend
King: goddamnit clive
King: we're not
King: elon what do you want this time

2
Musk: stephano king i aska you fora da last time
Musk: why you no lika me
Musk: we so mucha da same, lika two peas inna pod
King: how do you figure that?
Musk:
Musk: mama mia you contradicta me?
Musk: maybe you a pedophile

3
King: see, elon, this is the problem
King: you're just being immature
Musk: mama mia ima very mature
Musk: lika my boy you know he very based
Musk: you shoulda introduce himma to your boy
King: i don't think so
Musk: mama mia itsa great idea!!

@bitterkarella
King [chuckling]: Hello, Very Based. I'm Steve.
Very Based Musk: Hi, Steve. I'm very impressed you got my name right away, most people need it explained.
King: Wha, I thought I was making a joke.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
1
Stephen King: sotmetù per l'aproazion de mesanöt
Elon Musk [spontan fora dai brusc]: eeyyyyy stephano king
Barker: hei ciare, Steve, al é chil tò miour amich
King: porca miseria, Clive
King: nion, no sunse
King: Elon, ciasa ó che te ues chësta ota

2
Musk: stephano king, te ai domanà l'ultima ota
Musk: cie no me os ti
Musk: sunse tan parëi, coche dui arjins tl medemo bocol
King: coche él che te la vëies insciö?
Musk:
Musk: mama mia, te me contradëies?
Musk: magari te ies un pedofil

3
King: vëies, Elon, chësc é l problem
King: te te portes demò da pop
Musk: mama mia, ie sun motüer
Musk: coche mi mut, te sas, al é prò based
Musk: te desses ti presentel al tò mut
King: no me pënsc prò
Musk: mama mia, chësta é n'idea gran bela!!

@bitterkarella
King [ridan sotusc]: Ciau, Very Based. Ie sun Steve.
Very Based Musk: Ciau, Steve. Me fej impressiun che te ais capì subit mi inom, la plüpart de la jënt à debojëgn che ge al spieghen.
King: Ce, ie ponsà che ie fajëi n scherz.

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
@rechelon estremamënter impopolar ie n manera de la dì… i ne stëi nia a Berlin ma i crëi che la jënt dapërtöt à albüch reagì plü o manco te chël medemo möd, cioè “va al diavel chisc stronzc por avëi fat valch che lassa tanć de jënt che no c'entra nia nia zënza corënt y traté la roba desche n dann colateral nezesar”. I à odü tanć che speculéa che füss na falsa bandera por fà parëi mal la sinistra. Nia che ai sbirs ti n'à cüra, probabel éi ëi adëss duc euforics (na cossa schifusa da s'imajiné) che ai à na scüja por fë na razia y criminalisé la scena de sinistra.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Sci, cioè al par che al sie ancora mez deza anticivs cresciüs cun i accounts de meme che é sorprais che la scena ne sie nia stada cun ëi, ma é super sorprais che anticivs de vedla data, che s'à sintì mancà de respet da chëla crew, ne i abie nia sostignüs.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I me preociöpi che podun odëi na spirala de autogiustificazion olache n püc de anticivs s'inarabësc tan porvia dl moviment che ne sostëgn nia so atac super based contra i “civilizá” che ala finisc te roba da livel ITS te n ann o doi de isolament y rabia che bol.

source_doc:
painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [1/x]
I figured it'd be fun to share the whole process that goes into making a painting a custom scene. could be useful to some, and entertaining to others :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVE & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
as you all know, I'm a deeply religious person 🛐 so..
the scene: we're in the garden of eden. adam is eating apples from the forbidden tree, because of course he is. eve is having none of his shit, grabs an unfortunate unsuspecting nearby serpent, and is about to whip the shit out of adam. 🐍
#painting

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [2/x]
so, we're gonna need reference photos. I want eve to be in the process of swinging the serpent around; so then I figured a baseball batter would be a good fit.
so wading through the AI slop, I found this actual photo that has a nice pose and good lighting.

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [3/x]
I want adam to be in a protective stance, while also holding a forbidden apple, and all this, seen from the side/back. also, the lighting has to come from the same side as the batter. so all and all, it's pretty hard to find a proper reference pic for this, so I am posing for this one myself.
took about 20 pics with slightly different in stances etc., and decided on this one. (the right hand is going to hold the apple)

pitöra cun bazkie! 🧵 n thread (lent) [1/x]
Me é jüt te mente che fossa divertent da cöi fora dut l prozes che va te fé na pitöra de na scena personalizada. pudessa ester ütl a cëic, e divertent por d’atri :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVA & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
desche che savëis duc, ie sun na persona prigamënter religiosa 🛐 nce..
la scena: i sun tl ërt de Eden. Adam tiá manzann pomes dal lëgn proibì, ajache scialdi che al lo fej. Eva ne à nia de sia monada, ciapa n serpënt da visin, por pover y ignar, y é bele por dé na bela batosta a Adam. 🐍
#pitöra

pitöra cun bazkie! 🧵 n thread (lent) [2/x]
aladô, nos servarà fotes de referimënt. Oi che Eva sie tl prozes de féré giré l serpënt; porchël m’é jüt te mente che n batidú de baseball fossa adaté.
aladô, pasan tras dut l brod de AI, ai ciafé chësta vera foto che à na bela posa y na bona lüm.

pitöra cun bazkie! 🧵 n thread (lent) [3/x]
Oi che Adam sie te na posa de se paré, ma ence tegnan n pomo proibì, y dut chest da na vedlada da la pert/de dos. ence, la lüm mëss gnì da la medema pert dl batidú. aladô, tl compless l’é prope dificil da ciafé na foto de referimënt aposta por chest, porchël me meti ie medemo te posa por chësta.
Ai fat varga 20 fotes cun poses un pô desferëntes y insciö inant, y ala fin ai sielì chësta. (la man dreta portarâ l pomo)

la scena: i sun tl giardin de Eden. Adam é da manjé pomes dal lëgn proibì, ajache de segur che al lo fej. Eva n’à plu nia de si stronzades, ciapa n serpënt desfurtüné chilò d’apress che n se speta nia de nud, y é por mené Adam de santa rejun. 🐍
#pitöra

aladô, tras dut l pastroc de AI, ai ciafé chësta foto vera che à na bela posa y na buna lüm.

source_doc:
Falkirk strengthen top six hopes with away win at St Mirren

Miller then made sure of the points just after the hour mark as he capitalised on some static St Mirren defending to race on to his own blocked shot before dinking the ball over George.

It was an afternoon to forget for St Mirren, who lost Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips and George to injury as they slipped to a third straight defeat.

Falkirk had the first opening in the 18th minute when Barney Stewart laid the ball off to Dylan Tait, whose curling effort from just outside the box took a slight deflection before cannoning off the top of the crossbar.

St Mirren finally threatened just after the half-hour mark when Mikael Mandron shot from a tight angle, forcing Falkirk goalkeeper Scott Bain into a smart stop with his feet.

Falkirk then raced down the other end and the lively Miller was released and allowed to shoot from a similar angle but George comfortably saved.

The match was finally coming to life and Dan Nlundulu was the next to fire at goal in the 36th minute after the Bairns had given up possession cheaply, but it was a routine stop at the near post by Bain.

Nlundulu then got in behind and slid the ball home, though the cheers from the home fans were short-lived as the assistant referee raised his flag for what appeared to be a clear offside.

The hosts had already lost Donnelly to injury midway through the first half and they suffered a further blow when Phillips, who appeared to hurt his shoulder in the opening period, came off at the interval.

The match was crying out for a moment of quality and it came 10 minutes into the second half through Yeats.

Tait's perfect through ball released Miller, and although George came racing out of his goal and timed his challenge well, the loose ball fell invitingly for Yeats, who curled a stunning first-time finish into the top corner of the unguarded St Mirren goal.

It got even better for the away side just after the hour mark as the Bairns doubled their lead.

Miller's initial shot from the edge of the box was blocked by Scott Tanser but, as the home defence hesitated, Miller reacted first to run on to the loose ball and lift a right-footed shot over the onrushing George.

St Mirren suffered yet another blow shortly after as the keeper was forced off to be replaced by Ryan Mullen.

The enforced changes and the quickfire goals seemed to rock the hosts and they never threatened a comeback, with their afternoon summed up in the 89th minute when Tanser completely mis-kicked his attempted volley from six yards out.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Falkirk raforza la speranza de rivé te i pröms sie cun na vitöra fora ciasa a St Mirren

Miller à spo aseguré i trei ponc póch do l’ura de jöch, co al à sfruté na defëisa massa ferma de St Mirren per curi sön sun so tiro sbarré y pó al à alzé la bala sora George.

Al é stat n domisdé da desmentié per St Mirren, che à perdu Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips y George per ferides, mentre che ai é tomés te la terza desfatada de fila.

Falkirk à abü n pröm’ocajiun al 18. minut, canche Barney Stewart à passé la bala a Dylan Tait, chël che cun n tiro a giré da fora dl’aria à tocé liejermenter n defensur dan che la bala sbaté söra la traversa.

St Mirren à finalmënter porté pericul póch do la mesa ura, canche Mikael Mandron à tiré da n angol strënt, costringion l portier de Falkirk Scott Bain a n bel intervent cun i pé.

Falkirk à spo curi dan l’autra porta y l viv Miller é gnü lassé liber, conzedion tié da n angol sciche chël, ma George à paré zënza problemes.

La partida jìa finalmënter ciapann vita y Dan Nlundulu à stat l prossem a tié a porta al 36. minut, do che i Bairns à perdu la posesciun massa bel, ma Bain à fat na parèda de rutina al pröm pal.

Nlundulu à spo intré do la linia defensiva y à mandé la bala te rëi, ma la jöia di fans de ciasa é stada cörta, ajache l assistënt dl arbitro à alzé sia bandiera per chel che parëa ester n ofsaid net.

I padru de ciasa à bele perdu Donnelly per ferida a mez dl pröm tëmp y ai à ciapé n auter colp canche Phillips, che parëa essers fat mé ales spales tl pröm tëmp, é gnü sostituí te la pausa.

La partida aclamâ n moment de cualité y chest é rivé diesc menüc do l scomenc dl secont tëmp tras Yeats.

La paséda perfeta de Tait te la profunanza à liberé Miller, y ence sce George é salté fora da sia porta y à tempisé ben so intervent, la bala lëdia é jita a pennel per Yeats, che à metü a segno n splëndit tiro al pröm toc a giré te l’angol de sora dla porta de St Mirren restada zënza custodia.

Per la scuadra ospita la situaziun é deventada ciamó miöur póch do l’ura de jöch, canche i Bairns à doplié l vantaje.

L pröm tiro de Miller da la limita dl’aria é stat sbarré da Scott Tanser, ma, canche la defëisa de ciasa à tentené, Miller à reagí pröm, à ciapé la bala lëdia y à alzé n tiro col pé dret sora George che gnìa fora a gran coruda.

St Mirren à ciapé póch do n auter colp, canche l portier à mess gní fora y é stat rimplazé da Ryan Mullen.

I mudamënc sforzá y i gol raviciné parëa avëi scurlé i padru de ciasa, che n’à mai porté pericul de torné ite te la partida; so domisdé é stat riassunt te l’89. minut, canche Tanser à sbaglié dal dut so tentatif de volée da sies metres.

I mudamënc sforzá y i gol raviciné à parai scurlé i padru de ciasa, che n’à mai porté pericul de torner te la partida; so domisdé é stat riassunt te l’89. minut, canche Tanser à falí dal dut sia volée da sies metres.
hypo_7:
Falkirk rinforza sües speranzes de jí te i pröms ses cun na vitöra fora ciasa a St Mirren

Miller à spo sigüré i ponc pôc do l’ura de jöch, sfrutann na defëisa massa statica de St Mirren per rivé pröm sü so tiro sbarré y tocé la bala sora George.

Al é stat n domisdé da desmentié per St Mirren, che à perdu Liam Donnelly, Killian Phillips y George per ferides, coland te na terza desfatada de fila.

Falkirk à abü la pröma vera ocajiun al 18. minut, canche Barney Stewart à passé la bala a Dylan Tait, che cun n tiro a giré da pôc fora dl’area à ciafé na picia deviaziun dan che la bala sbaté söra la traversa.

St Mirren à finalmënter porté pericul pôc do la mesa ura, canche Mikael Mandron à tiré da n angol strënt, costringion l portier de Falkirk Scott Bain a na buna parèda cun i pé.

Falkirk à spo sprinté da l’autra man y l viv Miller é gnü mandé inant, podann tiré da n angol semejant, ma George à paré zënza dificolté.

La partida jìa finalmënter ciafann vita y Dan Nlundulu é stat l prossem a tié a porta al 36. minut, do che i Bairns à perdu la posesciun massa saurí, ma Bain à fat na parèda de rutina al pröm pal.

Nlundulu à spo superé la defëisa y à metü la bala te rëi, ma i ciacares di tifus da ciasa é stac de cörta durata, ajache l assistënt dl arbitro à alzé sia bandiera per n ofsaid che parecia net.

I padru de ciasa à bele perdu Donnelly per ferida a mez dl pröm tëmp y ai à ciapé n auter colp canche Phillips, che parecia essers fat mé ala spala tl pröm tëmp, é gnü sostituí te la posa.

La partida domandâ n moment de cualité, y chest é rivé do diesc menüc dl secont tëmp cun Yeats.

La pasèda perfeta te la profunanza de Tait à liberé Miller y, ence sce George é salté fora da sia porta y à tempisé ben so intervent, la bala lëdia é jita a pennel per Yeats, che à metü a segno n splendit tiro al pröm toc te l’angol de sora dla porta de St Mirren zënza defëisa.

Per la scuadra ospita la situaziun é deventada ciamó miöur pôc do l’ura de jöch, canche i Bairns à doplié l vantaje.

L pröm tiro de Miller da la limita dl’area é stat sbarré da Scott Tanser, ma, canche la defëisa de ciasa à esitè, Miller à reagí pröm, à ciapé la bala lëdia y à alzé n tiro col pé dret sora George che gnìa fora a gran coruda.

St Mirren à ciapé pôc do n auter colp, canche l portier à mess jí fora y é stat rimplazé da Ryan Mullen.

I mudamënc sforzá y i gol raviciné à parai scurlé i padru de ciasa, che n’à mai porté pericul de torner te la partida; so domisdé é stat riassunt te l’89. minut, canche Tanser à falí dal dut sia volée da sies metres.
