```json
[
  "Lookin’ Good",
  "Boost Your Business !",
  "Shoppable Instagram Posts are just a few clicks away",
  "Let customers order directly from your Instagram posts when you’re powered by Mambalo.",
  "Tap to tag products",
  "Home decor for lovely places like yours",
  "Unleash the power of email with Mailchimp",
  "Use your Mambalo purchase data to segment your email list and create targeted campaigns for current and potential customers.",
  "Share discount coupons",
  "Collect emails with a sign-up form",
  "Short on time? Make ‘em automated",
  "Unleash the power of email with MailChimp",
  "Facebook & Google Retargeting: How to Turn Your Visitors Into Customers",
  "Every visitor on your site is an opportunity to make a sale.",
  "You can sit and wait when your visitors remember your brand, or… You can bring customers back to your online store with remarketing. And that’s no rocket science — read this article to learn how to get started.",
  "Facebook retargeting ads will appear on Facebook sites, and they get about two billion visits every month.",
  "The word “dynamic” in the term means that something in the ads changes – in this case, the items displayed in the ad. To give you a proper understanding of how it works, let’s go through some examples.",
  "We also have a visitor named Janet. Janet also finds the Awesome Super Shoes store on Google. She likes our Red Shoes, but it is four days to her payday and she is short on cash, so she leaves the store website without making a purchase.",
  "Five days later, she is on Facebook, browsing her friends’ posts. Between the posts, she can see an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Red Shoes she already liked. Since she got her paycheck yesterday, she decides to spoil herself and buy the shoes.",
  "In the evening, he goes through several review sites about running shoes. Since most of the sites are on the Google Display Network, one of them runs an Awesome Super Shoes ad with the Running Shoes Jared has already looked at. He hasn’t found better shoes yet and he’s quite tired, so he decides to buy the Running Shoes.",
  "And that is what dynamic retargeting is about. No matter how visitors get to your webpage, if they don’t purchase anything, they’ll see your ads with the product they were interested in.",
  "Hit launch campaign and that’s it. No coding, no messing with CSV files, no stress. The process is the same for Google remarketing ads.",
  "We can’t wait to learn how you’re doing retargeting in your Mambalo store. Tell us in the comments below!"
]
```

source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise

hypo_0:
Sto lejen l reportaj sota cuert de Gloria Steinem su co che l’era da esse na Playboy Bunny... ai finì la Part I e c...🤔
Ence se sai ben che Playboy l’era ehm... na CORPORAZION lol... no ai mai capì tan te n gran che duta sia infrastrutura serviva propi a mantegnì l classism te n modo stra creeeepy, intant che fora se prezentêi come la opzion “de classa” e donca “più etica” respet, per ejëmpl, a Hustler

Pò metarai su valch screenshot plü tardi, ma per ve dà l senso, les Bunnies (che l’era camarires de cocktail) cognéa:
- aceté paiamenc plü basc (de $200-150, che val n adëi ca. $2.5K) co che l’era publiché
- dà via l 50% de dutes les mances
- dà sö sie cognoms ai “Number 1 key holders” (donca, celebrités/elites) sce i lo domanéa
- se sottameté a n esam de pelvi e a n test de sangh, ma no les lasea chirì l medi
- esse spionades da n detectif privat
- se dà da fá per sconder sie maris/bfs

L pont zentral che uneş dut chest:
Les Bunnies NO PODEA ASSOLUTAMËNT MIA (cun liciamënt come penalité) uscì o avëi relaziuns cun autri empleé o clients... PERÒ acompagné y jì fora cun i “Number 1 key holders” l’era permetù, sce no propi encorajé. Vëdes olà che chest va a finì?

Ai noves reclutes ge dae n “Bunny Bible” da studié per imparé dute chëles regoles y istruziuns bizarre.
Per menziuné n pêr de robes enciamò:
- la prestaziun de laur de les Bunnies gniva valuteda cun n “merit system” (SCË, propi chëla parora!) empò de ge scrì su ammonimenc. Miga da se maraveié, l merit no gniva juté mâ da n bon etich de laur, ma ence da requisic te n modo mo avisa specific su apariencia y atejamënt.
- al ê n sistem de incentifs che premiê les Bunnies che vendea plü alcol y merch

- esse spionedes da n detectif privat
- se sfadié per sconder sie maris/bfs

@Edent ah, interesting - was the Hub 5 something you had to request from Virgin, or did you just get one elsewhere and set it up? (As per recent discussion was issued with a 5x, with its lack Modem Mode.)

@yvan I already had the Hub 4. I went onto their online chat and whinged about poor download speeds until they sent me a new Hub.
If you're on the XPON network, I don't think you have a choice though.

@Edent ah yeah, just been trying to do some research, but it's all a bit muddy... I'm FTTP/XGS-PON so I think just stuck with the 5x... not an insurmountable problem, just a little annoying. (But compared to unreliable <40mpbs BT rotting fenland copper that cost me more than Virgin... I'm not really complaining.)

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3

Ai ò bele fat n #suenh che i deventé amia cun Lee Chaeyeon. Ai bele scomenzé a baié cun ela e la roba do che sai é che ai dormì te ciasa soa (desche canche i Franzëusc me à rapì per Nadé) y ela me dijea de jí sö per les schëres y de "metë a post n pô" (l’inglesc su era de gran bën) cun chela che ela volea dì "rangié n pô" per mostrè a sua mama che nosta jera prontes da mangé.
Ela vëgn sö te ciafèa a "metë a post" sia stëna y scomënza a fé gestes per splighé ci che ela volea dì ...
1/

(ela jera tres entusiasmèda de me odëi te chest suenh) ajache ai tolea jö mi ciapedel en cont dl "metë a post."
Do ela me mostra chest pici péz de papier y dij che ela m’à lascé n autograf, ma en cambi ela ôl chësc pici trading card che ai fat te secunda classa de "50 Spikes", n copié de Sonic, zënza dubi, cun deplü spines. (Chest card é daveras te la vita vera BTW). Ai scomenzé a ge splighé ci chel che l’era y se ela le volea propi (sci, ela le volea) al manco ovesse bujën na foto de ela che la tegn su.
2/

En pert ajache me manariéss, ma ence, zënza, degun me credarés che ela ovesse volü chest cos da me.
Fora enlouta ai realizé che nosta n’ovon gnanca i numeri de telefon l’un dl’atra.
3/3

Good job here.
Let's move it a little bit more.
Watch out.
Tucker, let's just kick it over.
Hey.
Hey, hey.
Then let's just move this one out, because the Tucker will be a little sassy with precious, and she'll kind of boss around with food.
That's why we got to move it around, John.
Okay, so they have their hey, of course they want their pellets.
Eat their pellets first before their hey, hey.
So yeah, let's get that.

@hacks4pancakes What do you think is actually going on?
Confused? Anxious? Executive Dysfunction? Unrealistic? Bone idle?
(I'm NOT confusing ND with idleness in my internal ontology here, but I wonder if either might be contributing...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Foe emigration at least, I can imagine myself saying “oh I’m so jealous, I would LOVE to do that” when the truth is there are internal or external reasons why I wouldn’t/couldn’t and someone offering to help me with the logistics wouldn’t change that so I politely decline.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes The grown-up way to politely decline would be "I got ahead of myself: I cannot do that for other reasons much as I'd like to", not brushing it off as a diary issue!

source_doc:
Traction meets fashion: The best weatherproof trainers for rain-slicked pavements

The Cloudhorizon Waterproof feels purpose-built for the stop-start rhythm of winter commuting. Its lightweight waterproof upper keeps your feet dry without adding bulk, and the shoe's smooth rocker shape helps you roll forward easily, even when you're layered up and carrying heavy loads.

Underfoot, Helion foam creates a cushioned bounce that softens long walks between stations, while the grippy rubber outsole keeps things steady on wet steps and shiny tiles. The pared-back design gives it a polished, modern look, ideal if you prefer a trainer that handles lousy weather subtly, without shouting its technical credentials.

source_doc:
@afewbugs I have seen this too, I do worry that new members might not find such groups in the real world now as they are less likely to be on old fashioned social media. For instance someone was trying to give away two pedal cycles in need of repair and couldn't get any interest through Facebook. A few years ago they wouldn't have lasted ten minutes before someone claimed them. I have one and I am gutted that I wasn't able to take the second. Similarly, litter picking and community gardens.

@hicksy2 @afewbugs I have more luck shifting things through Facebook marketplace these days than I do with Gumtree any more, and I can't face eBay for things too big to post. Possibly it depends a lot on where you are though, especially with bikes!

@lnr @hicksy2 Marketplace is a big one keeping me on Facebook too. I used to think it was to keep in touch with friends but I barely see any posts from my actual friends anymore, so now it's mostly marketplace, local groups and the fact most local businesses and even the Library only seem to have their opening times, special events etc on Facebook

source_doc:
Relentless Clan power past Steelers in statement home win

The Clan got off to a strong start with Joe Hazeldine slamming a first-time shot into the Sheffield net after some nice slip passing between Hugo Roy and Deven Sideroff.

Despite some strong defensive play from Glasgow, the Steelers found a breakthrough via Brien Diffley's sharp shooting through traffic before Mikko Juusola gave the visitors the lead with a deflected shot from right wing.

In the second period, the Clan saw momentum swing their way with Steven Seigo slipping a tidy finish from close-range past Matthew Greenfield to tie the game up.

Shortly after, Rylan Schwartz grabbed a go-ahead goal with a bullet from the backdoor after some luck with the Clan avoiding a too many men call.

Sheffield forced their way back into the game with Ryan Tait driving on net and backhanding a shot which Brine saved but didn't keep hold of as Kevin Tansey poked a third goal over the line for the visitors.

With the score line tied going into the final frame, the noise peaked inside Braehead and Glasgow gained control of the game.

Tristin Langan saw retribution for the ongoing battle he had to put up with throughout the game with Mitchell Heard as he cracked the bar with a beautiful finish to give his side the lead.

A holding penalty on Miihkali Teppo applied pressure to the hosts' advantage late on with the Steelers pulling their netminder for the extra attacker.

Langan grabbed his second of the game on the empty net though to round off the night with a well-earned and much-needed two points for the Clan on home ice.

Glasgow Clan head coach, Corey Neilson said after the game: "We were the better team. Our forecheck was excellent, that's something we've worked on all week and it was relentless tonight. The identity we were looking for is starting to show. It was really enjoyable to coach with full lines and take advantage of a team that's playing short, because usually we're on the other side of that."

Sheffield Steelers head coach, Aaron Fox, said: "I thought we were pretty good for the majority of the game. Glasgow jumped on us early, but our bounce back was good. Our guys were gassed by the end, we only had three lines but we were in the battle all game, I can't fault the compete level of our guys."
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Clan implacabel passa i Steelers cun na vittoria significativa a ciasa

Le Clan à tacà cun forza, cun Joe Hazeldine che à sbatù n tir al pröm toc te rëi de Sheffield do biei passajes filtrants anter Hugo Roy y Deven Sideroff.

Malgrà n bel jëugh defensif da pert de Glasgow, i Steelers à ciafà na brecia tras n tir precis de Brien Diffley tres l trafich, dant che Mikko Juusola à dà ai ospic le vantaje cun n tir devià dal ala dreta.

Tel second temp, le Clan à odù che l momëntum jìa de so pert, cun Steven Seigo che à infilé n bel tir da près da zità Matthew Greenfield per parejé la partida.

Püc aprés, Rylan Schwartz à tut le vantaje cun n gol decisif cun n missile dal backdoor, do n pôc de fortuna cun le Clan che à evitè na ciamada por massa jiadëures sul ghiac.

Sheffield à sforzé so retorn te la partida cun Ryan Tait che à mené sun porta y à tiré de rovesc; Brine à paré, mo n'à nia tegnì le puc, y Kevin Tansey à spint le terz gol sur la linia por i ospic.

Cun le resultat en parità dant l'ultim temp, le rumur ti Braehead à ruvé al culm y Glasgow à tut l control de la partida.

Tristin Langan à ciafà revanza por la bataia contìnua che à dovù sostignì tras duta la partida cun Mitchell Heard, canche al à ciapà la traversa cun n bel tir per dà ai si le vantaje.

Na penalità por tratignì a Miihkali Teppo à metù presciun sul vantaje di padru de ciasa ti ultims momënc, cun i Steelers che à tiré fora so portier por l'atacant suplementar.

Langan à segnà dentant so second gol de la sëra te la rëi voda, per stlü l sëra cun dui ponc ben merité y nce besegnoi por le Clan sul ghiac de ciasa.

L'allenadëur principal de Glasgow Clan, Corey Neilson, à dit do la partida: "Nus ieren la squadra migliera. Nosta pression danfora ie stada excelenta, al é valch che i un laurà dut l'edema y inco ela ie stada implacabla. L'identità che i chirëven scomëncia a s'udëi. Al é stat dër plajëi da allené cun linges complëtes y traré profet de na squadra che jueia curta, ajache de solit i sun nus de chel versant."

L'allenadëur principal di Sheffield Steelers, Aaron Fox, à dit: "I pensi che i fussen assé bogn por la maiorité dl jëugh. Glasgow nus à saltà ados dantfora, mo nosta resposta ie stada buna. A la fin i nosc jiadëures ieren sfinit, i veivan demé trëi linges, mo i un cumbaté tras duta la partida y ne pos nia critiché le livel de combat di nosc."

hypo_2:
Clan implacabel passa i Steelers cun na vittoria significativa a ciasa

Le Clan à metù man a la partida cun gran forza, cun Joe Hazeldine che à sbatut n tir al pröm toc te la rëi de Sheffield, do n bel jëugh de passajes anter Hugo Roy y Deven Sideroff.

Malgrà na buna prestaziun defensiva de Glasgow, i Steelers à catà la via dl gol cun n tir precis de Brien Diffley tras le trafich, dant che Mikko Juusola à porté i ospic inant cun n tir devià da l'ala dreta.

Tel secund temp, le Clan à odù le momentum jir de sia pert, cun Steven Seigo che à metù ite cun fineza da prejù su Matthew Greenfield por parejé la partida.

Püc do, Rylan Schwartz à segnà le gol dl vantaje cun n tir fulminant dal backdoor, do n pô de fortuna cun le Clan che à evitè na penalità por massa jiadëures sul ghiac.

Sheffield à forzé so retorn te la partida cun Ryan Tait che à mené sun porta y à tiré de rovesc; Brine à paré, mo n'à nia podù tegnì le puck, y Kevin Tansey à spint le terz gol sur la linia por i ospic.

Cun le resultat en parità dant l'ultim temp, le rumur te Braehead à ruvé al culm y Glasgow à ciapè le control dl jëugh.

Tristin Langan à ciafà sia revanza te la bataia contìnua che al à dovù sostignì tras duta la partida cun Mitchell Heard, canche al à tocà sot la traversa cun na splendida conclusiun per dà ai si le vantaje.

Na penalità por tratignì a Miihkali Teppo à metù presciun sul vantaje di padru de ciasa ti ultims momënc, cun i Steelers che à tiré fora so portier por mané ite n atacant suplementar.

Langan à dentant segnà so second gol de la partida te la rëi voda, per stlü la sëra cun dui ponc ben merité y dër debujigni por le Clan sul ghiac de ciasa.

L'allenadëur principal de Glasgow Clan, Corey Neilson, à dit do la partida: "Nus ieren la squadra migliera. Nosta pression danfora ie stada excelenta; chësc ie valch che i un laurà dut l'edema y inco ela ie stada implacabla. L'identità che i chirëven scomëncia a se mostré. Al é stat dër plajëi da allené cun linges complëtes y traré profet de na squadra che jueia curta, ajache de solit i sun nus da chel versant."

L'allenadëur principal di Sheffield Steelers, Aaron Fox, à dit: "I pensi che i fussen assé bogn por la maiorité dl jëugh. Glasgow nus à ciapè ados dantfora, mo nosta resposta ie stada buna. A la fin i nosc jiadëures ieren sfinit, i veivan demé trëi linges, mo i un cumbaté tras duta la partida y ne pos nia critiché le livel de combat di nosc."

source_doc:
@JugglingWithEggs at least in my friend circle mobile phones not uncommon from early 90s, but they cost a *lot* to call from a landline (so if you were living at home your parents would discourage it), and until 1995-1999 were insecure, anyone with a radio scanner could (and often did) listen to them.
Whilst radio scanners were out of the price range of youths, many older folk had them, and until late 90s were often the kind of radio enthusiast who was a Tory bootlicker and supported the Police and other Establishment organisations, so you if discussing anything subversive on a mobile phone you risked being grassed up..
Ironically the tide turned by late 90s when scanners became affordable, and the Police were still on analogue radios 😁

@JugglingWithEggs by late 1990s everyone had a mobile phone and calls were cheaper (often with a good amount of free minutes) but SMS messages were unreliable and initially didn't even work across networks - people actually talked to each other on them!
One difference was access to physical spaces wasn't as heavily controlled as today - even though there was still CCTV and locals would call old bill on youths "hanging around", there was neither sufficient boots on the ground nor interconnected CCTV (a real security guard had to watch the footage locally, and property owners generally didn't want to pay for these folk at evenings and weekends.
There were also fewer cops on duty in outer suburbs during nights/weekends - they were all deployed into the town centres)

@vfrmedia
I remember texts sometimes taking hours to come through in the early noughties - so not always great for making on the fly arrangements.
Living in market town definitely meant less cctv and coppers back in 90’s. Remember difference when heading out into Bournemouth or Norwich of an evening. But young people having fun wasn’t frowned upon like it is now. My earlier post about facial recognition was about area where there has been uptick in teens just hanging out.

Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. hypo_0:
@JugglingWithEggs almanco te mi zìrcul de amis i telefonins no ê nia rars dai primi ani 90, ma i costâva un *sac* da telefoné da n telefon fix (donca, sce te stêes a ciasa, ti geniturs te descurajâ), y fin al 1995-1999 i n’ê nia segurs, chiunche cun n scanner radio podêa (y de fat o fazêa) asculté.

Ma i scanner radio ê fora dal budget di joegn, n muie de jënt plu vedla ai â, y fin a la fin di ani 90 êss sovente chël sort de apassioné de radio che fajea l servil al Partit Conservadour y sostignîa la Polizia y d’atres organisaziuns dl Establishment, donca sce te discuteves valch de sovversif sun n telefonin, te risichéa de vëgnì denunzié..
Ironich, la situaziun s’à giré a la fin di ani 90 canche i scanner ie deventé acsesibli, y la Polizia la jìa ciamò cun radio analogiches 😁

@JugglingWithEggs a la fin di ani 90 duc ai n telefonin y les telefonades ê plu a bon marcià (sovente cun n bel toc de minuts gratis), ma i SMS no ê mia afidabli y al cuminzio no funziunâ gnanca tra retes desvalies - la jënt de fat la se parléa sun chisc!
N differenza ê che l’azes ai spazis fisics no ê nia controlé tant coche al é incö - ence sce al ê ciamò la videosorveianza y la jënt dl post la ciamâ l’old bill sui joegn che “stêa a tor”,” no gn’ê ni assé stivai sun teren ni CCTV interconeté (n guardian de segureza de veres messêa vardé les registraziuns dal post, y i proprietars de regola no uelêa paé chësta jënt la sëra y ai fins de en setëmanes.
Al ê ence manco polizis de servije fora te les periferies la net/y ai fins de setëmana - duc ê staziuns te i zentres dla zité)

@vfrmedia
Më regordi che i messajes a voutes ciapâa ores da rivé ai primi ani 2000 - donca no dagnora ideal por fá acòrds al mumënt.
Vivere te n paisc de marcé voleva zënter meins CCTV y meins cops ai ani 90. Më regordi la differenza canche un jìa fora a Bournemouth o Norwich la sëra. Ma i joegn che se dërtia no ê vedù mal coche incö. Mi post de dant sun la recunescënza faciala ê davia n’area olache al é sté n aument de adolesćënc che stëia demé a sté fora.
hypo_1:
@JugglingWithEggs almanco tl mi zìrcul de amis i telefonins no ê nia n roba rara dai primi ani 90, ma da n telefon fix costâ al *sac* da ti ciamé (donca, sce te vivêes ciamò cun ti geniturs, ei te dejcurajâ), y fin te chisc ani 1995-1999 no ê nia segurs: chiunche cun n scanner radio podea (y de fat o fasea) i asculté.
Cence che i scanner radio fossa massa chers por i joegn, n muie de jënt plu vedla i â, y fin a la fin di ani 90 ê souvent chël sort de apassioné de radio che fejea l servil ai Tories y sostignîa la Polizia y d’atres organisaziuns dl Establishment; donca, sce te discuteves valch de sovversif sun n telefonin, te risichéa de vëgnì denunzié..
Ironich, a la fin di ani 90 la situaziun s’à giré canche i scanner ie deventé a bon marcià, y la Polizia la jìa ciamò cun radio analogiches 😁

source_doc:
Is this the final Stranger Things?
Is this it?
Has it been quite emotional?
I know you can't really tell us how it ends then, but like you reading those scripts and going through it and stuff, was it just.
Well, I haven't read the end.
I know what happens to my character.
Um, because I kind of forced myself into the writers room.
Um, so you broke in and found out?
Yes.
Basically I messaged the directors and thought, can I come over and have a meeting with you?
And then I came over and then there was a whiteboard.
So you've written your own ending?

The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. hypo_0:
Él chest l’ultim Stranger Things?
Él chest?
Él stat tan emozional?
Sa che no podes propi ne dì co al fenesc, ma endere te lege chisc scripts e te i vive fora e cuscì, él pa stat bele...
Be’, i ne ai nia let la fin.
 Sa cossa che suzed a mi personaj.
Ehm, perche ie me ai en certa maniera sforsà a jì te la stanza di auturs.
Ehm, donca te es intrà a forza y te es gnù a saer?
Sci.
Da fundamënt ie ai scrit ai direturs y ai pinsà: po nì da os a avëi n reunon cun os?
Y spo ie sun gnù, y al oia na lavagna bianca.
Donca te es scrit la fin da té mes?

Be’, la fin ne l’ai nia ancora leda.
Sai ci che suced al mi personaj.

Y spo ie sun gnù, y al oia na lavagna blancia.
Donca te as scrit la toa fin da té?

source_doc:
US bound Thompson stars as Galway reach FBD final

California-bound Matthew Thompson lashed home 2-06 as Galway overcame Leitrim by 11 points in Tuam to book their spot in next week's FBD League decider.

2025 Young Footballer of the Year nominee Thompson will be out of action for the entirety of the league and the early part of the championship, with Padraic Joyce confirming that the Salthill-Knocknacarra players is studying in Berkeley for the upcoming semester.

He was the leading figure on a largely experimental Galway side - which also contained Cian Hernon and Kieran Molloy - as they came from three points down at half-time to beat Leitrim.

Thompson buried a goal in the top corner in the first half but the Connacht champions trailed Leitrim at the break, Killian Gaffney proving effective from placed balls, while Ryan O'Rourke and Jack Kelly also landed points.

Galway manager Padraic Joyce remonstrates with the referee over a decision

However, with Thompson converting a second half penalty, Galway eased home after the interval, with 10 different scorers overall as they ran out 2-19 to 0-14 winners.

After two rounds of the FBD League, the top two progress to next week's final, with Galway facing the winner of tomorrow's Roscommon-Mayo tie.

In Leinster, Westmeath have booked their spot in the O'Byrne Cup final after an 11-point win over Offaly in a goal-fest in Mullingar.

Waiting for them in the decider is a Kildare outfit that defeated Dublin 1-22 to 1-13.

Mark McHugh's Westmeath side advanced ahead of reigning champions Longford following a coin toss last Saturday but they impressed on the field of play on Saturday.

A brace of goals apiece from Danny McCarton and Brandon Kelly, plus another from Senan Baker, saw them run out 5-10 to 2-08 winners.

Ciaran Murphy scored two goals either side of half-time to pull the visitors back into the contest, the margin being briefly reduced to three points 11 minutes into the second half.

However, an unanswered burst of 3-02 over the next 15 minutes saw the hosts settle the contest in an emphatic manner.

Kildare found their feet in the second half against Dublin and now are one game away from a first O'Byrne Cup since 2014.

Harry O'Neill fires to the net for Kildare

Both management teams experimented in Newbridge with Dublin in particular shorn of overly familiar faces, but in the first half it seemed to matter little as they led 1-08 to 0-08 at the break.

Jamie McCarville palmed home their goal but it was Clyde Burke who caught the eye for the travelling support with some brilliant shooting that included two orange flags - the second of which was of the highest quality.

Alex Beirne was racking up the scores for the Lilywhites though and his two-point free early in the second half kick-started a run of 1-05 without reply, Harry O'Neill with the goal in the 43rd minute.

Kildare continued to turn the screw with James Harris' late two-pointer sending them on their way.
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Thompson, de rota ai Stac Unis, briliesc ti che Galway rua ala finala FBD

Matthew Thompson, che va a California, à metü a ciasa 2-06, tl moment che Galway à superé Leitrim de 11 pont a Tuam por se aseguré so post tl final de la FBD League dla setemana che vëgn.

Thompson, candidat al premi de Jügn Jiadour de l’Ann 2025, sarà fora por duta la liga y por la pröma pert del campionat, cun Padraic Joyce che à confermé che le jiadour de Salthill-Knocknacarra studia a Berkeley por le semëster che vëgn.

Al é sté la figura prinzipala de n’ëschit de Galway gran pert sperimentala - olache j’era ince Cian Hernon y Kieran Molloy - tl moment che ai é gnüs da trei pont sot sot a meza tëmp por bati Leitrim.

Thompson à soterré n gol tl curn de sora tla pröma mesadëda, ma i campiuns de Connacht é jüs al ripaus sot a Leitrim, cun Killian Gaffney eficaz dai baluns piazé, y cun Ryan O'Rourke y Jack Kelly che à ince fat pont.

L’atorenadour de Galway Padraic Joyce se lamenta cun l’arbitro por na dezijiun

Ma, cun Thompson che à trasformé n penalty tla secunda mesadëda, Galway à ciapé la man do l’intervallo, cun 10 marcadus diferents en dut, y à vintu 2-19 a 0-14.

Dô dui turns dla FBD League, i pröms dui va inant ala finala dla setemana che vëgn, cun Galway che afrontarà le vëncedour dl incunté de doman anter Roscommon y Mayo.

In Leinster, Westmeath s’à aseguré so post tla finala dla O'Byrne Cup do na vitora de 11 pont sun Offaly te n partit ric de gol a Mullingar.

A speté i tl decisif él n’ëschit de Kildare che à batü Dublin 1-22 a 1-13.

L’ëschit de Westmeath de Mark McHugh à passé inant dan ch’i campiuns regnanc de Longford do n lanz de moneda sabeda passada, ma sabeda ai à impresioné sun le ciamp de jüch.

Dui gol ciascun da Danny McCarton y Brandon Kelly, plü n ater da Senan Baker, ai à mené ala vitora por 5-10 a 2-08.

Ciaran Murphy à marcé dui gol, un dan y un do meza tëmp, por mené i giacadus de fora danteror tl contest, cun le vantaje che é gnü per n curi ridot a trei pont 11 menüć te la secunda mesadëda.

Ma n slanç zënza resposta de 3-02 ti 15 menüć che à seguité à lassé i padru de ciasa sistemé la contëisa te maniera emphatica.

Kildare à ciafé so ritme tla secunda mesadëda cuntra Dublin y ades é a n soul partit da sia pröma O'Byrne Cup dal 2014.

Harry O'Neill tira tla rëi por Kildare

Dut y dui i stafs tecnics à sperimenté a Newbridge, cun Dublin en particolar zënza tropes fazes familiares, ma tla pröma mesadëda al paraa che chësc contëiesc püch, ajache ai menaa 1-08 a 0-08 al ripaus.

Jamie McCarville à spint le balun tla rëi por so gol, ma al é sté Clyde Burke che à ciapé l’ödl dl suport che viagiëia cun cherti tiri brillanc che à inclodü dui pont da doi - le second de chisc de la pü auta cualité.

Alex Beirne metea adöm i pont por i Lilywhites, però, y so free da doi pont dant tla secunda mesadëda à metü en movimënt n slanç de 1-05 zënza resposta, cun Harry O'Neill che à fat le gol tl 43ejim menüt.

Kildare à cuntinué a strenjer la vite, cun le doi pont tardif de James Harris che i à mandé decisivamënter inant.

Mo, cun Thompson che à trasformà n penalty tla secunda mesadëda, Galway à controlà le jüch do la pausa, cun 10 marcadus diferents en dut, y à vintu cun le resultat de 2-19 a 0-14.

Do dui turns dla FBD League, i pröms dui avanzëia ala finala dla setëmana che vëgn, cun Galway che jiarà cuntra le vëncedour dl incunté de doman anter Roscommon y Mayo.

In Leinster, Westmeath s’à assegurà so post tla finala dla O'Byrne Cup do na vitora de 11 pont sun Offaly te n partit rich de gol a Mullingar.

A i speté tla finala é n’ëschit de Kildare che à bati Dublin cun 1-22 a 1-13.

L’ëschit de Westmeath de Mark McHugh à passé inant dan ai campiuns regnanc de Longford do n lanç de monëda sabeda passada, mo sabeda ai à impressionà sun le ciamp.

Dui gol ciascun da Danny McCarton y Brandon Kelly, plü n ater da Senan Baker, ai à menà Westmeath ala vitora cun 5-10 a 2-08.

Ciaran Murphy à segnà dui gol, un dan y un do meza tëmp, por mené i giogadus de fora endô tla partida, cun le dezavantaje che é gnü per n curt moment ridot a trei pont 11 menüć tla secunda mesadëda.

Mo n slanç de 3-02 zënza risposta ti 15 menüć sucessifs à permetü ai padru de ciasa de stlar jö la contëisa te maniera neta.

Kildare à ciafà so ritme tla secunda mesadëda cuntra Dublin y ades é a n soul partit da sia pröma O'Byrne Cup dal 2014.

Harry O'Neill tira tla rëi por Kildare

Dut y dui i stafs tecnics à sperimentà a Newbridge, cun Dublin en particolar zënza massa fazes conosciüdes, mo tla pröma mesadëda al paraa che chësc contëiesc pôc, ajache ai menaa 1-08 a 0-08 al ripaus.

Jamie McCarville à spint le balun tla rëi por so gol, mo al é stat Clyde Burke che à ciapà l’atenziun dl publich aladô cun cherti tiri brillanc che à inclodü dui pont da doi - le second de chisc de qualità massima.

Alex Beirne racoiea però pont por i Lilywhites, y so free da doi pont dant tla secunda mesadëda à metü en movimënt n slanç de 1-05 zënza risposta, cun Harry O'Neill che à fat le gol tl 43ejim menüt.

Kildare à cuntinuà a strenjer, cun le doi pont tardif de James Harris che i à dat l’ultim impuls sun la strada dla vitora.

source_doc:
The Case for Impeaching Donald Trump

Bombs over Latin America: It's giving Wag the Dog, if you ask me. The administration, seemingly hot to bring back neoconservative military conquest, soft-launched its latest regime change war in Venezuela by making indiscriminate attacks on boats in the Caribbean and Pacific waters off of Central America. These attacks, all undertaken without a jot of congressional oversight and on the dubious premise that the boats were packed with fentanyl bound for the United States, were murderous on their own. But the news that the military was ordered to strike an already stricken boat in a "double tap" attack to kill any survivors has raised the specter of war crimes - and in a way that even many Republicans don't seem ready to countenance.

Trump's Binance buddy gets a pardon: Changpeng Zhao began this year the disgraced former CEO of Binance, the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange, having done prison time for, as the Biden DOJ put it, "failing to maintain an effective anti-money laundering (AML) program," violating the Bank Security Act, and allowing money to flow freely to a host of bad actors, including "terrorists, cybercriminals, and child abusers." But Zhao, having forfeited the right to run Binance, wanted back in. So he used his connections to Trump's family and inner circle to secure a pardon that would let him run the show again. In return, Zhao showered his attention on World Liberty Financial - using Binance's leverage to enrich Trump's private crypto fund. TNR's Tim Noah was positively apoplectic about the shady arrangement.

Chips to China: Speaking of Tim Noah and apoplexy: It's probably not great that one firm, Nvidia, has come to possess such godlike, market-moving power. Its outsize importance to the global economy had Noah fingering it as one of the major pillars to crumble, when he gamed out a potential Trump stock market crash back in October. Trump's been doing what he can to boost Nvidia's fortunes, however: This year, the president broke with long-standing national security tradition and announced that he was permitting the firm to sell its H200 chips to China. As The New York Times" David Sanger noted, the deal - the fruits of "intense lobbying" from Nvidia CEO and White House gadfly Jensen Huang - raised a basic question: "If the chips that power the most advanced technology can be sold to the United States" chief technological, military and financial competitor, where is the new line drawn?" That's probably the least of Trump's concerns, however: The deal also guaranteed that "25 percent of all the revenues from the sales would go to the United States," in yet another case of this administration's affection for fascist corporatism.

hypo_0:
La rejon per metter Donald Trump sota acusaziun

Bombes sora l’America Latina: se me domandes a me, al dà propi l’aria de Wag the Dog. L’aministraziun, che para impazienta da reportè inant la conquista milité neoconservadora, à lancié en maniera discreta sia ultima vera de cambiament de regime te la Venezuela, fajon ataches indiscriminé a barces te la Mar Caribe y te les aighes dal Pacific demez fora da l’America Centrala. Chisc ataches, duc fac fora de n iota de control dal Congress y sora la premissa dubiosa che les barces fosses ciamades de fentanyl destined ai Stac Unii, é stac omizidesc bele da per se. Mo la notizia che ai milité ge é stat comandé da colpì na barca bele colpida te n atach de “double tap” por copé chi che fossa arjigné à fat nascer l’ombra de crims de vera – y en na maniera che gnanca deplù republicans no par pronti da toleré.

L’ami de Trump te Binance ciafa na grazia: Changpeng Zhao à scomencié chest an coche l’ex CEO desgrazié de Binance, la plù granda borsa de criptomonedes dl mond, do aer passé del temp te preson per, coche à dit le DOJ de Biden, “mancié de mantignì n program eficient contra le riciclamënt de denars (AML)”, violé la Lege de Sicureza Bancaria y permetù che i scioldi scurésse libramënter verso n grum de sogec pericolosc, inclujì “terrorisc, cybercriminali y abusadus de mutons”. Mo Zhao, do aer renunzié al derit de mené Binance, orea jì endò ite. Dunca à adoré sü si ligams cun la familia de Trump y cun so zënter intern por se aseguré na grazia che ge permetessa da tor a mené dut endò. Chips por la Cina: jà che i sun a parlè de Tim Noah y de so sté fora de se: probablemëter no l’é n gran ben che na sola firma, Nvidia, abie rivé a possedë n podë tan gran, da mudé i marcac coche n dio. So importanza sproporzioneda por l’economia globala à fat sì che Noah la menzionassa coche un di pilastri majors che podessa sbregoré, canche al se à metù a imaginé n possibel crol de la borsa sot Trump l’otober passé. Coche à noté David Sanger dl New York Times, l’acordo – früt de n’“intensa atività de lobby” dal CEO de Nvidia y figura fastidiosa dla Ciasa Blanca Jensen Huang – à alsé na domanda de fondo: “Se i chips che alimentëia la tecnologia plü avanzeda podëssa gni vendüs al principal concorrënt tecnologich, milité y finanzial di Stac Unii, olà vëniel traciada la neva linia?” Chësta, dentant, l’é probablemëter le minur di pensiers de Trump: l’acordo à ence garantì che “le 25 per zënt de dutes les entrades da chëstes vendites jissa ai Stac Unii”, en n auter cajo dl afët de chësta aministraziun per le corporativism fascist.

Le cajo per meter Donald Trump sota acusaziun

Bombes sora l’America Latina: se me domandëis, al dà l’imprëscion de Wag the Dog. L’aministraziun, che para arjida da riporté indô la conquista militara neoconservadora, à avié en maniera discreta sia ultima vera de cambiament de regime te la Venezuela, cun ataches indiscriminé contra barces te les aighes caraibiches y pacifiches da dlungia l’America Centrala. Chisc ataches, duc mené inant zënza n minim de control dal Congress y sun la premissa dubiosa che les barces fossa ciamades de fentanyl destinat ai Stac Unii, ê bele per cont so de n carater omicida. Mo la notizia che ai milité ge é stat ordené de colpì n barca bele colpida cun n atach de “double tap”, per copé chi che fossa resté en vita, à fat gnì fora l’ombra de crims de vera – y te na maniera che gnanca tröc republicans no parai pronti da accepté.

L’ami de Trump de Binance ciafa na grazia: Changpeng Zhao à scomencié chest an coche l’ex CEO desgrazié de Binance, la plü granda plata de scambia de criptomonedes dl mond, do aer passé del temp te preson per, coche à dit le Departamënt de Giustizia de Biden, “n avëi mantignì n program eficient contra le reciclamënt de denars (AML)”, violé la Lege de Sicureza Bancaria y permetü che i scioldi jissa libramënter a n gran numer de sogec periculusc, inclujì “terrorisc, criminali cibernetics y abusadus de mutons”. Mo Zhao, do aer pierdü le derit de mené Binance, orea rientré. Dunca à adoré sü si ligams cun la familia de Trump y cun so cerchio intern per se asseguré na grazia che ge permitessa de tor a mené dut endô. En cambiamënt, Zhao à orienté sia atenzion sun World Liberty Financial, sfrutann la forza de Binance per arichì le fond privat de cripto de Trump. Tim Noah de TNR é stat dal dut sconvolgü per chest aranjamënt oscür.

Chips ala Cina: jà che i sun a parlè de Tim Noah y de so sconvolgimënt, probablemëter no l’é nia de bun che na sola firma, Nvidia, abie rivé a avëi n podëi tan gran da mudé i marcac coche n dio. So importanza sproporzioneda per l’economia globala à mené Noah a indichéla coche un di pilastri principals che podessa crolé, canche al se à metü a imaginé n possibel crol dla borsa sot Trump l’otober passé. Trump, dentant, à fat chel che al pó per rinforzé la fortuna de Nvidia: chest an, le president à rompü cun na tradiziun de segurëza nazionala da dër lunc y à anuncé che al permetea ala firma de vende si chips H200 ala Cina. Coche à noté David Sanger dl New York Times, l’acordo – früt de n’“intensa atività de lobby” dal CEO de Nvidia y figura fastidiosa dla Ciasa Blanca Jensen Huang – à alsé na domanda de fondo: “Se i chips che alimentëia la tecnologia plü avanzeda podëssa gni vendüs al principal concorrënt tecnologich, milité y finanzial di Stac Unii, olà vëniel traciada la neva linia?” Chësta, dentant, l’é probablemëter le minur di pensiers de Trump: l’acordo à ence garantì che “le 25 per zënt de dutes les entrades da chëstes vendites jissa ai Stac Unii”, en n auter cajo dl afët de chësta aministraziun per le corporativism fascist.

source_doc:
"An utterly miserable day": Kempton Park meeting marred by death of three horses

The Lanzarote Hurdle card at Kempton Park was marred by the death of three horses, including the Grade One-winning Kalif Du Berlais, whose loss Paul Nicholls described as "a big kick in the teeth" and a "sad day."

Kalif Du Berlais - whose ownership group includes Sir Alex Ferguson - unseated Harry Cobden in the four-runner Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase and landed lame, with the broken shoulder he sustained proving untreatable and he was euthanised by the veterinary team on Saturday.

Nicholls said: "It's a sad day when you lose horses like that, it's hard on the whole team. It's a big kick in the teeth for everyone, the owners, the poor girl who looks after him - you hate to see that happen. He was just showing his class today, he jumped and travelled well and sadly now he will never be able to show the potential we thought he had.

"I can say as much as I like, but it's just a shame for the whole team. Harry was extremely upset and is missing his ride in the last as he doesn't feel great about it. He's a big, bold horse who attacks his fences and those horses, when they do that, can end up having a bad fall.

"He was enthusiastic today and travelling beautifully and we'll never know where we would have ended up, we've always had a lot of faith in him. These things happen, sadly, and we'll have to try to pick ourselves up and move forward. These horses get the best of everything, there's not much you can say to make it better at this point.

"It never gets any easier when these things happen and it's a big old blow."

In the Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase, Jonjo and AJ O'Neill's Peso was pulled up on the flat with an injury that could not be treated, leaving racecourse vets with no choice but to euthanise him.

Harry Derham saddled Wertpol for the juvenile hurdle and the horse looked to be running a huge race before falling at the last and sustaining a life-ending injury. Derham said on his X account: "An utterly miserable day at Kempton Park today losing Wertpol who we only had the good fortune of having in our yard for a short period of time.

"It's a sad day when you lose horses like that, it's hard on the whole team. It's a big kick in the teeth for everyone," said Paul Nicholls. Photograph: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"He was a bright talent who was fresh and happy doing his work every day, often playing around and expressing himself. He loved his job and I am so sad for his Heart Of The South syndicate, who are the most wonderful group of people. Racing can at times be a painful sport and today has been a tough day for a number of connections. A day to forget."

A spokesperson for Kempton Park said: "All of us at Kempton Park care deeply about the welfare of all racehorses, as do the thousands of racing staff who provide them with world-class levels of care at home every day. Our heartfelt condolences are with the connections of all three horses."

hypo_0:
«N di dal dut miserable»: la riunion a Kempton Park rovinèda dala mort de trëi ciavai

La riunion dl Lanzarote Hurdle a Kempton Park é stada rovinèda dala mort de trëi ciavai, anter chisc ence Kalif Du Berlais, vincidú de Grade One, la cui perda Paul Nicholls à descrit coche «n gran colp ai dëins» y «n di trist».

Kalif Du Berlais - tl grup de propietars dl cual à pert ence Sir Alex Ferguson - à fat scendëi Harry Cobden tla Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase cun cater concorrënc y é ateré zopf, cun la spala rota che el à subí resultan nia tratabla, y el é stat soprà fora dal team veterinarie ai sabeda.

Nicholls à dit: «Al é n di trist canche te pierdes ciavai insciö, al péśa a duta la squadra. Al é n gran colp ai dëins per duc, i propietars, la povera muta che s'à cura de el - te odies da odëi che chësc suceda. Al stava bele da mostrè sia classa incö, al saltava y al jìa ben, y daidé lamentabelmenter no podarà mai plu mostrè l potenzial che nos ponsavon che al avëssa.

«I poi dì tan che i vo, ma al é demà n pecà per duta la squadra. Harry ea deplü scunort y no montarà nia tla ultima corsa ajache no se sent nia ben per via de chest. Al é n gran ciaval corajous che ataca i stacoi y chi ciavai, canche ai fej insciö, po finí cun na bruta tomèda.

«Incö al jera plen de entusiasm y al jìa da maraveia y no savaron mai olache nos sarions jüs a finí; nos i avon tres molta fede en el. Chëstes cosses suced, lamentabelmenter, y nos araron da provè da se recuperè y jí inant. Chisc ciavai àn l miour de dut, no n'é nia gran cossa che un possa dì por meioré la situazion en chest moment.

«No deventa mai plu saur canche chëstes cosses suced y al é n colp gran y pesant.»

Tla Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase, Peso de Jonjo y AJ O'Neill é stat fermé sön la plata cun na ferida che no podeva nia gní tratèda, lassan ai veterinaris dl ipodrom nia autra dezijion che chëra de l sopré fora.

Harry Derham à mené Wertpol per la corsa a ostacoi di juvenis y l ciaval pareva da fà na corsa de gran livel dant che al é tomé al ultim ostacol y à subí na ferida mortala. Derham à scrit sön so cont X: «N di dal dut miserable incö a Kempton Park, cun la perda de Wertpol che nos avon abù la bona fortuna da avëi te nosc cortil demò per n curt temp.

«Al é n di trist canche te pierdes ciavai insciö, al péśa a duta la squadra. Al é n gran colp ai dëins per duc», à dit Paul Nicholls. Fotografia: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

«Al ea n talent luminos, fresch y cuntënt canche al fazea so lëur vigni di, sovënz jueian y mostran sia personalité. Al amava so lëur y i sun dal dut trist per so syndicat Heart Of The South, che é l grupp de jënt plü maraveious. La corsa de ciavai po ester de vire en vire n sport dolorous y incö à stat n di dificil per plöi de chisc liams. N di da desmentié.»

N portavoce de Kempton Park à dit: «Duc nos da pert de Kempton Park tegnon profundamënter al benester de duc i ciavai de corsa, coche ence i miles de colaboradus de corse che ai dà vigni di a ciasa n livel de cura de clasa mondiala. Nosses condolianzes plü sincere va ai liams de duc y trëi i ciavai.»

«N di dal dut de miseria»: la riunion de Kempton Park rovinada dala mort de trëi ciavai

La riunion dl Lanzarote Hurdle a Kempton Park é stada rovinada dala mort de trëi ciavai, anter chisc ence Kalif Du Berlais, vincidú de Grade One, la cui perdita Paul Nicholls à descrit coche «n gran colp» y «n di trist».

Kalif Du Berlais - dl cui grup de proprietars fej pert ence Sir Alex Ferguson - à fat tomé Harry Cobden tla Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase cun cater partecipanc y al é ateré zop, cun la spala rota che al à subí che s’à mostrada nia tratabla; al é stat soprà fora dal team veterinarie en sabeda.

Nicholls à dit: «Al é n di trist canche te perdes ciavai insciö, al é düra per duta la squadra. Al é n gran colp per duc, per i proprietars, per la povera muta che se n'à cura de él - te odies da odëi che chësc sucede. Incö al stava demò mostran sia classa, al saltava ben y al jìa ben, y por desgracia ades no podarà mai plu mostrè l potenzial che nos pensavon che al avëssa.

«I poi dí tant che i voi, mo al é demò n gran desplajëi per duta la squadra. Harry jera dal dut sconsolé y no monterà tla ultima corsa, ajache no se senta nia ben per chest. Al é n gran ciaval corajos che ataca i ostacoi y chisc ciavai, canche ai fej insciö, po finí cun na cativa tomeda.

«Incö al jera entusiasmé y al jìa da maraveia, y no savaron mai olà che nos sarions rivé; nos àn tres abú gran fiduzia en él. «No deventa mai plu saur canche chëstes cosses suced y al é n colp gran y pesant.»

Tla Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase, Peso de Jonjo y AJ O'Neill é stat arfesté sön la plata cun na ferida che no podeva nia gní tratada, lascian ai veterinaris dl ipodrom nia autra dezijion che chëra de l sopré fora.

Harry Derham à preparé Wertpol per la corsa a ostacoi di juvenis y l ciaval pareva da corëi na grandissima corsa dant che al tomès al ultim ostacol y subiss na ferida mortala. source_doc:
And being one of the weirdo, we just frequently get attacks here and there. Either online, offline, or even from your closest people. Those attacks usually stem from homophobia, transphobia, or sometimes just, don't like how weird we are and how weird we act, especially furries that do deeper immersions like roleplaying and therianthropy.

Hence some of us got safety by not needing to tell who we are and where we were from. Some of us got safety by only revealing ourselves to our friends or close friends. Face/body reveal is a culture that most of the furries did at least once in a private post, whether it be "delete soon" kind of post or in story.

Despite being so, we're still open for social interactions offline. We do furmeets—a personal meeting between furries, be it in a group or personal, be it in an event or just casually—and sometimes making a con/fur on, such as MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, and so on. It's fun to meet them offline, get to know each other, be able to see them in person as most of us have never seen each other's faces, take a photo to keep personally and censor publicly, laugh together and discuss similar interests, and so on. It's fun, social, and warm.

Although, things don't feel the same today. As people start trying to strip anonymity of people, attack furries, therian, LGBTQIA, and dox them, as how also our community participate and stir the dramas inside, things has been a little more chaotic, less warm, and less feeling like community or family. It's not the same anymore.

Part of me hopes things can return to how it feels in the 2000s and 2010s, but, I'll just let God do the rest. I'm a little hopeless in society and humans. I'm tired of how things get worse and meant to attack and divide small communities into a hopeless being. I don't like how society is now no longer respecting and being in unity.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Y a essi un di “strani”, ciafonon sovente ataches chi y là. Sce online, offline, o ence da jënt che te stëi plu apress. Chisc ataches vegn de solit da omofobia, transfobia, o a iadi bele de n nen i piajon coche nseion stran y coche se cumporton, soraldut i furries che jita plu a fund cun robe coche roleplay y teriantropia.

Per chest, zacan de nos à ciafà sigureza te n mester dì chi nseion y da olache n jignon. Zacan à ciafà sigureza bele da se mustré demé ai amis o ai amis plu apress. Reveal de faza/corp é na cultura che la maorité di furries à fat almanco n iede te n post privat, sce l fossa n post da “mëte ju prest” o te na story.

Ma ence insciö, nseion amò orvi per interaziuns soziales offline. Fajon furmeets — n incont personal anter furries, sce te n grup o personal, sce te n event o bele a la bona — y a iadi ence cons/furcons, coche MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, y insciö inant. Al é bel s’incunté offline, se cunëscer miör, podëi se udëi dal vif da persona, ajache la maorité de nos n’à mai vedù la faza di atri, fé na foto da tegnì per nos y censuré publicamënter, rie adum y baié de interessc sumëi, y insciö inant. Al é bel, soziel y cialt.

Mo aldidancuei, les robes n se sint nia plu compagn. Can la jënt mëncia a prové da tó ju l’anonimat a la jënt, atacà furries, terians, LGBTQIA, y fé doxing, y ence coche la nostra comunité à na man te mëscedé y movëi drames dedant, les robes é deventades n pô plu caotiches, manco cialtes, y manco coche na comunité o na familia. Al n’é plu l medemo.

N pert de me spera che les robes posse torné a coche ales se sintiva ti agn 2000 y 2010, mo, lasserai a Dio fé l rest. Ai n pô de desperanza tla sozieté y ti umans. So stuné de udëi coche les robes va de mal te pech y é fates per atacà y spartì piceres comunités cina a les lascé zënza speranza. A me n piaj nia coche la sozieté de aldiancuei n respeta plu y n stea plu adum te unità.
hypo_1:
Y ajache nseion odüdi coche “strani”, ciafonon de contign ataches da na pert y da chëra. Sce online, offline, o ence da jënt che n é plu apress. Chisc ataches vën de solit da omofobia, transfobia, o a iadi bele dal fat che ai n piaj nia coche nseion strani y coche se cumporton, soraldut i furries che vij più a fund te chëstes esperiënzes, coche roleplay y teriantropia.

Per chest, zacan de nos ciafa sigureza te n mester dì chi che nseion y da olà che n unì. Zacan de nos ciafa sigureza bele mostrannse demé ai amis o ai amis plu strec. L reveal de faza/corp é na cultura che la maorité di furries à fat almanco n iede te n post privat, sce l fossa n post de sort “mëte ju prest” o te na story.

Fajon furmeets — n incontr personal anter furries, sce te n grup o da pèr, sce te n event o bele a la bona — y a iadi ence n con/furcon, coche MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, y insciö inant. Al é bel incunté chisc offline, se cunëscer miör, podëi se udëi dal vif ajache la maorité de nos n à mai vedù la faza di atri, fé na foto da tegnì per nos y censuré publicamënter, rie adum y baié de interessc sumëi, y insciö inant. Al é devertënt, soziel y cialt.

Mo aldidancuei, les robes n se sint nia plu compàgn. Can la jënt mëncia a prové da tó ju l’anonimat a d’atri, atacà furries, terians, LGBTQIA, y fé doxing, y ence can la nostra comunité mëscia ite y mëncia a movei drames dedant, les robes é deventades n pô plu caotiches, manco cialtes, y cun manco de chest sintimënt de comunité o familia. Al n é plu l medemo.

A me n piaj nia coche la sozieté de aldidancuei n sa plu respeté y sté adum te unità.

source_doc:
Robin Roefs" penalty saves secures Sunderland's spot in FA Cup fourth round

Get the Adam Clery Football Column. A newsletter that unpacks the absurdities and oddities of the beautiful game

The ACFC newsletter: unpacking football's absurdities

Unpack football's oddities with the ACFC newsletter

Robin Roefs was Sunderland's hero as Everton's FA Cup hopes came to a premature end once again after three woeful penalties in a shootout saw the Black Cats reach round four.

David Moyes" threadbare squad looked like exiting in normal time until James Garner's 89th-minute spot-kick cancelled out Enzo Le Fee's brilliant first-half strike.

But extra time was the last thing the hosts, down to just 12 senior players, needed and when the shootout came around Garner, Thierno Barry and Beto all saw their efforts saved by Roefs.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka and Luke O'Nien confidently scored their first three attempts to help Sunderland into the fourth round for only the second time in 11 seasons.

It was a hammer blow to Everton, who were dragged back into the game by Adam Aznou, a £7.8million signing from Valladolid in the summer who had not had a sniff of first-team action.

The teenager's only senior football was two appearances in the EFL Trophy back in September and October and his 86th-minute introduction for Merlin Rohl was only because Moyes had little to no option.

But the Spanish-born Moroccan showed more drive in the four minutes of regulation time than many of his battle-weary team-mates had in the preceding 86 - particularly fellow 19-year-old and summer arrival Tyler Dibling, who cost five times as much.

Within three minutes he won an admittedly soft penalty after a shoulder-to-shoulder challenge by Trai Hume allowing Garner to equalise.

Replays of the foul on the big screens at full-time enraged Xhaka, who hurled his water bottle into the turf and raged at the perceived injustice to anyone in earshot, but the Black Cats" captain was soon celebrating.

It is rare for Sunderland, promoted from the Championship last season, to be favourites in any game but the fact Regis Le Bris was able to make five changes and still have the likes of Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete and Wilson Isidor in reserve swung the odds in their favour.

Injuries, the Africa Cup of Nations and suspensions for Michael Keane and Jack Grealish were compounded by Tim Iroegbunam's hamstring problem which took the absences to nine.

Barry, the one senior player he left out, accounted for 23 of the 27 first-team appearances among the substitutes with five of six academy players not having previously featured at all.

After Harrison Armstrong sliced wide their only first chance of the first half, Sunderland took control and should have been comfortably ahead by the interval.

Their first shot resulted in the opener - and what a goal.

Everton failed to deal with a long throw and Eliezer Mayenda teed up Le Fee to send a cushioned right-footed volley curling past Jordan Pickford.

Moyes had a face like thunder and his demeanour was not improved as Pickford clawed away a Nordi Mukiele overhead kick and tipped away, at full-stretch, Romaine Mundle's strike from distance.

Surprisingly, the Everton boss did not make the only change available to him and sacrifice one of his five midfielders for Barry at the start of the second half, but they did not come to life until Mayenda rolled an angled shot just wide with less than half an hour remaining.

Beto's appeal for a penalty for a shirt pull by Hume was waved away but referee John Brooks obliged when Aznou went down and Garner equalised.

Unfortunately for Everton their subsequent penalties were not as confident, with Barry and Beto's stuttering run-ups far from convincing, as Roefs saved all three.

hypo_0:
La parada dl rigour de Robin Roefs assegura al Sunderland sie post te la quarta runda dla FA Cup

Rcia la rubrica de football de Adam Clery. Na newsletter che spliega les assurdités y les stranies dl bel jüch

La newsletter ACFC: splijan les assurdités dl football

Spliega les stranies dl football cun la newsletter ACFC

Robin Roefs é sté l’eroe dl Sunderland canche les speranzes dl Everton te la FA Cup é gnüdes a fin massa tert n’atra ota, do che trëi rigours miserabli te na seria an porté i Black Cats te la quarta runda.

La rosa scarsa de David Moyes paraia destinada a gní fora ti 90 menüć, enchin che l rigour dl 89. menüt de James Garner à anulé l briljant gol dla pröma mesadà de Enzo Le Fee.

Mo la proroa é stada la ultima cossa che i parons de ciasa, resté cun demé 12 jügadus seniors, avëssa bujü, y canche é rivada la seria di rigours, Garner, Thierno Barry y Beto an odü süs tîc paré da Roefs.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka y Luke O'Nien à segnà cun sigürezza süs pröms trëi tentatifs por ajudé l Sunderland a rivé te la quarta runda demé por la secunda ota te 11 stagions.

Al é stat n colp dur por l Everton, che é gnü retrat te la partida da Adam Aznou, n acquist de 7,8 miliuns de lires da Valladolid d’insté, che n’ea nia ncia odü n menüt cun la pröma squadra.

L’unich football senior dl adolescent êra döes apariziuns te l’EFL Trophy te setëmber y otober, y sia introduziun al 86. menüt al post de Merlin Rohl êra demé porvia che Moyes n’â gnanca de alternatives.

Mo l marocan nasciü te Spagna à mustré plü de determinaziun te i cater menüć de regulamënt che brasc de sü cumpagns de squadra stancs n’â fat te i 86 precedënc - suradöt l so coetaneo de 19 agn Tyler Dibling, rivé d’insté y costé cinch iadi de plü.

Te trei menüć al à conquisté n rigour, amess che debl, do na sfida spala cun spala cun Trai Hume, permettëi a Garner da parejé.

Les repliches dl fallo sui maxischerms a fin partida à fat monté la rabia de Xhaka, che à sburté sia butëia d’agua per tera y s’à sfoghé sun l’ingiustizia percepida cun vigni un che podêi l odëi, mo l capitano di Black Cats à ciamó tost podü festajé.

Al é rar che l Sunderland, promové fora dla Championship la stagiun passada, sidesse favorit te valch partida, mo l fat che Regis Le Bris podêssa fé cinch mudaziuns y avëi ciamó te reserva i ador de Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete y Wilson Isidor à fat pëndëi les probabilités a sü favor.

I malans, la Coppa d’Africa y les suspensiuns por Michael Keane y Jack Grealish é gnüs agravés dal problem ai tendins dla coscia de Tim Iroegbunam, che à porté les assënzes a nö.

Barry, l’unich jügadur senior lassé fora, rapresentâ 23 dles 27 apariziuns dla pröma squadra anter i sostitüc, cun cinch di ses jügadus dl’academia che n’â nia mai jüé dant.

Do che Harrison Armstrong à tajé fora largia la sola vera ocajiun dl pröm tëmp, l Sunderland à tut l control y avess mess jí al interval cun n vantaje comod.

So pröm tir à porté al gol dl vantaje - y che gol.

L’Everton n’à nia savü gestí n lungh lanç y Eliezer Mayenda à preparé por Le Fee, che cun na volada amortida col pê dër curlada à mané la bala do Jordan Pickford.

Moyes â na faza fosca y so atejamënt n’é nia ameglioré canche Pickford à para cun gran fadia na rovesciada de Nordi Mukiele y, alungé al massim, à devié n tir da lunh de Romaine Mundle.

Por surprëisa, l coach dl Everton n’à nia fat al scomenc dl secundo tëmp l’unica mudaziun a desposiziun, cioé sacrifié un di sü cinch centrocampisc por Barry, mo la squadra n’é gnüda a vita enchin canche Mayenda à mandé n tir angolé demé de fora cun manco de mesa ora da jüé.

L’apel de Beto por n rigour por n tiron de majëia da Hume é stat sburté via, mo l arbitro John Brooks à fissé l punt blanc canche Aznou é cialé per tera y Garner à parejé.

Desfortüna por l Everton, i rigours che à seguité n’é nia stac tant sigürs, cun les rincorses interotes de Barry y Beto dal dut nia convincëntes, y Roefs à paré düc y trëi.

L’apel de Beto por n rigour por n tiron de maia da Hume é stat ignoré, mo l arbitro John Brooks à indiché l punt blanc canche Aznou é cialé por tera y Garner à parejé.

Desfortüna por l’Everton, i rigores che à seguité n’é nia stac tant sigürs, cun les rincorses interotes de Barry y Beto dal dut nia convincentes, y Roefs à paré düc y trëi.
hypo_7:
Les parades de Robin Roefs sui rigores assegura al Sunderland l post te la cuarta runda dla FA Cup

Ciapa la rubrica de football de Adam Clery. Na newsletter che analisea les assurdités y les stranies dl bel jüch

La newsletter ACFC: n analisa dles assurdités dl football

Scuvri les stranies dl football cun la newsletter ACFC

Robin Roefs é stat l eroe dl Sunderland, do che les speranzes dl Everton te la FA Cup é n'atra ota gnüdes a na fin prematura, canche trëi rigores te na seria desastrousa à porté i Black Cats te la cuarta runda.

La rosa descurida de David Moyes paraia destinada a jí fora ia ti 90 menüć, enchin che l rigour dl 89. menüt de James Garner à anulé l splëndid gol de Enzo Le Fee dla pröma mesadà.

Mo la proroa êra l ultima cossa che i parons de ciasa, reducì a demé 12 jügadus seniors, avëssa bujü, y canche é rivada la seria di rigores, Garner, Thierno Barry y Beto à odü süs tîc paré da Roefs.

Le Fee, Granit Xhaka y Luke O'Nien à segnà cun sigürezza süs pröms trëi tentatifs por porté l Sunderland te la cuarta runda demé por la secunda ota te 11 stagions.

Al é stat n colp dur por l Everton, che é stat retrat ite te la partida da Adam Aznou, n acquist da 7,8 miliuns de sterlines da Valladolid d insté, che n â ciamó nia ciapä n minut cun la pröma squadra.

L unica esperiënza dl adolescent tl football senior êra döes apariziuns te l EFL Trophy te setëmber y otober, y sia introduziun al 86. menüt al post de Merlin Rohl êra demé porvia che Moyes n â bele nia alternatives.

Mo l marocan nasciü te Spagna à mustré plü de determinaziun ti cater menüć de tëmp regolamentar che tanti de sü cumpagns de squadra stancs te i 86 precedënc - soradöt l atr 19enne Tyler Dibling, rivé d insté y costé cinch iadi tant.

Te n spazie de trei menüć al à conquisté n rigour, amess che ün debl, do n contrast spala cun spala cun Trai Hume, che à permetü a Garner da parejé.

Les repliches dl fallo sui maxischerms a fin partida à fat monté la rabia de Xhaka, che à sburté sia butëia d agua por tera y s à sfoghé sun l ingiustizia percepida cun vigni un che podêi l odëi, mo l capitano di Black Cats à prest podü festajé.

Al é rar che l Sunderland, promové dalla Championship la stagiun passada, sidesse favorit te valch partida, mo l fat che Regis Le Bris podêssa fé cinch mudaziuns y avëi ciamó te reserva jügadus coche Dan Ballard, Brian Brobbey, Omar Alderete y Wilson Isidor à fat pëndëi les probabilités a sü favor.

I malans, la Coppa d Africa y les suspensiuns por Michael Keane y Jack Grealish é gnüs agravés dal problem muscular de Tim Iroegbunam, che à porté les assënzes a nö.

Barry, l unich jügadur senior lassé fora, rapresentâ 23 dles 27 apariziuns dla pröma squadra anter i sostitüc, cun cinch di ses jügadus dl academìa che n â mai jüé dant.

Do che Harrison Armstrong à sburté fora largia sia soula vera ocajiun dla pröma mesadà, l Sunderland à tut l control y avess mess jí al paus cun n vantaje comod.

So pröm tir à porté al gol dl vantaje - y che gol.

L Everton n à nia savü gestí n lanç lungh y Eliezer Mayenda à preparé la bala por Le Fee, che cun na volada amortida col pê dërt à mandé la bala a curvé do Jordan Pickford.

Moyes â na faza scüra coche n temporal y so atejamënt n é nia ameglioré canche Pickford à para cun gran fadia na rovesciada de Nordi Mukiele y, alungé al massim, à devié n tir da lunh de Romaine Mundle.

Por surprëisa, l coach dl Everton n à nia fat al scomenc dl secundo tëmp l unica mudaziun a desposiziun, cioé sacrifiché un di sü cinch centrocampisc por Barry, mo la squadra n é gnüda a vita enchin canche Mayenda à mandé n tir angolé demé de fora cun manco de mesa ora da jüé.

L apel de Beto por n rigour por n tiron de maia da Hume é stat ignoré, mo l arbitro John Brooks à indiché l punt blanc canche Aznou é cialé por tera y Garner à parejé.

Desfortüna por l Everton, i rigores che à seguité n é nia stac tant sigürs, cun les rincorses interotes de Barry y Beto dal dut nia convincentes, y Roefs à paré düc y trëi.

source_doc:
I wish alcohol wasn't such a normal gift in society 😅 My employer sent me a bottle of eggnog but the only alcohol we like is in alcohol markers

I guess "not liking it" is kinda poor wording, I just think it's weird how casual we are with this stuff and we somehow just assume that all adults love this shit when there's people who shouldn't be touching it ever, and frankly I think the world would be better off if I poured it into the toilet than even gifting it to someone

@doombloomart
I have had US Big Corp required sensitivity training that reminds people not everyone wants alcohol and it's inappropriate to ask why. Seems like that should be more common

@elithebearded Yeah, that's mostly what I wish for too. I get that with sending random shit to a whole corporation will never be inoffensive to everyone, but 1. don't send random shit to a whole corporation maybe and 2. alcohol just rubs me wrong in the way that many who shouldn't touch it may touch it when it randomly shows up at the doorstep. 😅

source_doc:
Ate a little more chicken and had a wash. Also had a little more fight when I made her take her fluids last.
We phoned the vet at 830 this morning to ask if they looked under her soft pallet while she was sedated, as she has major ear polyps. Was told the vet would call back. They didn't, rang just now (1645 local) and was told the vet wasn't in today. I was a bit annoyed and said "we paid you over £600 yesterday, you said phone if we have questions, we have questions you're not answering!"
"I don't like your tone, sir "
"It's not your fault personally, but when I pay the better part of a grand I expect a level of service that you're not providing"
"I'll get a vet from the other branch to ring you"

Seeing vet at other practise at half seven for more anti nausea medicine. They're not going to charge out of hours rate as we rang first thing.
Just got another 10ml of rescue fluids into her.

Back. Anti nausea jab, gabapentin, and she's home. Ate some chicken and some cheese.
Got more gabapentin in pill form for her, too

Won't stop eating. Having to slow her down to prevent her from vomiting. She's also absolutely, completely, totally, off her tits. Mullered. Stoned. Caned. Fully in the yellow submarine.
Vet says this'll reset her appetite, or, when we stop giving her painkillers, show it's pain stopping her eating, which would mean medical imaging time.

She's eating a bit, and even played a little, but she's still on the medications so it might be that. Still giving her recovery fluids, which she's still not fighting as she would normally.

Valencia has decided we are all Suspicious. Won't come when called, runs if you go to her. Still comes on her own terms, so it's fine, she's just seen her adoptive sister repeatedly wrapped in a towel and made to drink Stuff, and she wants none of that, thank you very much.

Ming update: she's a little more active, but still floppy and sleeping a lot. She's on two lots of painkillers still, so she's probably fairly stoned.
She IS eating, little and often, and finished off the last of her rescue fluids from a saucer by herself. She's washing, but she hasn't slapped valencia in ages, and she's still not right. Hoping it's the painkillers, and that when we withdraw them, her appetite remains.

Ming has finished the course of painkillers and is showing determined desire to go out, which we're not allowing yet. She's eating, playing, but it'll be a few days until the drugs are cleared from her system and we'll then see how she is.
Cautiously optimistic.

hypo_0:
Á mangià n pô de pulaster de plü y s’à dé na lavada. A se é ince un pô plü rebateda canche i ai fat tó si sü i si liquids ala fin.
I un telefonà al veterinar a les 8:30 ensté da matina por domané sce ai à vardà sot ala si palata mola canche era sedada, ajache ara à de gran polips te les orëies. A me à dit che l veterinar arà ciamà de ret. Nol l’à fat, i un ciamà adëss (16:45 ora locala) y m’à dit che l veterinar enchëi n’era nia chiló. I eri n pô sciadí y ai dit “i un paià plü de £600 enier, iëis ai dit de ciamé sce i ai domandes, i ai domandes y nëis me respundëis nia!”
“N mi piaje nia ton ton, siur”
“N’é nia colpa tua personalminter, mo canche i paie quasi mile sterlines m’aspeti un livel de sorvisc che nëis n’estëis nia da fornì”
“Tó n veterinar dl’atra filiala a te ciamerà”

Vajon a vede l veterinar dl’atra pratica a les set y mesa por plü medejina contra la nauseia. No i n’an nia da fé paé la tarifa fora dl’orario ajache i un ciamà subit da matina.
Ai bele metü ince n’ater 10 ml de liquids de recuperaziun te ela.

Tornà. Puntura contra la nauseia, gabapentin, y ara é a ciasa. Á mangià n pô de pulaster y n pô de formai.
I ai ciapà ince plü gabapentin en pasticies por ela

Nia la smëte de mangié. I cognon ralentéla por evitè che ara vomite. Ara é ince dal dut, dal dut, dal dut, fora de sé. Stravolta. Fata. Cotta. Dal dut te l submarin zal.
L veterinar dij che chest arà da rimeté a post sie apetì, o che, canche i smeton de ge dé i antidolörifics, arà da mustré che l’é l dolur che la ferma da mangié, y aló serà temp de fá esams de imaging medical.

Ara mangia n pô, y á ince giugà n pô, mo ara é amò sö i medichëi, donca podessa ester per chel. I ge sten amò da dé i liquids de recuperaziun, che ara amò no combat nia desche ara fiss normalminter.

Valencia à dezidì che i son duc Suspicioi. N vëgn nia canche la ciamon, scapa sce te vai da ela. Ara vëgn amò canche ara vel ela, donca va ben, ara à mâ vedü süa sorëdla adotiva plü oujes avolta te n asciugaman y sforzada da bëi Roba, y de chël no ne vel propi nia savëi, tant gra.

Agiornament su Ming: ara é n pô plü ativa, mo amò flaca y dorm cialt. Ara é amò sö doi sorts de antidolörifics, donca probabelminter ara é cialt fata.
Ara mangia DAODABON, pôch y spesso, y à finì da sola l’ultim de süa liquids de recuperaziun da n piatí. Ara se lava, mo n’à nia ciapà a sberles Valencia da n pez, y ara n’é amò nia a post. Speron che sie i antidolörifics, y che canche i ge i tolon, sie apetì resta.

Ming à finì l cörs di antidolörifics y mostra n desliji decidü da jì fora, che no ge la lascion amò fé. Ara mangia, gioga, mo jarà n pâr de dis enchinamó denant che i medichëi sie fora de sie sistem y spo i vëdaron coche ara vá.
Otimisc cun prudënza.

Ara mangia DE FAT, pôch y soënt, y à finì da sola l’ultim di si liquids de recuperaziun da n piatí. Ara se lava, mo n’à nia ciapà a sberles Valencia da n toc, y ara n’é amò nia a post. Speron che sie i antidolörifics, y che canche i ge i tolon, sie apetì resta.

Ming à finì l cörs di antidolörifics y mostra na ferma voia de jì fora, che no ge la lascion amò fé. Ara mangia, gioga, mo jarà n pâr de dis enchinamó denant che i medichëi sie fora de sie sistem, y spo i vëdaron coche ara va.
Otimisc cun prudënza.
hypo_7:
Á mangià n pô de plü de pulaster y s’à ince netiada. Y canche ge ai fat tó i liquidi la ultima ota, á ince opò plü resistü.
Enchëi dama a les 8:30 i un ciamà l veterinar por domané sce ai à cialé sot la palata mola canche ara era sedada, ajache ara à de gragn polips te les orëies. M’àn dit che l veterinèr m’arà ciamà de ret. No l’à fat. Ai ciamà adëss (16:45 ora locala) y m’àn dit che l veterinèr enchëi n’era nia te post. Eri n pô secià y ai dit: “Enier iëis un paià plü de £600, iëis ai dit de ciamé sce i ovon domandes, i ovon domandes y no stëis respognon!”
“N me piaje nia ton ton, siur”
“Personalminter n’é nia colpa tua, mo canche i paie scialdi zënza da n mile m’aspeti n nivel de sorvisc che vo al momënt no stëis nia da dé”
“Tó n veterinèr dl’atra filiala che te ciamerà”

I jaron dal veterinèr dl’atra pratica a les set y mesa por altra medejina contra la nauseia. No m’anarà nia da paé la tarifa fora dl’orar, ajache i un ciamà sobito da bun’ora.
Ai bele metü ince n’ater 10 ml de liquidi de recuperaziun te ela.

Tornà. Puntura contra la nauseia, gabapentin, y adëss ara é a ciasa. Á mangià n pô de pulaster y n pô de formai.
Ai ciapà ince plü gabapentin en forma de pasticies por ela.

Nia la smëte de mangié. I cognon frenéla por evitè che ara vomite. Ara é ince dal dut, completamënter, totalmënter, fora de sé. Stravolta. Fata. Cota. Dal dut tel submarin zël.
L veterinèr dij che chest ge rimetarà a post l’apetì, o che, canche i smeton de ge dé i antidolörifics, al mostrerà sce l’é l dolur che la ferma da mangié, y aló sarà l’ora de fé imagines mediches.

Ara mangia n pô, y á ince giugà n pô, mo ara é amò sö i medichëi, donca podessa ester por chel. I ge sten amò da dé i liquidi de recuperaziun, che ara amò no combat nia desche ara fiss normalminter.

Ming à finì l cörs di antidolörifics y mostra na ferma voia de jì fora, che no ge la lascion amò fé. Ara mangia, gioga, mo jarà n pâr de dis enchinamó denant che i medichëi sie fora de sie sistem, y spo i vëdaron coche ara va.
Otimisc cun prudënza.
