source_doc:
Celtic hammer Dundee United on O'Neill's return

Normal service resumed at Celtic Park as champions Celtic secured a dominant 4-0 win over Dundee United and their first clean sheet since Martin O'Neill's previous game in charge.

Two first-half goals in five minutes from Yang Hyun-jun and Arne Engels sent Celtic on their way as O'Neill returned to the dugout in style following Wilfried Nancy's brief but disastrous reign.

Substitute Benjamin Nygren grabbed his 11th goal of the season and Daizen Maeda netted on the rebound to equal Celtic's two biggest wins of the league season so far. Both of them were in O'Neill's caretaker spell in charge, which resulted in seven wins from eight games.

Celtic sent for the 73-year-old on Monday after terminating Nancy's contract in the wake of six defeats - and 18 goals against - in eight matches.

The chaos, confusion and defensive fragility that marked Nancy's reign disappeared as the Hoops moved three points off the top of the table.

Nobody in the stadium would have been surprised to see O'Neill restore Celtic's long-standing 4-3-3 formation and the team picked up where they left off under O'Neill, as if they had awoken from a nightmare and got on with life as normal.

Centre-back Liam Scales was back to the consistent form he displayed before suffering in and out of a back three under the Frenchman.

Callum McGregor dictated play again and Celtic's wide players, Yang and Sebastian Tounekti, were given attacking licence after being handed wing-back roles by the former Columbus Crew head coach.

Celtic enjoyed 78 per cent possession, had 22 shots at goal and let United have just three. Their opponents averaged 12 shots during Nancy's tenure and United managed 17 themselves during their 2-1 win over the Hoops at Tannadice less than four weeks ago.

Celtic penned United in from the start, with Kieran Tierney instrumental in creating a series of first-half chances.

The left-back had a shot deflected wide, Yang and Scales threatened from headers and Maeda flicked a low cross of the bar, before the pressure paid off in the 27th minute.

Such was Celtic's dominance that Scales found himself in possession on the edge of the box and rolled a pass to Yang, who drilled home from 20 yards.

Maeda soon mis-kicked a volley before Engels produced a first-time finish from Tierney's pass.

It was not all plain sailing for Celtic in the first half. Mexican right-back Julian Araujo marked his first start with a yellow card for a dangerous challenge on Will Ferry, who was still hobbling when he took the resulting free-kick.

United also had chances and Dario Naamo looked unsure whether to head or volley Craig Sibbald's deep cross and did neither and Owen Stirton twice came close.

The striker was firstly foiled by a goal-saving block from Scales after being gifted possession by Auston Trusty and later shot just wide from 18 yards after the Celtic central defence backed off.

United brought on winger Amar Fatah for holding midfielder Pan Camara at half-time but Celtic were even more dominant in the second half.

Reo Hatate and Maeda missed good chances before Nygren shot high into the net from six yards in the 63rd minute.

Maeda had an easy finish six minutes later after Tounekti's shot was saved.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Celtic à stravincì cuntra Dundee United te retorn de O'Neill

La normalità é tornada a Celtic Park, ajache i campiuns de Celtic à assegurà na vittoria dominanta por 4-0 cuntra Dundee United y la pröma partida sensa ciapè gols davëi l’ultima partida de Martin O'Neill da responsabel.

Du gols te pröma mësa te cinch minüć da Yang Hyun-jun y Arne Engels à metù Celtic sö la strada dreta, cina che O'Neill é tornà te la panchina cun stl di gran stile do l curt ma desastrus regn de Wilfried Nancy.

La resserva Benjamin Nygren à segnà so 11. gol dla stagiun y Daizen Maeda à marcà sü le rebound por eguaglié les döes plü grans vittories de Celtic te chësta stagiun de liga enscin a ades. Döt döt doi é gnüs sü te la perioda de O'Neill desche interimal da responsabel, che à porté set vittories fora de ot partides.

Celtic à chiamà le 73-enne lunesc, do avëi sciolì le contrat de Nancy do ses sconfitës - y 18 gols ciapês - te ot partides.

Le caos, la confujiun y la fragilité difensiva che à marcà le regn de Nancy é descomparüs, cina che i Hoops se à metü a trëi ponts dala cima dla classifica.

Degün te stadion ne sarëssa stat surprais de odëi O'Neill ristablì la lunga tradiziun de Celtic cun la formaziun 4-3-3 y la squadra à taché nce na ota da olache ai s'à lascà sot O'Neill, scu sce ai se foss despertà da n incö de not y foss jit inant cun la vita desche normal.

Le zentrël Liam Scales é stat do torna te la forma costanta che al hadia mostrà dan che al patiss te y fora de na difëisa a trëi sot le francesc.

Callum McGregor à dictà danü l juech y ai jes gnü dada libertad d’atac ai jugadus larghs de Celtic, Yang y Sebastian Tounekti, do che l’anteriur coach principal di Columbus Crew i hadia metüs te rües de esterni bassi.

Celtic à godü de 78 por zënt de posesciun, à fat 22 tîrs en porta y à lascà a United ma trëi. Si aversars à fat na media de 12 tîrs dürant le temp de Nancy y United instësc à fat 17 te sia vittoria por 2-1 cuntra i Hoops a Tannadice manco de cater setmanes indô.

Celtic à seré United ite dal scomenciament, cun Kieran Tierney determinant te la creaziun de na seria de ocasciuns te pröma mësa.

Le terzën de manz à odü n tîr devià fora, Yang y Scales à periculà cun colps de testa y Maeda à tocà cun n colp lëch na cros bassa sora dla traversa, dan che la presciun portass früt te l 27. minüt.

Tan granda ea la dominanza de Celtic che Scales se à chattà cun la bala al limit dl areal y à passé a Yang, che à tirà a ciasa da 20 metres.

Maeda à dalaur miscià n volley, dan che Engels à fat n conclujiun al pröm toc da n pass de Tierney.

Te pröma mësa ne jera nia dut na navigaziun tranquilla por Celtic. Le terzën dret mexikan Julian Araujo à marcà sia pröma partida da titular cun na carta cera por n intervent pericolus sun Will Ferry, che zupignava ciamó canche al à tirà le colp franc che ne derivâ.

United à odü ence ocasiuns y Dario Naamo ne parëia nia segur sce fè de testa o de volley sun na cros profunda de Craig Sibbald y no à fat ni l’ün ni l’ater, y Owen Stirton é gnü döt dui i iadi bën visin.

L’atacant é stat pröm fermà da n blocch salvagol de Scales do che Auston Trusty i hadia regalà la posesciun y plü inant al à tirà ma da pech fora da 18 metres do che la difëisa zentral de Celtic s’ea retrada.

United à metü sö l’ala Amar Fatah por le median de contenimënt Pan Camara te la pausa, ma Celtic é stat ciamó plü dominant te la secunda mësa.

Reo Hatate y Maeda à sbalià buni chances dan che Nygren à tirà alt te la rëi da ses metres te l 63. minüt.

Maeda à odü na conclujiun facila sis minüć plü inant do che le tîr de Tounekti ea stat parà.
hypo_1:
Celtic stracà Dundee United te le retorn de O'Neill

La normalità é tornada a Celtic Park, olache i campiuns de Celtic à arjunt na neta vittoria dominanta por 4-0 cuntra Dundee United y la pröma partida sensa ciapè gol davoi la precedënta partida de Martin O'Neill da alenadú.

Dui gol te la pröma mësa te cinch minüć, firmé da Yang Hyun-jun y Arne Engels, à metü Celtic sö la buna strada, canche O'Neill é tornà te la panchina cun gran stil do le curt ma disastros mandat de Wilfried Nancy.

Le subentré Benjamin Nygren à fat so 11. gol dla stagiun y Daizen Maeda à marcà sü le rebound por eguaglié les döes plü larges vittories de Celtic te chësta stagiun de liga enscin ades. Döt döi ê gnüs sot la reggenza interimal de O'Neill, che à porté set vittories fora de ot partides.

Celtic à chiamà lunesc le 73-enne do avëi resolü le contrat de Nancy do ses sconfitës - y 18 gol ciapês - te ot partides.

Le caos, la confujiun y la fragilité difensiva che à marcà le mandat de Nancy é descomparüs, canche i Hoops se à porté a trëi ponts dala cima dla classifica.

Degügn te le stadion ne fossa stat surprais de odëi O'Neill ristablì la tradiziunela formaziun 4-3-3 de Celtic, y la squadra à ripartì da olache ara s'era fermada sot O'Neill, scu sce ara se foss despertada da n incö de not y foss jita inant cun la vita desche de normal.

Le zentrël Liam Scales é tornà te la forma costanta che al hadia mostrà denant che al soffriss te y fora de na linia difensiva a trëi sot le francesc.

Callum McGregor à danü dicté le juech y ai jugadus de banda de Celtic, Yang y Sebastian Tounekti, ai é gnü dada liberté d’atac do che l’anteriur coach principal di Columbus Crew i hadia assegné rües de esterni bassi.

Celtic à tenü le 78 por zënt dla posesciun, à fat 22 tîrs en porta y à lascè a United ma trëi. Si aversars à fat na media de 12 tîrs dürant le mandat de Nancy, y United instësc n’à fat 17 te sia vittoria por 2-1 cuntra i Hoops a Tannadice manco de cater setmanes indô.

Celtic à sarà ite United dal scomenciament, cun Kieran Tierney decisif te la creaziun de na seria de ocasiuns te la pröma mësa.

Le terzën de manz à odü n tîr devié fora, Yang y Scales à periculé cun colps de testa y Maeda à sfioré na cros bassa sora dla traversa, dan che la presciun à porté so früt te l 27. minüt.

Tan granda ê la dominanza de Celtic che Scales se à chattà cun la bala al limit dl areal y à slarié n pass por Yang, che à tiré te rëi da 20 metres.

Maeda à daliö miscié n volley, dan che Engels à firmé n conclujiun al pröm toc sü pass de Tierney.

Ne jera nia döt plan y sainza problem por Celtic te la pröma mësa. Le terzën dret messican Julian Araujo à marcà sia pröma partida da titular cun na carta cera por n intervent pericolus sun Will Ferry, che zupignava ciamó canche al à tiré le colp franc che n'é gnü fora.

United à odü ence de les ocasiuns y Dario Naamo ne parea nia sigür sce fé de testa o de volley sun la cros lunga de Craig Sibbald, y al ne n'à fat ni l’ün ni l’ater, cina che Owen Stirton é gnü dui iadi bën visin al gol.

L’atacant é stat pröm fermé da n bloc salvegol de Scales do che Auston Trusty i hadia regalé la posesciun, y plü inant al à tiré ma da pech fora da 18 metres do che la difëisa zentrala de Celtic s'era retrada.

United à fat jí ite l’ala Amar Fatah por le median de contenimënt Pan Camara te la pausa, ma Celtic é stat ciamó plü dominant te la secunda mësa.

Reo Hatate y Maeda à sbalié de bunes ocasiuns dan che Nygren à tiré alt te la rëi da ses metres te l 63. minüt.

Maeda à odü na conclujiun facila ses minüć plü inant do che le tîr de Tounekti ê stat paré.

Callum McGregor à danü dirigé le juech y ai jugadus de banda de Celtic, Yang y Sebastian Tounekti, ai é gnü dada liberté d’atac do che l’anteriur coach principal di Columbus Crew i hadia assegné rües de esterni bassi.

Celtic à tenü le 78 por zënt dla posesciun, à fat 22 tîrs en porta y à lascé a United ma trëi. Si aversars à fat na media de 12 tîrs dürant le mandat de Nancy, y United instëss n’à fat 17 te sia vittoria por 2-1 sun i Hoops a Tannadice manco de cater setmanes indô.

Celtic à stlü United ite dal scomenciament, cun Kieran Tierney decisif te la creaziun de na seria de ocasiuns te la pröma mësa.

Le terzën de manz à odü n tîr devié fora, Yang y Scales à periculé cun colps de testa y Maeda à sfioré cun n toc na cros bassa sora dla traversa, dan che la presciun à porté si früc te l 27. menüt.

Tan granda ê la dominanza de Celtic che Scales se à chatté cun la bala al limit dl’area y à slarié n pass por Yang, che à tiré te rëi da 20 metres.

Maeda à sbalié pôc do n volley, dan che Engels à firmé na conclujiun al pröm toc sü pass de Tierney.

Ne jera nia döt plan y sainza problem por Celtic te la pröma mësa. Le terzën dret messican Julian Araujo à marcâ sia pröma partida da titular cun na carta cëra por n’intervent pericolus sun Will Ferry, che zupignava ciamó canche al à tiré le colp franc che n'é gnü fora.

United à odü ence de les ocasiuns y Dario Naamo parea nia sigür sce fé de testa o de volley sun la cros lunga de Craig Sibbald, y al ne n'à fat ni l’ün ni l’ater, cina che Owen Stirton é gnü dui iadi bën visin al gol.

L’atacant é stat pröm fermé da n bloc salvegol de Scales do che Auston Trusty i hadia regalé la posesciun, y plü inant al à tiré ma de pôc fora da 18 metres do che la difëisa zentrala de Celtic s'era retrada.

United à fat jí ite l’ala Amar Fatah por le median de contenimënt Pan Camara te la pausa, ma Celtic é stat ciamó plü dominant te la secunda mësa.

Reo Hatate y Maeda à sbalié de bunes ocasiuns dan che Nygren à tiré alt te la rëi da ses metres te l 63. menüt.

Maeda à odü na conclujiun facila ses menüć plü inant do che le tîr de Tounekti ê stat paré.

source_doc:
@Maker_of_Things
Is there any bruising or swelling? If it’s swelling then let the practice know and keep an eye on it.
Assuming she took it from the veins around the elbow, theres a chance she went too deep and hit the back wall of the vein, and an underlying tendon then bruised it on the way out. All depends on technique and equipment. I could never get the hang of a fixed needle draw but was a deft hand at a butterfly draw, you could be much kinder.
Hope it’s eased now.

@tempusfelix
Yeah, from my elbow. It is still sore, but getting better. No bruising or bleeding though.

@Maker_of_Things
Good. She may well have been too deep so remember if they’re not urgent, you can often ask for a specific practitioner if your surgery allows it. For example I like the sister at mine, she’s so smooth.

Supponon che ela l’abie tout dal venes dant dal cüde, pó ester che ela sie jü massa adën y che ala abie tocé la paré de do dla vena, y che n tendon sota al l’abie fat deventé livid endant che la nèdl l’era fora. Dut depën dala tecnica y dal atrez. Ie n’é mai sté bun da tó sangh cun na nèdl fixa, ma cun na farfala ie n’era brav, te pol ester cotan pü delicat.
Speri che ara sie jü mëi adess.

@tempusfelix

source_doc:
The hosts took the lead in the 26th minute via the prolific Diaz as the Real Madrid player showed his scoring instinct.

Achraf Hakimi's corner was headed goalwards by Ayoub El Kaabi and Diaz deflected the ball in from close range.

He has now scored in each of Morocco's five games and extends his own record for most goals by a Moroccan at a single Cup of Nations finals, but left the field late on with a heavily strapped thigh that will be a concern for coach Walid Regragui.

Chances were hard to come by for both sides, but Abde Ezzalzouli headed narrowly over the crossbar from another Hakimi corner, while the latter laid on a headed chance for Saibari that was spurned.

Cameroon were unfortunate not to get a penalty kick when Mbeumo was caught in the box as Mauritanian referee Dahane Beida waved play on, while Georges-Kevin Nkoudou headed wide at the back post with the Indomitable Lions' best chance of the game.

Morocco made it 2-0 minutes later to kill off the contest when Saibari was left unmarked at the back post and had time to control the ball and fire low into the far corner of the net.

Ismael Saibari gave Morocco breathing space against Cameroon (REUTERS)

In Friday's other quarter-final, Iliman Ndiaye scored the only goal as Senegal booked an Afcon semi-final berth for the third time in the last four tournaments, beating 10-man Mali 1-0.

Ndiaye netted after 27 minutes, taking advantage of a goalkeeping howler to put Senegal ahead in a tense derby against their west African neighbours.

Mali were reduced to 10 men for the second half after captain Yves Bissouma was sent off for a second caution on the stroke of halftime.

He was booked first for a clumsy challenge in the 25th minute and was dismissed after a needless foul on Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Mali were down to 10 men from the 26th minute of their previous clash against Tunisia and still managed to squeeze through on penalties but there was no recovery this time around against a polished Senegalese outfit.

Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
I padrogns é passá inant al 26. menüt cun l prolifich Diaz, canche l giiadur dl Real Madrid á mostré si instinct da marcadur.

Un córner de Achraf Hakimi é gnü ciapà cun la testa vers la porta da Ayoub El Kaabi y Diaz á devië la bala ite da dlijia.

Al á ëncö arjunt un gol te vigni üna dles cin’ partides dl Maroc y al slongia sie record personal por leplü gols marcá da un marocan te na singola fasa finala dla Cupa dles Nazions, ma al é gnü fora dal ciamp tard tla partida cun na coscia fermamënter fascia, che será na preocupaziun por l coach Walid Regragui.

Les ocajions é stades rares por dües les scores, ma Abde Ezzalzouli á ciapà cun la testa pôch sora la traversa da n ater córner de Hakimi, inant che chest ultëm á preparé n’atra ocajiun de testa por Saibari, che ne n’à nia trat pro.

Le Camerun é stat desfortuné da ne nia ciafé n rigur canche Mbeumo é stat ciapé te l’area, canche l arbitro mauritan Dahane Beida á lassé jí l jüch, inant che Georges-Kevin Nkoudou á ciapà cun la testa fora al secondo palo cun la plü buna ocajiun dla partida por i Lions Indomitables.

Le Maroc á fat 2-0 püc menüc plü tard por copé fora la partida, canche Saibari é stat lascé zënza marcadura al secondo palo y á abü temp da controlé la bala y tiré bas te l angul lontan dla reit.

Ismael Saibari á dat al Maroc plü respiroch cuntra le Camerun (REUTERS)

Te l ater quart de final de venderdi, Iliman Ndiaye á marcá l unic gol canche le Senegal s’à arjunt n post te la semifinal dl Afcon por la terza ota ti ultims cater tornei, vencion Mali a 10 oms cun 1-0.

Ndiaye á marcá do 27 menüc, sfrutant n erur dl portier por porté le Senegal inant te n derby tenso cuntra si vijins dl vest dl’Africa.

Le Mali é stat ridöt a 10 oms por la secunda mesadëna do che l capitano Yves Bissouma é stat mandé fora por n secundo cartelin zëlt al moment dl intervel.

Al é stat ammonì pröm por n contrast maldestro al 25. menüt y al é stat espuls do n fal inutile sun Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Le Mali é stat a 10 oms dal 26. menüt de sie precedent scontr cuntra la Tunisia y á endesfà pudü passè inant ai rigurs, ma chesta ota n ie nia stada na remontada cuntra na squadra senegalesa ben organisada.
hypo_1:
I padrogns é jit inant al 26. menüt cun l prolifich Diaz, canche le giiadur dl Real Madrid á mostré sie instinct por le gol.

Le córner de Achraf Hakimi é gnü indirizé cun la testa vers la porta da Ayoub El Kaabi y Diaz á devië la bala te reit da dajentëna.

Al á ëncö marcá te düc y cinch i partides dl Maroc y al slongia cussì sie record de plü gols marcá da n marocan te na singola fasa finala dla Cupa dles Nazions, ma al á lascé le ciamp tla fin cun na coscia ben fascia, che sarà na preocupaziun por l coach Walid Regragui.

Les ocajions é stades scialdi rares por amedui i staziuns, ma Abde Ezzalzouli á ciapà cun la testa pôch sora la traversa da n ater córner de Hakimi, inant che chest ultëm á ince preparé n’otra ocajiun de testa por Saibari, che é gnücia mancèda.

Le Camerun é stat desfortuné da ne nia ciafé n rigur canche Mbeumo é stat fermé te l’area y l arbitro mauritan Dahane Beida á lascé jì l jüch, inant che Georges-Kevin Nkoudou á ciapà cun la testa fora al palo da do, tla miú ocajiun dla partida por i Lions Indomitables.

Le Maroc á fat le 2-0 püc menüc plü tard por seré la partida, canche Saibari é stat lascé zënza marcadura al palo da do y á abü l temp da controlé la bala y tiré bas te l angul plü lontan dla reit.

Ismael Saibari á dat al Maroc n pô de respiroch cuntra le Camerun (REUTERS)

Te l ater quart de final de venderdi, Iliman Ndiaye á marcá l unic gol y le Senegal s’à arjunt n post te la semifinal dl Afcon por la terza ota ti ultims cater tornei, baten Mali, resté cun 10 oms, cun 1-0.

Ndiaye á marcá do 27 menüc, sfrutant n grav erur dl portier por porté le Senegal inant te n derby tenso cuntra si vijins dl vest dl’Africa.

Le Mali é stat ridöt a 10 oms por döra la secunda mesadëna do che l capitano Yves Bissouma é stat mandé fora por na secunda ammoniziun sun la lingia dl intervel.

Al é stat ammonì pröm por n contrast maldestro al 25. menüt y al é stat espuls do n fal zënza debojëgn sun Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Le Mali é stat cun 10 oms jà dal 26. menüt de sie scontr prezedënt cuntra la Tunisia y á endesfà podü passè inant ai rigurs, ma chesta ota n’ie nia stada deguna reaziun cuntra na squadra senegalesa solida y ben organisada.
hypo_2:
I padrogns à tut l vantaje al 26. menüt grazia al prolifich Diaz, canche l giiadur dl Real Madrid à mustré sie instinct por marcé.

Le córner de Achraf Hakimi é gnü ciapé cun la testa da Ayoub El Kaabi vers la porta y Diaz à devié la bala te reit da dlungia curta.

Al à nce fat gol te vigni una dles cinch partides dl Maroc y al slungia cussì sie record personal por le plü gran numer de gols marcà da un marocan te na singola fasa finala dla Cupa dles Nazions, ma al à lascé le ciamp tla fin cun na coscia fortamënter fascia, n fat che dará da pensé al coach Walid Regragui.

Les ocajions é stades rares por düc dui i staziuns, ma Abde Ezzalzouli à ciapé cun la testa de pôch sora la traversa da n ater córner de Hakimi, devers che chest ultëm à ince preparé na ocajiun de testa por Saibari, che é gnüda mal sfrutada.

Le Camerun é stat desfortuné da ne nia ciafé n rigur canche Mbeumo é stat tocà te l’area y l arbitro mauritan Dahane Beida à lascé jì inant le jüch, inant che Georges-Kevin Nkoudou à ciapé cun la testa fora al palo daló tla miú ocajiun dla partida por i Lions Indomitables.

Püc menüc plü tard, le Maroc à fat le 2-0 por stüfé fora la contëisa, canche Saibari é stat lascé zënza marcadura al palo daló y à abü le temp da controlé la bala y tiré rasoterra te l angul plü lontan dla reit.

Te l ater quart de final de venderdi, Iliman Ndiaye à marcé l unic gol, ajache le Senegal s’à arjunt n post te la semifinal dl Afcon por la terza ota ti ultims cater tornei, baten le Mali cun 10 oms cun 1-0.

Ndiaye à fat reit do 27 menüc, sfrutant n gran fal dl portier por porté le Senegal inant te n derby teso cuntra si vijins dl vest dl’Africa.

Le Mali é stat ridüt a 10 oms por la secunda mesadëna do che l capitano Yves Bissouma é stat mandé fora por na secunda ammoniziun sun la fin dl pröm tëmp.

Al é stat ammonì dantadöt por n contrast maldestro al 25. menüt y al é stat espuls do n fal zënza debojëgn sun Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Le Mali é stat cun 10 oms jà dal 26. menüt dl scontr da dant cuntra la Tunisia y, nce cussì, à podü passé l turn ai rigurs, ma chesta ota n’ie nia stada deguna remontada cuntra na squadra senegalesa sigüra y ben preparèda.

Le Mali é stat ridüt a 10 oms por la secunda mesadëna do che l capitano Yves Bissouma é stat mandé fora por na secunda ammoniziun sun la fin dl pröm tëmp.

Al é stat ammonì dantadöt por n contrast maldestro al 25. menüt y al é stat espuls do n fal zënza debojëgn sun Idrissa Gana Gueye.

Le Mali é stat cun 10 oms jà dal 26. menüt dl scontr da dant cuntra la Tunisia y, nce cussì, à podü passé l turn ai rigurs, ma chesta ota n’ie nia stada deguna remontada cuntra na squadra senegalesa sigüra y ben organizada.

I padrogns à tut vantaj al 26. menüt cun le prolifich Diaz, canche le jiadur dl Real Madrid à mustré sie instinct por le gol.

Al à ades marcà te vigni üna dles cinch partides dl Maroc y al slungia sie record personal por le plü gran numer de gols marcà da n marocan te na singola fase finala dla Cupa dles Nazions, ma al à lascé le ciamp tla fin cun na coscia fermamënter fasciada, n fat che preocuparà l coach Walid Regragui.

source_doc:
High Noon review - Billy Crudup brings classic Hollywood western back with a bang

How do you turn a classic Hollywood western into West End musical fare? Add songs, many of Bruce Springsteen's in this case, along with a few rounds of line dancing and a sizzling star in Billy Crudup. Still, it's an odd experience initially as Thea Sharrock's production switches from one brief filmic scene to the next, and the endeavour seems as wooden as the clapboard saloon-bar slats that comprise the handsome set.

As a piece of theatre, it finds its flow. As a debate play, though, it gathers a locomotive energy as it travels towards the showdown between Frank Miller (James Doherty), who is returning to this "dirty little village in the middle of nowhere," and the marshal Will Kane (Crudup) who put him behind bars. That is mostly because of the uncanny and urgent relevance of this 1952 film about a community working out (or rather, squirming out of) its civic responsibilities around institutional wrongdoing.

Originally an allegory of McCarthyism (its screenwriter, Carl Foreman, was blacklisted), the story sets the cowardice of the many against the courage of the few - in this case, the lone, heroic Kane, who mobilises his defence against Miller and his henchmen after being let down by the townsfolk. The film was blasted by John Wayne as un-American for its critical portrait of the community; the production comes to life in its arguments on collective in/action and seems to speak directly about the dilemmas facing the cowboy country of Trump's America (the shooting in Minneapolis just the latest example). Eric Roth's script uses many lines from Foreman's screenplay but fleshes out the debates on the ethical stance of a community in the face of wrongdoing and misguided American myths around immigration.

Cowardice of the many, courage of the few ... cast of High Noon. Photograph: Johan Persson

There is also the joint talent of Crudup and the ever agile Denise Gough who play the central couple on their wedding day. She is Amy Fowler, a Quaker who abhors the actions of violent men; he is the marshal who has just given up his "tin star" to start over as a shopkeeper. That is, until news reaches town that Miller is arriving on the noon train.

Gary Cooper made the role entirely his own, his integrity comparable only to Gregory Peck's Atticus in To Kill a Mockingbird. So Crudup has his long shadow to evade. He manages to hold up the part on stage as an upstanding, earnest and increasingly desperate man. Gough makes her part grittier and more modern than that of her film counterpart, Grace Kelly. The pair are convincing as a couple although their narrow characterisation hems in the full scale of their abilities.

Several other characters seem too flimsy, from Billy Howle's deputy marshal, Harvey Pell, to Rosa Salazar's Mexican businesswoman, Helen, although the affinity between her and Amy is refreshing, and Roth gives more voice and texture to these women as a whole.

Several of Springsteen's songs bring their own American politics (from the frontier optimism of Land of Hope and Dreams to The Rising, written in response to 9/11). Some are sung a cappella, mostly by Gough, who is a strong singer, her voice emanating desolation, but she reprises I'm on Fire one too many times.

It seems like a reluctant musical at times, the songs short and thin but the percussive music and sound design are always arresting, as is the lighting, designed by Neil Austin, which brings emotional clarity and intrigue. A clock is central to Tim Hatley's set design, counting down to the train's thrilling arrival and the subsequent showdown, which manages to contain tension and drama, despite the difficulty of staging a cross-town shootout.

For all its early stiffness, it builds in momentum and there are moving moments. Ultimately, the political message speaks loudest, harnessing the McCarthyist fear of then and the Trumpian terror of today.

hypo_0:
Reseña de High Noon - Billy Crudup porta de n’öna gran maniera l western classic de Hollywood a jí ite cun forza

Co se fej pa da mudé n western classic de Hollywood te n musical dl West End? Ajuntan cianties, te chest cajo n gran numer de Bruce Springsteen, insema a vaira tor de line dancing y n’stëila che straluje te Billy Crudup. Nce fossa, al é al scomenci n’esperiënza stranëia can la produziun de Thea Sharrock passa da na scëna filmica curta a n’atra, y l tentatif al para de legn tant co les assic de saloon-bar che cumpónn la bela scenografia.

Desche toc de teater, la trova so fluss. Desche drama de debat, nce fossa, la ciapa n’energia da locomotiva mente che la viagia viers l confront final anter Frank Miller (James Doherty), che é de retorn te chest "piciul paîsc suzi te mes de nia", y l marshal Will Kane (Crudup), che l’á metü do les sbares. Chësc por le plü é causa dl fat che chest film dl 1952 sun na comunité che se desbriga co so responsabilités ziviches denant a malfaziun istituzionala – o plu tosc se n’desvincia fora – é de na pertinenza straordinara y urgënta.

Originariamenter n’allegoria dl McCarthyism (so scenegiadú, Carl Foreman, fo metü sun na lista niera), la storia met dant la codardia de tanć contra l curaje de puc – te chest cajo, l solitariu y eroich Kane, che mobilisea sia defëisa contra Miller y si complices do che la jënt dl paîsc l’á lascé a man vedes. L film fo atacà da John Wayne desche nia american por so retrat critic dla comunité; la produziun vëgn a vita ti argomënc sun l’aziun y la inaziun coletiva y para da baié diretamënter di dilemmas che ston denant al paîsc di cowboy dla America de Trump (la sparatoria a Minneapolis n’é che l’ultim ejëmpl). L test de Eric Roth dovra n gran numer de battütes dl scenegé de Foreman, ma al svilupa de plü i debac sunsora la postura etica de na comunité denant al tort y i mituns americans falé sun l’immigraziun.

Codardia de tanć, curaje de puc ... l cast de High Noon. Fotografia: Johan Persson

Pro nce é l talent conjunt de Crudup y dla semper agila Denise Gough, che jöga la copa centrala te so dé de nozes. Ela é Amy Fowler, na Quachera che detesta les azions di oms violënc; el é l marshal che á bele lascé so "stëila de lata" por scomenzé da neü desche negoziant. Almanco fin can la nuvëia riva te paîsc che Miller stëgn jí a rivé col tren de mesdí.

Gary Cooper á fat dl role dal dut so, cun n’integrité comparabla ma a chëra de Atticus de Gregory Peck te To Kill a Mockingbird. Chësc fej che Crudup á n’ombra lunga da schivé. El riva a tegní sö la pert sun scena desche n om dret, sincer y tresplü desperé. Gough fej sia pert plü aspra y plü moderna che chëra de sia cumpagna de film, Grace Kelly. I dui é convincënc desche copa, inceben che sia caraterisaziun streta taja ite la mesira plena de sües capacitês.

Vairi atri personaji par trop debui, dal deputy marshal Harvey Pell de Billy Howle fina a la neguzianta messicana Helen de Rosa Salazar, inceben che l’afinité anter ela y Amy é rinfrescanta, y Roth dá plü usc y consistënza a chestes femes te sie insieme.

Vaire cianties de Springsteen porta cun sëes lora politica americana (dal optimism dla frontiera de Land of Hope and Dreams fina a The Rising, scrita desche resposta ai atach dl 11 de setëmber). Ciertes vëgn ciantades a cappella, suradut da Gough, che é na ciantadura forta, cun na usc che emana desolaziun, ma la reprënta I'm on Fire na ota de massa.

Al para a trës momënc n musical recalcitrant, cun cianties curtes y sotiles, ma la musica percussiva y l design dl son é tres arrestant, desche ince la iluminaziun, concepida da Neil Austin, che porta clareza emotiva y intrig. N relogio é zentral te la scenografia de Tim Hatley, contan a röa in jö i momenć fina a l’arriveda emozionanta dl tren y al confront che vëgn do, che riva a tegní tensiun y drama, malgrad la dificolté de meter sun scena na sparatoria da na pert a l’atra dl paîsc.

Por dut sia rigideza iniziala, la cresc te slanç y n’é momënc comovëi. A la fin, l mëssaj politich feia l plü gran eco, metan adum la pora maccartista de n’outa cun l terror trumpian de incö.

Originariamenter n’allegoria dl maccartism (so scenegiadú, Carl Foreman, fo metü sun la lista niera), la storia contrapòn la codardia de tanć al curaje de puc: te chest cajo, Kane, n eroe solitari, che organizëia sia defëisa contra Miller y si oms do che la jënt dl paîsc l’á lascé sulet. L film fo condané da John Wayne desche nia american por so retrat critic dla comunité; la produziun ciafa vita propi ti sü argomënc sun l’aziun y la inaziun coletiva y para baié diretamënter di dilemmas che se para denant al paîsc di cowboy dla America de Trump (la sparatoria a Minneapolis n’é che l’ultim ejëmpl). L test de Eric Roth dovra n gran numer de battütes dl scenegé de Foreman, ma svilupëia de plü i debac sun la postura etica de na comunité denant al tort y sun i mituns americans falé sun l’immigraziun.

Codardia de tanć, curaje de puc ... l cast de High Noon. Fotografia: Johan Persson

Nce é ince l talent metü adum de Crudup y dla semper agila Denise Gough, che interpreta la copa centrala te so dé de nozes. Ela é Amy Fowler, na quachera che detesta les azions di oms violënc; el é l marshal che á deschegn lascé sia "stëila de lata" por scomenzé n life nuef desche botighier. Almanco fin can la nuvëia riva te paîsc che Miller stëgn rivé col tren de mesdí.

Gary Cooper á fat dl role valch de dal dut so, cun n’integrité comparabla ma a chëra dl Atticus de Gregory Peck te To Kill a Mockingbird. Cussí Crudup á na lunga ombra da schivé. El riva a tegní sö la pert sun scena desche n om dret, sincer y tresplü desperé. Gough fej sia pert plü dura y plü moderna co chëra de sia corresponsora tl film, Grace Kelly. I dui é convincënc desche copa, inceben che na caraterisaziun massa streta limita la piena mesira de sües capacitês.

Vaire atri personaji para massa fragiles, dal vice-marshal Harvey Pell de Billy Howle fina a la imprenditora messicana Helen de Rosa Salazar, inceben che l’afinité anter ela y Amy é rinfrescanta, y che Roth dá, te l’insieme, plü usc y consistënza a chestes femes.

Valgunes cianties de Springsteen porta cun sëes sia propia politica americana, dal optimism dla frontiera de Land of Hope and Dreams fina a The Rising, scrita desche resposta ai atach dl 11 de setëmber. Ciertes vëgn ciantades a cappella, suradut da Gough, che é na ciantadura de forza, cun na usc che emana desolaziun; ma la reprënta I'm on Fire n pô massa de iadi.

A trëi momënc para n musical nia dal dut convint de esser n musical: les cianties é curtes y sotiles, ma la musica percussiva y l design dl son resta tres fascinant, desche ince la iluminaziun de Neil Austin, che porta clareza emotiva y mistere. N relogio é zentral tla scenografia de Tim Hatley, contan jö i momenć fina a l’arriveda palpitanta dl tren y al confront che vëgn do, che riva a mantigní tensiun y drama, malgrad la dificolté de meter sun scena na sparatoria tras dut l paîsc.

Malgrad sia rigideza iniziala, la produziun ciafa slanç y regala momënc comovëi. A la fin, l mëssaj politich é chël che resonëia plü fort, metan adum la pora maccartista de n’outa cun l terror trumpian de incö.

Vaire atri personaji para massa debli, dal vice-marshal Harvey Pell de Billy Howle fina a la imprenditora messicana Helen de Rosa Salazar, inceben che l’afinité anter ela y Amy é rinfrescanta, y che Roth dá, te l’insieme, plü usc y consistënza a chestes femes.

Vaires cianties de Springsteen porta cun sëes sia propria politica americana, dal optimism dla frontiera de Land of Hope and Dreams fina a The Rising, scrita desche resposta ai atach dl 11 de setëmber. Ciertes vëgn ciantades a cappella, suraldut da Gough, che é na ciantadura de forza y che, cun sia usc, emana desolaziun; ma la reprënta de I’m on Fire n pô massa de iadi.

A trëi momënc para n musical restiu, cun cianties curtes y sotiles; ma la musica percussiva y l design dl son é tres captivanc, desche ince la iluminaziun, firmada da Neil Austin, che porta clareza emotiva y intriga. N relogio é zentral tla scenografia de Tim Hatley, contan jö i momënc fina a l’arrivada palpitanta dl tren y al confront che vëgn do, che mantëgn tensiun y drama, malgrad la dificulté de meter sun scena na sparatoria tras dut l paisc.

Malgrad sia rigideza iniziala, la produziun ciafa impet y regala momënc comovëi. A la fin, l mëssaj politich é chël che resonëia plü fort, metan adöm la pora maccartista de n’outa cun l terror trumpian de incö.
hypothesis:
Recensiun de High Noon – Billy Crudup fej torné l western classic de Hollywood cun gran impet

Co se poda transformé n western classic de Hollywood te n musical da West End? Juntan cianties – te chest cajo, tröpes de Bruce Springsteen – adöm cun valch rota de line dancing y cun na stëila scotanta desche Billy Crudup. Ciononchesto, al scomenc l’esperiënza é valch stranëia, ajache la produziun de Thea Sharrock passa da na curta scëna filmica a chëra do, y dut l projet para tan de len desche les asse dl saloon-bar che cumpónn la bela scenografia.

Desche toc de teatro, al ciafa sie flus. Desche drama de debat, però, al acumula n’energia da locomotiva mente che al va viers al scontr final anter Frank Miller (James Doherty), che torna te chest “piciul paisc suzi te mes al nia”, y l marshal Will Kane (Crudup), che l’á mandé te preson. Chësc porvia, soraldut, dla relevanza straordinara y urgënta de chest film dl 1952 sun na comunité che se confrunta cun sües responsabilité ziviches denant ai torts istituzionai – o, plu avisa, che pró da se n liberé.

Originariamenter na alegoria dl maccartism – so scenegiadú, Carl Foreman, fo metü sun la lista niera – la storia met la codardia di plü cunter l curaje di puc: te chest cajo, Kane, eroe solitari, che mobilisëia sia defëisa contra Miller y si complices do che la jënt dl paisc l’á lascé su so cont. L film fo atacé da John Wayne desche nia american por so retrat critic dla comunité; la produziun ciafa vita ti si argomënc sun l’aziun y la inaziun coletiva y para baié diretamënter di dilemmas che afronta la tera di cowboy dla America de Trump – cun la sparatoria de Minneapolis desche ultim ejëmpl. L test de Eric Roth dovra n gran numer de battütes dl scenegé de Foreman, ma amplifiché i debac sun la postura etica de na comunité denant al tort y sun i mituns americans falé tocan l’immigraziun.

Codardia di plü, curaje di puc ... l cast de High Noon. Fotografia: Johan Persson

Nce é ince l talent condividü de Crudup y dla semper agila Denise Gough, che jëga la copa centrala te so dé de nozes. Ela é Amy Fowler, na quachera che aborësc les azions di oms violënc; el é l marshal che á da pü lascé sia “stëila de lata” por scomenzé da nuef desche botighier. Chësc, almanco fin can la nuvëia riva te paisc che Miller stëgn rivé col tren de mesdí.

Gary Cooper á fat dl role valch dal dut so, cun n’integrité che se po comparé ma cun l’Atticus de Gregory Peck te To Kill a Mockingbird. Cussí Crudup à da schivé na lunga ombra. El riesc a sostigní la pert sun scena desche n om dret, sincer y tresplü disperé. Gough fej sia pert plü aspra y plü moderna co chëra de sia cumpartida cinematografica, Grace Kelly. I dui é convinzënc desche copa, inceben che na caraterisaziun massa streta limita la piena mesira de sües capacitês.

Vaire atri personaji para massa debli, dal vice-marshal Harvey Pell de Billy Howle fina a la imprenditora messicana Helen de Rosa Salazar, inceben che l’afinité anter ela y Amy é rinfrescanta, y che Roth dá, te l’insieme, plü usc y consistënza a chestes femes.

Vaires cianties de Springsteen porta cun sëes sia propria politica americana, dal optimism dla frontiera de Land of Hope and Dreams fina a The Rising, scrita desche resposta ai atach dl 11 de setëmber. Ciertes vëgn ciantades a cappella, suraldut da Gough, che é na ciantadura de forza y che, cun sia usc, emana desolaziun; ma la reprënta de I’m on Fire n pô massa de iadi.

A trëi momënc para n musical restiu, cun cianties curtes y sotiles; ma la musica percussiva y l design dl son é tres captivanc, desche ince la iluminaziun, firmada da Neil Austin, che porta clareza emotiva y intriga. N relogio é zentral tla scenografia de Tim Hatley, contan jö i momënc fina a l’arrivada palpitanta dl tren y al confront che vëgn do, che mantëgn tensiun y drama, malgrad la dificulté de meter sun scena na sparatoria tras dut l paisc.

source_doc:
project move out, spring break relay
day 1:
Cleared main bedroom closet
& contents of boxes on one wall.
I'm surveying all my belongings. Pulling out a small percentage to save. Sentimental items. Practical pieces for putting together a new life. At this stage I know I'm selecting more than I need, probably more than I can carry; but the amount that I'm leaving behind is far greater. Deciding what to keep & where comes after the survey. All the rest will be turned over to "scavengers."
#moverR

Day 2, midday break, Monday.
Today is harder than yesterday. I'm uncovering far more "sentimental" stuff. The challenge: these saved memories are a physical drag that impair rather than contribute anything practically to my future AND I feel integrated looking at them. There's a strong general condemnation, I feel, of holding onto sentimental items. Yet I know that they are powerful. But hey, I'm an artist. Even wistful, sad memories are valuable to me. I'm proceeding as before, retaining less+

+than I'm tossing, while knowing that I am keeping "too much." The next phase will be the actual moving & storing phase when more might be cut. This phase is the pre-screen before turning the cleared items over to others who will take everything away.
File under: how to move out of a home of 12 years & a home town of 45 years, with family roots here (& artifacts) from 150 years. I'm finally leaving, in search of a culture that suits my values.
#moverR
instruction: You are a professional Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
projet de se mudé fora, stafeta dla pausa de primavera
degn 1:
libré l’armar dl ciamber prinzipal
& l contegnü di cartons sun na paraid.
Stö controlan dötes les mies robes. Tiran fora n pitl procent da salvé. Coses sentimentales. Toc pratics por mete adöm na vita nöia. A chest pont sai che stö selezionan deplü co che me fejën de bojëgn, probabel deplü co che possi porté; ma la cuantité che lassi indô é bele de gran lunga maiù. Decidé ci che tegnì & olache ven do le control. Dut l rest gnará surandé ai "rüj."
#traslchR

Degn 2, pausa de mesdé, lunesc.
Incö é pü dificul co enier. Stö descorjin fora deplü de gran "cose sentimentales". La sfida: chisc recorc salvé é n peis fisich che frena, pü co che no porte valch de pratich al mi futur, AND me senti integrada can i vard. I siente che al é na forta condana generala de tegnìse stretes coses sentimentales. Mo sai ince che les à n gran podëi. Mo dai, i é n’artista. Ince recorc nostalgics y trisc é prezius por me. Stö jin inant coche denant, tegnan de manco+

+co che stlani, ence sa sai che stágn tegnan "massa." La fasa do gnará chëra dl traslöch y dl mét a mantegnì, can che forsc valch auter gnará tajé. Chësta fasa é le pre-screen dan che les coses librades vae a d’atri che se tolará dut demez.
Da mete sot: coche se mudé fora da na ciasa de 12 agn & da n paîsc dl cör de 45 agn, cun raïjes de familia chilò (& artefac) da 150 agn. A la fin me ne vae, a chirì na cultura che va d’acordo cun i miei valurs.
#traslchR

(2/?)

> I imagine there's still space for going back to the old model
There's plenty of new models to be tried that would be a huge improvement over playing hashtag roulette, either on DataFarms or decentralised social networks. One idea I saw was online dating as a group-based social experience. This is a handwave in the right direction. As is @cy's idea about matchmakers in another branch of this thread.

(3/?)
Speaking of roulette, what about a Chat Roulette style speed-dating app?
The app could;
* perform some basic T&S vetting (to minimise unsolicited dick-cam, etc), including confirming what general area you're in (ask me how!)
* throw you into a round of realtime speed dating with others in your area (text? Voice? Video? see 4/4).
* As with normal speed dating, if you both Favourite each other after talking, you get each others' contacts
#OnlineDating #ChatRoulette

@strypey I nearly joined #Chatroulette, but then Covid and the Ukraine war started, so that never went anywhere. I had a different direction I wanted to take them, though.
#Bumble #TrustAndSafety ? Well, the industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers, but safety workers in the industry do talk to me. I know more than I would ever want to know about the inside workings of most dating sites, and sadly. It's not really an amazing revelation that Bumble is as bad as the rest, though.
None of the dating sites puts more than a veneer of effort into T&S. They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower.

@lorry
> he industry isn't exactly full of dating site whistleblowers
Any particular reason for that?
> They weigh the cost of litigation against the cost of actually doing the work, and so far, litigation costs have always been lower
Huh. The Fight Club principle at work. Sad. We deserve better from our digital matchmaking tools.

source_doc:
Today's Sunday Best features my Knight from Ragnarok Online! This was my very first online PC game, he was an agi/dex 2HQ knight w/ a set of elemental claymores. I played on iRO Loki, and had two drawings featured as loadscreen art!
My online handle stems from this guy. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Coming in just under the wire on today's Sunday Best, it's my Deep Rock Galactic Engineer! The loadout I ran most of the time was Executioner LOK-1 & RJ-250 Grenade Launcher. I think the LOK-1 is one of the coolest weapon designs in an FPS, a lock-on mechanic that encouraged finesse & deep mastery.

This week's Sunday Best is my Xenoverse OC, Parma (for parmesan cheese). She had a partner named Brie. Parma dressed up to match the teachers she studied under, but her final fit reflected the one she started with, styled to match this one pair of gloves. She used Giant Storm & Double Sunday a lot.

For my Sunday Best I drew my Paxultek from Remnant II. The goal of my build was to make the damage number from a single shot as large as possible. I used a Widowmaker single-shot elephant rifle we nicknamed The Governor. It was so strong it one-shot teammates through friendly fire damage reduction.

Today's Sunday Best features my funny gay dog lady from Webfishing. Her voice had a deeper, slower pitch so she sounded old & chill. One time I joined a full server, sat somewhere & started posting practical life advice, bits of big-sister wisdom, & the whole server found me & sat with me to listen.

It's Sunday, today's feature is my Darktide Zealot. Her name is Callista, she's chasing sainthood to be pardoned of her many crimes so she won't have to apologize for any of them. She has black dreams full of teeth and is constantly flirting with female Loner Psykers. She's unwell, but Female Loose Cannon Veterans think it's endearing and constantly hit on her for it. Their in-game voices say all of this.

Today's Sunday Best feature is QP from 100% Orange Juice! I played OJ a lot with my fighting game friends; for some reason I'd always have the hand pictured here. We used to post in text chat during games and I'd always say, Do NOT test me. I played so much QP the devs awarded me a special QP badge!

This week's Sunday Best is "Local Psychopath," Fem Boss #1 from Saint's Row 3. This was the first game I wanted to use the create-a-feature to make a character who blended in with the cast and looked like a genuine member of the Third Street Saints. I picked 3 cuz my favorite jacket wasn't in 4. :(

For today's Sunday Best I've got my Animal Crossing Villager to share. My favorite way to play these games is as part of a global cartel of goons who shared their wealth. When one person had big Turnips, everyone got paid. No profiteering; you need a rare item to make your room idea work? We got you.

It's technically Sunday, and this week's fit lands a bit early! I don't Tekken very often, but when I do I like to pick Steve and do all his slippery punches. In Tekken 7 he had a loose-fit, full-body track suit, so I made him into a deer man. When he's in Peekaboo Stance the antlers point forward!

This week's Sunday Best feature is Gaige from Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy is one of the coolest FPS mechanics in the genre, an escalating accumulation of power that came with a diminishing level of control, lowering both TTK & effective range. Ride the wave & figure it out on the fly, it'll be fine.
Gaige's voice actress plays V in Cyberpunk 2077, I learned recently. An old friend.

Today's Sunday Best isn't a person, it's a plane from an old Vlambeer game called Luftrausers! The music changes to match your airplane. My favorite configuration is called "Shipwreck," a sword-hulled amphibious prop plane with shotgun cannons, it can divebomb through boats & burst up from the sea.

Tonight our Sunday Best feature is the Houndmaster from a charming Crawl-like sidescroller called Vagante. Lovingly referred to as the Dogmancer, I loved to spec into skills that increased damage when you threw the dog at monsters. The dog roams on its own, but you can also carry it on your back!

For this week's Sunday Best we're going all the way back to Cyborg Justice on the Genesis. I played this game a lot and I always liked to make this one guy: round torso, big stampy feet and the buzzsaw hand. I always remember the magazine ad for this game vividly; you might too if you're of an age.

I did a bit of archaeological research to uncover references for this week's Sunday Best. This was my guy from Loadout, a third-person arena shooter about fiddly weapon customization. My main gun was an electric pulse cannon called "Kill-a-Watts" and the backup was a flaming LMG named "Roast Beef."

hypo_0:
La Sunday Best de ancö à per le mi Cavalier da Ragnarok Online! Chësc ie stat le mi pröm zogo online sun PC, al jëra n cavalier agi/dex 2HQ cun n set de claymore elementares. I à giaté sun iRO Loki, y doi de mi disegns é gnüs metüs desche art da loadscreen!
Le mi nick online vegn da chësc tlo. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Rivon just sot al limit per la Sunday Best de ancö, chësc ie le mi Engineer de Deep Rock Galactic! Le loadout che i usâ le plü dl temp jëra Executioner LOK-1 & RJ-250 Grenade Launcher. I crëi che le LOK-1 sie un di progets de arma plü cool te n FPS, na mecanica de lock-on che te sponjiva a giöghé cun fineza & maestria vera.

La Sunday Best de chësta setimana ie la mia OC de Xenoverse, Parma (per le formai parmesan). Ara â na partner che se clamâ Brie. Parma se vestia per corisponné ai insegnanc che ara studiâ sot, mo le so fit final refletia chel cun chel che ara â tacâ, stilé per jí a una cun chësta unica para de guanc. Ara usâ tan Giant Storm & Double Sunday.

Per la mia Sunday Best i à dessigné le mi Paxultek da Remnant II. Le goal de mi build jëra de fá che le numer dl dann de n colp singol fossa le plü gran pussibl. I usâ n elephant rifle a colp singol Widowmaker che noi ciamâvon The Governor. Al jëra tan fort che al one-shotéa i compagns de squadra tras la riduzion de dann da friendly fire.

La Sunday Best de ancö à per tema la mia simpatica ciana gay da Webfishing. La so ousc â n tonn plü bass, plü lent, ensciö che ara sunâ desche na da na età & chill. Na ota son jonté te n server pien, me son senté da valch n post & à tacâ a scrì consëis pratici de vita, toc de savëssa da soredla gran, & dut le server m'à ciafé & s'à senté cun me per scuté.

Al é domenia, la figura de ancö ie la mia Zealot de Darktide. Ara se ciama Callista, ara é a ciaré la santità per gnì pardoneda di süa tanti crims ensciö che ara n'á nia da se scüsé per gnanca un de ëi. Ara à insögns neirs plëns de dënć y ara flirta de contìn cun Psyker Loner femenes. Ara n'ará nia ben, mo les Veterans Female Loose Cannon le ciafa adorabil y i va ados per chësc de contìn. Les ousc dl zogo dij dut chësc.

La Sunday Best de ancö ie QP da 100% Orange Juice! I à giaté a OJ tan cun i mi amis di fighting game; per n motiv o l'ater i me capitâ tosc ntrames la man che se vëd chiló. Noi scrivivan te la chat de test dan che i gioghévan y i dijei tres, No sté nia a prové me. I à giaté tan cun QP che i devs m'à dé n badge spezial de QP!

La Sunday Best de chësta setimana ie "Local Psychopath", Fem Boss #1 da Saint's Row 3. Chësc ie stat le pröm zogo olache i orei adoré la funzione create-a-feature per fá n personaj che se mesdass cun le cast y che para desche n membre vere dl Third Street Saints. I à cherì le 3 ciodì che la mia jacket preferida n'jëra nia tel 4. :(

Per la Sunday Best de ancö ài le mi Villager de Animal Crossing da spartì. Le mi möt preferì da gioghé a chësti jogs ie desche pert de n cartel global de goons che spartivan la rica. Canché n à vëi grandi Turnips, düć vegniva paié. Nisciüna speculazion; te mëss n ogët rar per fá che la tia idea dla ciausa funziuns? Te aiuton noi.

Teoria al é domenia, y le fit de chësta setimana riva n püch dant! I n gioghi nia tan a Tekken, mo canche i lo faz, i me platz chirí Steve y fá düć i sü colps sguizlous. Te Tekken 7 al â n tracksuit larg, inter, ensciö che l'à fat de lui n ëm-cierf. Canché al é te Peekaboo Stance les còrnes punta inant!

La Sunday Best de chësta setimana ie Gaige da Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy ie una di mechanics FPS plü cool dl genre, n acumul de potëza che cresceva y che gniva cun n control ognüna manco, sbassonn tant le TTK che la portada efetiva. Mónta sü l'onda & capësci te moment, al jirá ben.
L'attriz dla ousc de Gaige fej V te Cyberpunk 2077, chësc l'ai imparé da poch. Na vedla amia.

La Sunday Best de ancö n'ie nia na persona, ie n avion da n vedl zogo de Vlambeer ciamé Luftrausers! La muzica muda per jí a una cun le to avion. La mia configurazion preferida se ciama "Shipwreck", n avion a elica anfibio cun fuselaj da spada y canons a shotgun, al pó se buté jö tras les barches & salté sü fora dl mer.

Chësta sëra la nostra Sunday Best ie le Houndmaster da n sidescroller de tip Crawl tan simpatich ciamé Vagante. Ciamé cun afezion le Dogmancer, me plajei tan de me specializé te abilitec che aumentâ le dann canche te butevi le cian ai mostres. Le cian va inant da su per cont so, mo te pës ince portéle sö la schena!

Per la Sunday Best de chësta setimana tornon dër inant a Cyborg Justice sun Genesis. I à giaté tan a chësc zogo y me é tres plajü de fá chësc n tlo: torso toronn, gran peis che stampa y la man cun sega circolara. I me recordi tres ben la publicità de revista per chësc zogo; forsc te ince, sce te es de chëra età.

I à fat n pü de riċerches archeologiches per descorì referënzes per la Sunday Best de chësta setimana. Chësc jëra le mi tlo da Loadout, n arena shooter en terza persona sun la personalisazion minuziosa de les armes. La mia arma prinzipala jëra n canon a impulsi eletrich ciamé "Kill-a-Watts" y la backup na LMG enflamada ciameda "Roast Beef."

I à giaté tan a chësc jüch y me é tres plajü de fá chësc n tlo: torso toronn, gran peis che stampa y la man cun sega circolara. I me recordi tres ben la publicità te revista per chësc jüch; forsc te ince, sce te es de chëra età.

I à fat n pü de riċerches archeologiches per descorì referënzes per la Sunday Best de chësta setimana. Chësc jëra le mi tlo da Loadout, n arena shooter en terza persona sun la personalisazion minuziosa de les armes. La mia arma prinzipala jëra n canon a impulsi eletrich ciamé "Kill-a-Watts" y la backup na LMG enflameda ciameda "Roast Beef."
hypo_3:
La Sunday Best de ancö à per tema le mi Knight da Ragnarok Online! Chësc é stat le mi pröm videojüch online sun PC, al jëra n knight agi/dex 2HQ cun n set de claymores elementeres. I à giaté sun iRO Loki, y dui de mi desegns é gnüs metüs desche art de loadscreen!
Le mi nick online vegn da chësc tlo. O'Reiley -> Reiley -> Rally

Rivà giüst al ultim per la Sunday Best de ancö, chël é le mi Engineer de Deep Rock Galactic! Le loadout che i usâ la plü part dl temp jëra Executioner LOK-1 & RJ-250 Grenade Launcher. I crëi che le LOK-1 sie un di designs de arma plü cool te n FPS, cun na mecanica de lock-on che te sponea a gioghé cun fineza & maestria profonda.

La Sunday Best de chësta setimana é la mia OC de Xenoverse, Parma (per le formai parmesan). Ara â na partner che se ciamâ Brie. Parma se vistia per jí adöm cun i maestri da chi che ara imparâ, mo le so fit final refletia chël cun chel che ara â tacé, stilé per jí adöm cun chësta para de guanc. Ara usâ tan Giant Storm & Double Sunday.

Per la mia Sunday Best i à dessigné le mi Paxultek da Remnant II. Le goal dl mi build jëra de fá che le numer dl dann de n colp singol fossa le plü gran pussibl. I usâ n elephant rifle a colp singol Widowmaker che noi ciamâvon The Governor. Al jëra tan fort che al copéa i compagns de squadra cun n colp solet ince tras la riduzion dl dann da friendly fire.

La Sunday Best de ancö à per tema la mia simpatica ciana gay da Webfishing. La so ousc â n ton plü bass y plü lent, ensciö che ara sunâ vedla & chill. Na ota son jonté te n server pien, me son senté da valch pert & à tacé a posté consëis pratici de vita, toc de savëssa da soredla grana, & dut le server m'à ciafé y s'à senté cun me per scuté.

Al é domenia, y la figura de ancö é la mia Zealot de Darktide. Ara se ciama Callista, ara va do la santità per gnì pardonedes di sü tanti crims ensciö che ara n'á nia da se scüsé per gnanca un de ëi. Ara à insögns neri plëns de dënć y ara flirta de contìn cun Psykers Loner feminines. Ara n'ará nia ben, mo les Veterans Female Loose Cannon la ciafa adorabla y i va ados de contìn per chësc. Les ousc dl jüch dij dut chësc.

La Sunday Best de ancö é QP da 100% Orange Juice! I à giaté a OJ tan cun i mi amis di fighting game; per n motiv o l'ater i me capitâ tres la man che se vëd chiló. Noi scrivivan te la chat de test dër tratan les partides y i dijei tres: No me stuzighé NIA. I à giaté tan cun QP che i devs m'à dé n badge spezial de QP!

La Sunday Best de chësta setimana é "Local Psychopath", Fem Boss #1 da Saint's Row 3. Chësc é stat le pröm jüch olache i orei adoré la funzione create-a-feature per fá n personaj che se mesdass cun le cast y che para desche n membre vero dl Third Street Saints. I à chirí le 3 ciodì che la mia jacket preferida n'jëra nia tel 4. :(

Per la Sunday Best de ancö ài le mi Villager de Animal Crossing da spartì. Le mi möt preferì da gioghé a chësti jüz é desche pert de n cartel global de goons che spartivan la rica. Canché un â grossi Turnips, düć vegniva paié. Nisciüna speculazion; te mëss n ogët rar per fá che la tia idea dla ciasa funksiones? Te iaron noi.

Al é tecnicamënter domenia, y le fit de chësta setimana riva n püch danora! I ne gioghi nia tan a Tekken, mo canche i lo faz, me platz chirí Steve y fá düć si colps sguizlous. Te Tekken 7 al â n tracksuit larg, de corp intier, ensciö che l'à fat de lui n ëm-cierf. Canché al é te Peekaboo Stance, les còrnes punta inant!

La Sunday Best de chësta setimana é Gaige da Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy é una di mechanics FPS plü cool dl genre, n acumul de potënza che cresceva de contìn ma cun manco control, sbassonn tant le TTK che la portada efetiva. Ciafa l'onda & capësci al moment, al jirá ben.
L'attriz dla ousc de Gaige fej V te Cyberpunk 2077, chësc l'ai imparé da püch. Na vedla amia.

La Sunday Best de ancö n'é nia na persona, é n avion da n vedl jüch de Vlambeer ciamé Luftrausers! La muzica muda per jí adöm cun le to avion. La mia configurazion preferida se ciama "Shipwreck", n avion a elica anfibio cun fuselaj da spada y canons a shotgun, al pó se buté jö tras les barches & salté sö fora dl mer.

Chësta sëra la nostra Sunday Best é le Houndmaster da n sidescroller de tip Crawl tan simpatich ciamé Vagante. Ciamé cun afezion le Dogmancer, me plajei tan de me specializé te abilitec che aumentâ le dann canche te butevi le cian ai mostres. Le cian va inant da su per cont so, mo te pës ince portéle sö la schena!

La Sunday Best de chësta setimana é la mia OC de Xenoverse, Parma (per le formai parmesan). Ara â na partner che se ciamâ Brie. Parma se vistia per jí adöm ai maestri da chi che ara imparâ, mo so fit final refletia chël cun chel che ara â tacé, stilé per jí adöm cun chësta para de guanc. Ara usâ tan Giant Storm & Double Sunday.

Per la mia Sunday Best i à desegné le me Paxultek de Remnant II. Le goal dl me build jëra de fá che le numer dl dann de n colp singol fossa le plü gran pussibl. I adorâ n elephant rifle a colp singol Widowmaker che noi ciamâvon The Governor. Al jëra tan fort che al copéa i compagns de squadra cun n colp solet ince tras la riduzion dl dann da friendly fire.

La Sunday Best de ancö à la mia simpatica ciana gay de Webfishing. La so ousc â n ton plü bass y plü lent, ensciö che ara sunâ vedla & chill. Na ota son jonté te n server plen, me son senté da valch pert & à tacé a posté consëis pratics de vita, toc de savëssa da soredla granda, & dut le server m'à ciafé y s'à senté cun me per scuté.

Al é domenia, y la figura de ancö é la mia Zealot de Darktide. Ara se ciama Callista, ara va do la santità per gnì perdonada di sü tanti crims ensciö che ara n'ará nia da se scüsé per gnanca un de ëi. Ara à insögns neri plëns de dëić y ara flirta de contìn cun Psykers Loner feminines. Ara n'ará nia ben, mo les Veterans Female Loose Cannon la cata adorabla y i va ados de contìn per chest. Les ousc dl jüch dij dut chest.

La Sunday Best de ancö é QP de 100% Orange Juice! I à gioghé tan a OJ cun i me amis di fighting game; per n motiv o l'ater i me capitâ tres la man che se vëd chiló. Noi scrivivan te la chat de test tratan les partides y i dijei tres: NO me stuzighé. I à gioghé tan cun QP che i devs m'à dé n badge spezial de QP!

La Sunday Best de chësta setimana é "Local Psychopath", Fem Boss #1 de Saint's Row 3. Chësc é stat le pröm jüch olache i orei adoré la funzione de creazion dl personaj per fá n personaj che se mesdass cun le cast y che para desche n membre vero dl Third Street Saints. I à chirí le 3 ciodì che la mia jacket preferida n'jëra nia tel 4. :(

Per la Sunday Best de ancö ài le me Villager de Animal Crossing da spartì. Le me möt preferì da gioghé a chësti jüz é desche pert de n cartel global de goons che spartivan la rica. Canché un â grossi Turnips, düć vegniva paié. Nisciüna speculazion; te mëss n ogët rar per fá che la tia idea dla ciasa funziones? Te iaron noi.

Al é tecnicamënter domenia, y le fit de chësta setimana riva n püch danora! I ne gioghi nia tan a Tekken, mo canche i lo faz, me plaza chirí Steve y fá düć si colps sguizlous. Te Tekken 7 al â n tracksuit larg, de corp intier, ensciö che l'à fat de lui n ëm-cierf. Canché al é te Peekaboo Stance, les còrnes punta inant!

La Sunday Best de chësta setimana é Gaige de Borderlands 2. Pure Anarchy é una di mechanics FPS plü cool dl genre, n acumul de potënza che cresceva de contìn ma cun manco control, sbassonn tant le TTK che la portada efetiva. Ciafa l'onda & capësci al moment, al jirá ben.
L'attriza dla ousc de Gaige fej V te Cyberpunk 2077, chësc l'ai imparé da püch. Na vedla amia.

La Sunday Best de ancö n'é nia na persona, é n avion de n vedl jüch de Vlambeer ciamé Luftrausers! La muzica muda per jí adöm cun le to avion. La mia configurazion preferida se ciama "Shipwreck", n avion a elica anfibio cun fuselaj da spada y canons a shotgun, al pó se buté jö tras les barches & salté sö fora dl mer.

Chësta sëra la nostra Sunday Best é le Houndmaster de n sidescroller de tip Crawl tan simpatich ciamé Vagante. Ciamé cun afezion le Dogmancer, me plajei tan de me specializé te abilitec che aumentâ le dann canche te butevi le cian ai mostres. Le cian va inant da su per cont so, mo te pës ince portéle sö la schena!

Per la Sunday Best de chësta setimana tornon dal dut indô a Cyborg Justice sun Genesis. I à gioghé tan a chest jüch y me é tres plajü de fá chest n tlo: torso toronn, gran peis che stampa y la man cun sega circolara. I me recordi tres ben la publicità te revista per chest jüch; forsc te ince, sce te es de chëra età.

I à fat n pü de ricerches archeologiches per descorì referënzes per la Sunday Best de chësta setimana. Chësc jëra le me tlo de Loadout, n arena shooter en terza persona sun la personalisazion minuziosa de les armes. La mia arma prinzipala jëra n canon a impulsi eletrich ciamé "Kill-a-Watts" y la backup na LMG enflameda ciameda "Roast Beef."

source_doc:
Ashley Barnes at the double as Burnley claim welcome win over Millwall

Ashley Barnes bagged a brace as Burnley put their Premier League worries on hold to cruise into the fourth round of the FA Cup with a 5-1 win over Millwall.

The 36-year-old scored his first goal of the season early on and added his second midway through the second half as the blundering Lions gifted a confident home side the most emphatic of wins.

Boss Scott Parker made eight changes to the side that started in Wednesday's 2-2 draw with Manchester United and they did not disappoint, as further goals from Loum Tchaouna and Jaidon Anthony put them out of sight by half-time.

Substitute Jaydon Banel added Burnley's fifth on the stroke of 90 minutes before the shell-shocked Lions, who had completely capitulated, netted an added-time consolation through Josh Coburn.

Burnley dominated the opening exchanges and grabbed the lead in the 11th minute when Jacob Bruun Larsen squared for Barnes to sweep home past visiting goalkeeper Steven Benda.

The Lions mustered little in response, with Aidomo Emakhu booting their best chance straight at Burnley keeper Max Weiss after being released down the left by Joe Bryan.

But the visitors slowly grew into the game and should have levelled when Jake Cooper got his head on Alfie Doughty's cross from deep on the left but was denied by a brilliant over-arm save from Weiss.

The keeper saved again from Cooper on the half-hour as Millwall threatened a leveller but the visitors were undone by two defensive errors that put the game beyond their grasp.

Tchaouna was allowed to thread his left-foot shot from the edge of the box past a static Benda on 35 minutes and shortly before the break the Millwall keeper's poor clearance ultimately gifted Anthony the chance to slide home his side's third.

Millwall looked livelier at the start of the second half and Thierno Ballo should have done better when he found space to get a shot off in the left side of the box, but the home side were clearly in cruise control.

Tchaouna came close to his second when he rifled a shot against the outside of Benda's right-hand post and the increasingly inevitable fourth arrived on 65 minutes when Kamarl Grant made a hash of clearing Anthony's right-wing cross and a delighted Barnes mopped up.

Hunting for a hat-trick, Barnes flashed a header straight at Benda as the linesman's flag was raised, but it was Banel who completed the rout from close range before Coburn's confident finish in stoppage time.

Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Ashley Barnes segnëi doi iadi te la vitoria bengnida de Burnley sun Millwall

Ashley Barnes à marcà na dopleta canche Burnley à metü da pert si preocupaziuns de Premier League per jí cun facilità te l cuart tor de la FA Cup cun na vitoria por 5-1 sun Millwall.

L giogadù de 36 agn à segnà sie prüm gol dla sajon da pröm annant y à jontà l second a mes dl secundo tëmp, canche i Lions, colpevoli de errours grossolans, à regalà a na scuadra de ciasa sigüra de sé la vitoria plü neta.

L mister Scott Parker à fat ot cambi te la formaziun che à scomençà l paregio 2-2 de mierculdi cun Manchester United y i ne à mia deludì, cun d'atri goi de Loum Tchaouna y Jaidon Anthony che à metü fora de discussiun l risultat bele dant dl tëmp de pausa.

L subentrà Jaydon Banel à jontà l cínch de Burnley sun la soglia dl 90. menüt, dant che i Lions, sciocà y dal dut crollé, à fat sie gol de consolaziun te l tëmp de recuperaziun tres Josh Coburn.

Burnley à dominà i pröms scambi y à ciapà l vantaje te l 11. menüt canche Jacob Bruun Larsen à metü ite a mes per Barnes, che à spint la bala te rete dant al portier ospite Steven Benda.

I Lions à fat püch te resposta, cun Aidomo Emakhu che à tirà la miú ocajiun dla squadra dret sü al portier de Burnley Max Weiss do che al é gnü lancià jö per la banda cencia da Joe Bryan.

Ma i ospic à cresciü pian pian te la partida y messa avess egalisé canche Jake Cooper à ciapà de testa l cross de Alfie Doughty dai lontan da cencia, ma al é gnü fermà da na splendida parèda soramàn de Weiss.

L portier à salvà n'atra ota sun Cooper mez ora, canche Millwall minaciava l paregio, ma i ospic é gnüs dannegié da doi falc de difesa che à metü la partida fora dla so portada.

A Tchaouna ge é gnü lascà da infilé sie tir col pî cencià dai ôrc dl'area dant a n Benda ferm sun i pî al 35. menüt, y püch dant la pausa n rinvio sbalià dl portier de Millwall à finì per regalé ad Anthony la posibilità de sdrissë fora te rete l terz dla sia squadra.

Millwall à parü plü viv al scomenz dl secundo tëmp y Thierno Ballo messa avess fat miú canche al à ciafà post per tiré dala pert cencia dl'area, ma la squadra de ciasa à mostrà cleramënter de avëi la partida sot control.

Tchaouna é jit strusch visin a sie secundo gol canche al à scarià n tir sun la part de fora dl palo dret de Benda, y l cuart, ciamò plü inevitabil, é rivà al 65. menüt canche Kamarl Grant à fat n pastroc tl proé da spazzé via l cross da man dreta de Anthony y n Barnes cuntënt à profité dla ocajiun.

En cërcia dl hat-trick, Barnes à mandà na testa drita sö Benda, canche la bandiera dl guardialinee s'à alsèda, ma al é stat Banel che à cumplì la goleada da visin dant l finissaj sigür de Coburn te l tëmp de recuperaziun.
hypo_1:
Ashley Barnes marca doi goi, Burnley ciapa na vitoria arjignida sun Millwall

Ashley Barnes à fat na dopleta canche Burnley à metü da na pert si preocupaziuns de Premier League y é jit cun sigürezza te l cuart tor dla FA Cup cun na vitoria por 5-1 sun Millwall.

L giogadù de 36 agn à segnà sie pröm gol dla sajon bele te l scomenz y à jontà l secundo a mes dl secundo tëmp, canche i Lions, colpevoli de errours grossolans, à fat n regal a na squadra de ciasa plëna de fiducia, che à ciapà n success dl dut net.

L mister Scott Parker à fat ot mudaziuns te la formaziun che à scomenzà l paregio de mierculdi por 2-2 cun Manchester United y i sustitüć ne à mia deludì: d'atri goi de Loum Tchaouna y Jaidon Anthony à metü la partida bele fora de discussiun dant la pausa.

L subentrà Jaydon Banel à jontà l cínch gol de Burnley sun la fin dl 90. menüt, dant che i Lions, dal dut sciocà y ormai crolé, à fat l gol dla bandiera te l tëmp de recuperaziun cun Josh Coburn.

Burnley à dominà i pröms minüć y à passà inant te l 11. menüt, canche Jacob Bruun Larsen à servì Barnes, che à mandà la bala te rete dant al portier ospite Steven Benda.

I Lions à reagiü poch, cun Aidomo Emakhu che à spedì la miú ocajiun dla sia squadra dret sü Max Weiss, portier de Burnley, do che Joe Bryan l'â lancià söla banda cencia.

Ma i ospić à ciaminà pian pian ite te la partida y messa avess podü paregé canche Jake Cooper à colpì de testa sun l cross de Alfie Doughty da cencia, ma Weiss l'à fermà cun na parèda splendida.

L portier à salvà danü sun Cooper sun la mes'ora, canche Millwall stlava por rivé al paregio, ma i ospić é gnüs punis da doi errours de difesa che à metü la partida fora dla so portada.

Al 35. menüt a Tchaouna ge é gnü lascé traghé col pî cencià dai ôrc dl'area y mandé la bala sora n Benda ferm, y püch dant la pausa n rinvio sbalià dl portier de Millwall à regalà ad Anthony la ocajiun de segnè l terz gol dla sia squadra.

Millwall à parü plü vif al scomenz dl secundo tëmp y Thierno Ballo messa avess fat miú canche al à ciafà post per tiré dala pert cencia dl'area, ma la squadra de ciasa â cleramënter la partida sot control.

Tchaouna é jit strusch visin a sie secundo gol canche al à tirà cun forza sun la part de fora dl palo dret de Benda, y l cuart gol, semper plü prevedibil, é rivà al 65. menüt canche Kamarl Grant à sbalià l liberé l cross da man dreta de Anthony y n Barnes cuntënt à aprofité dla situaziun.

En cërcia dl hat-trick, Barnes à mandà na testa dret sü Benda canche la bandiera dl guardialinee s'à alsèda, ma al é stat Banel che à completà la goleada da visin, dant l finissaj sigür de Coburn te l tëmp de recuperaziun.

source_doc:
On a lighter note, just saw someone complaining about when games beg you to switch to easy mode when you fail.
I also hate this.
I love having an easy mode. Hell, I think games should just fuckin' let you cheat, as long as competitions all have agreed-on rules about it.
But every game that's pestered me into easy mode has been an instant put-down. I have plenty of games to play, if you want me to be done faster, congrats, I'm done faster.

This is what makes modern Marios - modern-ish anyway - so impossible for me to play.
"Did you die thwee times mawwio? Here's the golden supersuit of invincibility because you suck! If you don't want it, just carefully avoid ever pressing anything besides "start level yes again no no nothing else just start the level".
This is also why I stopped trying to play Phantom Pain. Whenever I died, it'd offer me the chicken hat and default to "yes", eventually I forgot to manually say "fuck off".

I get it's a retention thing, but it's so disrespectful.
Autoscaling difficulty also pisses me off, because I'll be gearing up for a challenge and then the game will panic and lower it to super easy because I've been "struggling".
I'll die or something, go back to try again, but nope, now the challenge is gone. You succeeded! You made the game go away! Don't worry, those challenges were for someone else. Someone better.
I can't remember if I ever completed a game with autoscaling difficulty.

I guess the basic difference between me and their target audience is that I like to figure out how to do something, while their target audience - at least in their heads - likes to take a log flume through a Disneyworld attraction.
A little jostling, a little fluids, but don't worry, baby, daddy Walt's got ya. You're safey-wafe, you don't even have to move, just sit there and tee hee, here's a wittle splashy-splash.
If I wanted that, I'd go sit in a fucking dog park and pet a dog.

hypo_0:
Per dì na roba plu leiera, ai apena vedù un che se lamentea de canche i joch te prega de passé al modo facile canche te fal.
Anche jo odie chest.
Mi adorëi avëi n modo facile. Cioé, pense che i joch te dess ciamó lascé baré, basta che les competiziuns abie regoles tutes acordades su chest.
Ma ogne joch che m’à stufé da passé al modo facile m’à fat stufé danter via. Ai assé joch da jué, se te veus che finëssi plu svelta, compliment, ai finì plu svelta.

Chest é chel che fej i Mario moderni - o almanco semi-moderni - tan impossibli da jué por me.
"Êstela mort trei otes, mawwio? Ecote le supervestì dorada de invincibilità parce che te ses scarso! Se no la veus, basta evité con cura de strunfé nience auter che "scomenza nivel sí, dër no no, nience auter, basta scomenza le nivel".
Chest é ence percheche ai lascià sté de prové a jué Phantom Pain. Ogna ota che morei, me ufrea le ciapel de pulan y metea "sí" come predefinì, fin che a la fin me so desmentié de dì a man "va a caghé".

Capësci che chest ie na roba de retënzion, ma ie tan de manc de respet.
La dificoltà che se adata da para me fej ence inciafé, percheche me prepari por na sfida y do le joch va an panich y la cala a super facile parce che ai "fat fadia".
Morei o capita alc, vëgni indô por prové n'otra ota, ma no, ades la sfida é sparida. Te ies reusciù! Te âs fat sparì le joch! No sta te preocupé, ches sfides éres por n auter. Un plu bon.
No me recorde gnanca se ai mai fenì un joch cun dificoltà che se adata da para.

Credi che la diferënza de basa anter me y lur publich de destinazion sie che a me me piasc capì coche fé alc, canche lur publich de destinazion - almanco te lur testa - vël fesse porté tras n'attrazion de Disneyworld su n tronch che va co l'aga.
N pô de scurlada, n pô de lichesc, ma no sta te preocupé, popin, papà Walt te tegn. Te ies al segur segur, gnanca te ne has de te movëi, basta sté chilò y fè tee-hee, ecote n pitla spruzada spruzada.
Se o velëssi chest, me n'andassi a me senté te n cazzo de parc por cian y cocolé n cian.
