Per dì na roba plu leiera, ai apena vedù un che se lamentea de canche i joch te suplica de passè al modo facile canche te falisc.
Anche jo odie chest.
A me me plaj avëi n modo facile. Cacchio, jo pensi che i joch dess simpelamënter te lascé baré, fin che les competiziuns à regoles acordades su chest.
Ma ogne joch che m'à stufé da passè al modo facile m'à fat pierdëi l'enteress dantadöt. Ai assé joch da jué; se te veus che finëssi plu svelta, compliment, ai finì plu svelta.

Chest é avisa chel che fej i Mario moderni - modernisc, almanco - tan impossibli da jué por me.
"Estela mort trei otes, mawwio? Ecote le supercostüm doré de invincibilità, parce che te ses n ciampanì! Se no le veus, basta evité con gran cura de strunfé coss'atria fora che 'scomenza le nivel, sci, danü no no, nia d'ater, basta scomenza le nivel'.
Chest é ence percheche ai smetù de prové a jué Phantom Pain. Ogna ota che morei, me ufrea le ciapel de pulan y le metea automaticamënter su 'sci'; a la lunga me so desmentié de ge dì a man 'va in malora'.

Capësci che ie na roba de retënzion, ma ie tan de manc de respet.
Ence la dificoltà che se adata da para me dà ai nërves, percheche me meti a préparé por na sfida y spo le joch va an panich y la cala a super-facile parce che ai 'fat masa fadia'.
Morei o capita alc, torno indô por prové danü, ma no: ades la sfida é sparida. Te ies reusciù! Te âs fat sparì le joch! No sta te preocupé, ches sfides éres por n auter. Un plu bon.
No me recorde gnanca se ai mai fenì un joch cun dificoltà che se adata da para.

Credi che la diferënza de basa anter me y lur publich de destinazion sie che a me me plaj capì coche fé alc, canche lur publich de destinazion - almanco te lur testa - vël fesse porté tras n'attrazion de Disneyworld su na barcheta de l'ega.
N pô de scutades, n pô de spruzades, ma no sta te preocupé, popin, papà Walt te tegn. Te ies al segur segur, gnanca te ne has da te movëi; basta sté chilò y rì sotusc, ecote n pitla spruzadela.
Se o velëssi chest, me n'andassi a me senté te n cazzo de parc por cian y cocolé n cian.

Chest é ence percheche ai smetù de prové a jué Phantom Pain. Ogna ota che morei, me ufrea le ciapel de pulan y le metea automaticamënter su 'sci'; a na certa me so desmentié de ge dì a man 'va al diaol'.

Capësci che ie na roba de retënzion, ma ie tan de manc de respet.
Ence la dificoltà che se adata da para me dà ai nërves, percheche me meti a préparé por na sfida y spo le joch va an panich y la cala a super-facile parce che ai 'fat masa fadia'.
Morei o capita alc, torno indô por prové danü, ma no: ades la sfida é sparida. Te ies reusciù! Te âs fat sparì le joch! No sta te preocupé, ches sfides éres por n auter. Un plu bon.
No me recorde gnanca se ai mai fenì un joch cun dificoltà che se adata da para.

Credi che la diferënza de basa anter me y lur publich de destinazion sie che a me me plaj capì coche fé alc, canche lur publich de destinazion - almanco te lur testa - vël fesse porté tras n'attrazion de Disneyworld su na barcheta de l'ega.
N pô de scutades, n pô de spruzades, ma no sta te preocupé, popin, papà Walt te tegn. Te ies al segur segur, gnanca te ne has da te movëi; basta sté chilò y rì sotusc, ecote n pitla spruzadela.
Se o velëssi chest, me n'andassi a me senté te n cazzo de parc por cian y cocolé n cian.

source_doc:
Melbourne Renegades host Glenn Maxwell and the Melbourne Stars at Marvel Stadium in BBL15 after Usman Khawaja and Brisbane Heat host Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper dominated with 82 not out off 51 balls and Glenn Maxwell recalled the feeling of ball on bat in a subdued innings of 20 not out off 17 balls, which included one massive six. He has not lost his ability and would have enjoyed the chance to spend time in the middle.

The crowd of 42,846 was not given the contest they hoped for as the Stars won the match by eight wickets with 25 balls remaining.

It keeps Melbourne Stars in contention as they break a three-match losing sequence and makes life hard for Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis bowled well to take 3-33 and was on a hat-trick at one stage while Harper is in great form having hit 356 runs at a strike rate of 159 for the tournament. He was man-of-the-match.

Tom Rogers bounced back with a fast 50 against Melbourne Renegades

But it was all over once Tom Rogers helped himself to 50 off 19 balls to start the innings with an opening partnership of 84 with Harper.

"They outplayed us at the "G so it was nice to get our fifth win," Harper told Fox Cricket.

Most interesting were the comments from the Fox Cricket commentary box where former England captain Michael Vaughan made it clear how disappointed he was with the way the English hierarchy handled a nightclub incident involving Harry Brook in New Zealand before they arrived in Australia for The Ashes.

Melbourne Stars veteran Peter Siddle said "it was a good turnaround" with the win pushing the team back into second spot on the BBL table.

It's starting to heat up with three games remaining for Melbourne Renegades and two matches for Melbourne Stars.

There is still plenty of cricket left this summer so keep tuning in. Thanks for following. Can the Stars finally win the title?

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
I Melbourne Renegades ospiteia Glenn Maxwell y i Melbourne Stars al Marvel Stadium te BBL15 do che Usman Khawaja y i Brisbane Heat ospiteia i Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper à dominé cun 82 nia fora da 51 bales, y Glenn Maxwell à ciapé danü l sentimënt dl bal sül bat te n innings sototone de 20 nia fora da 17 bales, che à inclüj un six enorme. El n’à nia perdu sia abilité y al à dessigür giodü l oportunité de passé del temp te mez.

La foles de 42.846 persones n’à nia ciafé la sfida che a sperâ, ajache i Stars à vagnü la partida cun ot wickets de vantaje y 25 bales che i restâ.

Chest mantëgn i Melbourne Stars te corsa do che ai rota na seria de trëi sconfites de fila y al renda la vita dificila ai Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis à balé ben per ciafé 3-33 y a n cert moment al ê sun n hat-trick, do che Harper é te gran forma ajache el à fat 356 corides cun n strike rate de 159 tl tornei. El é stat l miú dl match.

Tom Rogers à reagì cun n 50 svelto cuntra i Melbourne Renegades

Ma dut ê fenì n iade che Tom Rogers s’à ajudé cun 50 da 19 bales per tacé l innings cun na partenaria d’orida de 84 cun Harper.

"Ai ne à surclassé al "G, porchël ê bel ciafé la nostra quinta victoria", à dit Harper a Fox Cricket.

I comentars plu interessanc gnî dal box de coment de Fox Cricket, olache l ex capitano dl’Inghilterra Michael Vaughan à fat avisa danü coche el ê desmenté dal modo che la dirigenza inglesa à traté n incident te na discoteca che envolvea Harry Brook te la Nuova Zelanda dan che a rivâ te l’Australia per The Ashes.

Le veterano di Melbourne Stars Peter Siddle à dit che "ê stat n bun mudamënt de rotta", cun la victoria che à spint la squadra danü te la seconda posiziun dla classifica BBL.

La situaziun s’à metüda a scaldé cun trëi partides che resta ai Melbourne Renegades y dui match ai Melbourne Stars.

Al é amò assé cricket da gioghé chësta isté, porchël cuntinué a ne seguì. Grazia per avëi seguì. Podarâi i Stars finalmënter vagnëi l titul?
hypo_1:
I Melbourne Renegades ospiteia Glenn Maxwell y i Melbourne Stars al Marvel Stadium te la BBL15, do che Usman Khawaja y i Brisbane Heat ospiteia i Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper à dominé cun 82 no fora da 51 bales, y Glenn Maxwell à danü sentì la sensaziun dl bal sun l bat te n innings piutost discret de 20 no fora da 17 bales, che à inclüj n six zënza. El n'à nia perdu sia classa y dessigur à giodü l'ocajiun de sté n pô de temp te mez al ciamp.

La foles de 42.846 spettadus n'à nia odü la sfida che a sperâ, ajache i Stars à vagnü la partida cun ot wickets de vantaje cun 25 bales ancamò da gioghé.

Chest lascia i Melbourne Stars te corsa, do che ai à rota na seria de trëi sconfites, y al renda la vita dificila ai Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis à balé ben y à tut 3-33, y per n toc al ê sun n hat-trick, inant che Harper é te n'otima forma, cun 356 corides cun n strike rate de 159 tl tornei. El é stat l'om dl match.

Tom Rogers à reagì cun n 50 veloz cuntra i Melbourne Renegades

Ma dut ê prà fenì canche Tom Rogers s'à fat so 50 da 19 bales, tacan l'innings cun na partenaria d'orida de 84 cun Harper.

"Ai ne à surclassé al 'G, porchël ê bel ciafé la nossa quinta victoria", à dit Harper a Fox Cricket.

Particolarmenter interessanc ê i comentars dal box de cronaca de Fox Cricket, olache l'ex capitan dl'Inghilterra Michael Vaughan à fat capì clar coche el ê delus dal modo che la dirigenza inglesa à manajé n incident te na discoteca che tachea Harry Brook te la Nuova Zelanda, dan che ai rivâ te l'Australia per The Ashes.

Le veteran di Melbourne Stars Peter Siddle à dit che "ê stat n bun cambiament", cun la victoria che à spint la squadra danü te la seconda posiziun dla classifica dla BBL.

La lota s'à fat plü acesa, cun trëi partides che resta ai Melbourne Renegades y dui match ai Melbourne Stars.

Chësta isté al é amò assé cricket da gioghé, porchël stajé colligié. Grazia de avëi seguì. Podarâi i Stars finalmenter vagnëi l titul?

source_doc:
Outside of court a never ending stream of flying monkeys has doxxed, harassed and threatened me and anyone they believe have "helped" me in anyway shape or form.
One flying monkey is the tiktoker Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim who jumped on my ex's public posts, and knows my ex privately.
I'll re-post some of their videos about me with a CW.
But I want to make it clear how much these people wish to erase me and my few accomplishments.
Here's violent threats about a witness in my case.

This tiktoker has made it their PRIMARY content to attempt to dox me, my friends and specifically witnesses to my illegal eviction.
In the video they made about me they attempt to paint me as "not an activist", "not a hacker" and "just a grifter".
ALL because my ex decided that splitting bills while navigating a break constituted domestic violence.
They then call their constant online lynch mob chasing me around "activism" and fund raise off MY pain and court process.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" is known locally for posting tiktoks of herself stalking + harassing multiple of her ex's all on her tiktok+IG.
Areej maced a trans librarian, Canyon, ON camera as she got off work likely bc Canyon had to enforce BASIC library rules.
Areej cyberbullied Canyon for months after.
Canyon soon thereafter died of a suspected intentional drug overdose.
Many in the community believe Areej's actions directly contributed to Canyon's death.
THESE are the "friends" my ex keeps.

Anywho... this type of leftist infighting, is the worst portlandia coded telenovela ever.
I've NEVER posted anything at all publicly about Areej till now.
Areej did contact me 2years ago with some infighting, which I immediately DECLINED to be involved with.
I had a few private & community conversations about the issues they raised to ensure a restorative justice process had or would occur.
One had occured and had plenty of support so I bowed out.
This had been the extent of our contact.

At the time I bowed out I warned the community against cyber bullying especially 3rd parties to the initial interpersonal conflict.
This warning was directed to Areej, I felt their cyber bullying ON top of the already existing decisions in their favor was in poor taste.
I especially felt Areej doxxing the restorative justice committee/mediators DURING the process was actively abusive.
I warned specifically about the likelihood of Areej's victims self harming being a real risk.

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Ladin, Val Badia, Italy grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Ladin, Val Badia, Italy. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Ladin, Val Badia, Italy translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Ladin, Val Badia, Italy (lld_Latn):
hypo_0:
Fora dal tribunal n flusc che no finesc mai de “flying monkeys” à fat doxxing, molestà y menazà me y chiunche i crëi che à “daidé” me te cualsëssa maniera.
Un “flying monkey” é la tiktokera Areej “liberationluvr” Hakim, che s’à tacà ai post publics de mi ex, y la conosce mi ex anca privatamënter.
I republijarò valuns di so videos su de me cun n avërtimënt de contignü.
Ma i vöi rende dër clar tan che chësta jënt vel me scancelé y scancelé i pócs resultac che ai arjunt.
Ciacá menazes violëntes su un testimone tl mi cajo.

Chësta tiktokera à fat de so contignü PRINCIPAL n tentatif de me doxxé, de me amis y specifichamënter i testimones de mi sfratamënt ilegal.
Tl video che à fat su de me, la prova da me pité coche “nia ativista”, “nia hacker” y “demó na trufadora”.
TUT parceche mi ex à dezidù che spartì les spëises durant che nse separea fossa violënza domestica.
Dò la ciama so persecuzion costanta online da banda de na folla da linciamënt “ativism” y la tira su scioldi su la MIA dolor y su l mi percors de tribunal.
#GenitorialitéDaNeri

Areej “solidarityluvr” é cognosciüda localmëter per posté tiktoks de se instëssa che la perseguita + molesta tröc de si ex, dut su so tiktok+IG.
Areej à spruzé mace a na bibliotecara trans, Canyon, DAVANT A LA CAMERA, canche la jera gnida fora dal laur, probabelmënter parceche Canyon à messü fá respeté regoles BASICHES dla biblioteca.
Dò Areej à fat cyberbullismo a Canyon per mëisc.
Püc de temp dò, Canyon é morta de na sospetada overdose intenziunela de droga.
Tröc tla comunité crëi che les azions de Areej à contribuì diretamënter a la mort de Canyon.
CHISC é i “amisc” che mi ex se tegn.

Comunque... chest tip de litiges tra sinistroi é la pijó bröta telenovela “portlandia coded” de sënn.
NO ai MAI posté nia de public su Areej enscin a sëgn.
Areej me à contaté 2 agn fà per chisc litiges, che i ai daniëda IMMEDIATAMËNTER de me nciarié.
Ai fat valunes conversaziuns privates y de comunité sun i problems che i à alzé, per me aseguré che n process de giustizia restaurativa fossa gnü fat o che al gnissa fat.
Un jera bele gnü fat y al àa assá sostëgn, spo me n’ai tiré fora.
Chest é stat dut l’estent de nosta contat.

Tl temp che me n’ai tiré fora, ai metü en guardia la comunité contra l cyberbullismo, specielmëter da pert de terzes persones al pröm conflit interpersonal.
Chësta avertënza jera direjüda a Areej; i sintî che so cyberbullismo, EN plü de les dezijiuns bele a so favor, fossa de mal gust.
Spezialmëter i sintî che Areej, doxxan la comisciun/mediadores de giustizia restaurativa DURANT l process, jera ativamënter abusiva.
Ai avertì specifichamënter che l risico che les vitimes de Areej se fessën de mal da sësses jera real.

source_doc:
Arthur Okonkwo's penalty shootout heroics causes FA Cup shock as Wrexham beat Nottingham Forest

Wrexham won an FA Cup third-round thriller in front of Hollywood owner Ryan Reynolds as Nottingham Forest were dumped out of the competition on penalties after a 3-3 draw.

Arthur Okonkwo was the Wrexham hero with stops from Igor Jesus and Omari Hutchinson giving them a 4-3 victory on spot-kicks after Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason and Jay Rodriguez had converted from the spot.

First-half goals from Liberato Cacace and Oliver Rathbone gave Wrexham early control and had Reynolds trading high fives and hugs from his vantage point in the main stand.

Jesus cut the deficit before Dominic Hyam's diving header restored Wrexham's two-goal advantage with 16 minutes remaining.

Forest looked dead and buried but substitute Callum Hudson-Odoi produced two outstanding finishes, the equaliser coming in the 89th minute.

Wrexham have won three successive promotions to go from non-league to the Championship, but this was the first time since being taken over by Reynolds and fellow actor Rob Mac nearly five years ago they had met Premier League opposition.

Forest made eight changes after beating West Ham on Tuesday, with goalkeeper Matz Sels, Jesus and Hutchinson remaining and Wales international Neco Williams on a stacked bench at his local club.

Callum Hudson-Odoi came off the bench and scored twice to force the match to penalties (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore was not risked after injury as Wrexham sought to extend a four-game winning streak that had taken them a point from the Championship play-off places.

Forest started on the front front with Jesus shooting over and Douglas Luiz found the net after 17 minutes.

Referee Paul Tierney initially awarded the goal, but then ruled it out after deciding Luiz had controlled the ball with his arm before volleying home.

Wrexham had been tidy in possession without a cutting edge but that was to change in the final 10 minutes of the first half.

Ollie Rathbone doubled Wrexham's lead after Liberato Cacace's opener (REUTERS)

Sam Smith dragged wide before Cacace took advantage after 37 minutes to drive home his maiden Wrexham goal from 20 yards aided by the faintest of deflections off Morato's heel.

Wrexham smiles were even wider three minutes later as Rathbone broke through Morato's challenge to fire in his third goal in four games.

It should have been three - and possibly contest over - when Smith scampered through the Forest half unchecked but failed to beat Sels" outstretched leg.

Forest boss Sean Dyche made a triple substitution at half-time with Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White and Nicolas Dominguez sent on to salvage the situation.

Okonkwo saved the decisive penalty to deny Omari Hutchinson in the shootout (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

The visitors were instantly more fluid as Okonkwo tipped over Luiz's free-kick and kept out Nicolo Savona's strike.

Sels saved well from Broadhead but Forest were in the ascendancy and struck when Savona set up the leaping Jesus for a header that hit the post and just about crossed the line.

The drama rose as Hyam headed in a superb George Dobson free-kick and Hudson-Odoi swept home 60 seconds later to set up a grandstand finish.

Hudson-Odoi took the tie into extra time in fantastic fashion, taking a touch on his chest and lofting a perfect volley over Okonkwo, but Wrexham were not to be denied their first top-flight FA Cup scalp for 26 years.

Sean Dyche made eight changes to the Forest side and called on his first choice players but couldn't get over the line (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

Elsewhere in the FA Cup, Oxford United advanced to the fourth round with a 4-3 penalty shootout win over MK Dons and Port Vale defeated Fleetwood 1-0.

Wigan Athletic also progressed after a superb display at Deepdale saw the League One side beat Championship play-off chasers Preston North End 1-0 as well.

hypo_0:
I prodezesc de Arthur Okonkwo te i penaltis à porté n colp de scena te la FA Cup canche Wrexham à batü Nottingham Forest

Wrexham à venziunsé n thriller dl terzo turn dla FA Cup dan ai öc dl patron de Hollywood Ryan Reynolds, canche Nottingham Forest é gnü eliminé dla competiziun ai penaltis do n parejo de 3-3.

Arthur Okonkwo é stat l’eroe de Wrexham cun parades sun i tiri de Igor Jesus y Omari Hutchinson, che à dé ai sü n trionf de 4-3 ai penaltis do che Josh Windass, Callum Doyle, George Thomason y Jay Rodriguez à trasformé dai ündesc metres.

Gol te pröma mesadé de Liberato Cacace y Oliver Rathbone à dé a Wrexham le control da subit y Reynolds à festé cun man aute y abrazi da so post te la tribüna prinzipala.

Jesus à scurté le desfavanç dant che le colp de ciaf de Dominic Hyam, tlançé inant, à ristabilì le vantaje de dui gol de Wrexham cun 16 menüc che restâ.

Forest parêa fora dla gara, mo le sostitüt Callum Hudson-Odoi à fat dui finalisaziuns straordinaries, cun le gol dl parejo rivé te l’89ejim minut.

Wrexham à vagnü trëi promozions de fila por passé dala non-league ala Championship, mo chest é stat la pröma ota, dapi che l’é stat cumpré da Reynolds y dl ater ator Rob Mac cicinch agn indô, che al â afronté n adversar dla Premier League.

Forest à fat ot cambi do la vitöria de mardi cuntra West Ham, cun chel che le portier Matz Sels, Jesus y Hutchinson é resté y l’internazional galais Neco Williams sön na panca plena pro so club local.

Callum Hudson-Odoi é gnü ju da panca y à segnè dui iadi por porté la partida ai penaltis (REUTERS)

Kieffer Moore n’é nia stat metü a risich do n infortunio, canche Wrexham cirîa da slungié na strëia de cater vitöries de fila che i â porté a n pont dai posć dl play-off dla Championship.

Forest à scomençé al atach cun Jesus che à tiré sora y Douglas Luiz che à metü la bala te rëi do 17 menüc.

L’arbitro Paul Tierney à dé al pröm le gol, mo do l’à anulé do avëi dezidü che Luiz â controlé la bala cun le brac dant co la mandé a rëi al vollo.

Wrexham â mantegnü la posesciun cun ordem, mo zënza vera punta ofensiva, ma chest é mudé ti ultims 10 menüc dla pröma mesadé.

Ollie Rathbone à doblé le vantaje de Wrexham do le gol d’avertura de Liberato Cacace (REUTERS)

Sam Smith à tiré fora dant che Cacace n’à trat vantaje do 37 menüc por segnè so pröm gol por Wrexham da 20 metres, ajudé da na minima deviaziun sö la cialzina de Morato.

I soris de Wrexham é deventé ciamò plü larghi trëi menüc do, canche Rathbone à passé tras le contrast de Morato por segnè so terzo gol te cater partides.

Al avess mess cëiester trëi – y forsc la gara finida – canche Smith à corü tras la mesadé de Forest zënza gni fermé, mo n’à nia batü la ciam de Sels slungada.

L’alenadú de Forest Sean Dyche à fat trëi sostituzions al intervall, cun Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White y Nicolas Dominguez mandé sö por salvé la situaziun.

Okonkwo à paré le penalti dezisif por n negé a Omari Hutchinson te la seria dai ündesc metres (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

I ospic é stats da subit plü fluids, canche Okonkwo à devië sora la puniziun de Luiz y à tignü fora le tir de Nicolo Savona.

Sels à paré ben sun Broadhead, mo Forest ê al comand y à colpì canche Savona à preparé por Jesus, che à salté por n colp de ciaf che à tocé le pal y à passé appena la lingia.

Le drama é cressü canche Hyam à metü te rëi cun le ciaf na splendida puniziun de George Dobson y Hudson-Odoi à segnè 60 secundes do por preparé n final da tribüna.

Hudson-Odoi à porté la sfida ai suplementars cun na giocada fantastica, ciapann la bala sun le pet y mandann na volada perfeta sora Okonkwo, mo Wrexham n’é nia stat da negé so pröma eliminaziun de na squadra de pröma liga te la FA Cup da 26 agn incà.

Sean Dyche à fat ot cambi te la formaziun de Forest y à dovrà i so giogadus prinzipai, mo n’é nia rivé a portéla a ciasa (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

In atró te la FA Cup, Oxford United à passé al cuarto turn cun na vitöria de 4-3 ai penaltis sun MK Dons y Port Vale à batü Fleetwood 1-0.

Inoma Wigan Athletic à passé inant do na prestaziun superba a Deepdale, olache la squadra de League One à batü ince Preston North End, che coreva por i play-off dla Championship, cun 1-0.

Wrexham â mantegnü na buna posesciun zënza ester verdaderment pericolus, mo chest â da mudé ti ultims 10 menüc dla pröma mesadé.

Ollie Rathbone á doblé le vantaje de Wrexham do le gol d’avertura de Liberato Cacace (REUTERS)

Sam Smith á tiré de fora dant che Cacace n’à trat vantaje do 37 menüc por segnè so pröm gol por Wrexham da 20 yards, ajudé da na minima deviaziun sö la cialzina de Morato.

I soris de Wrexham é deventé ciamó plü larghi trëi menüc do, canche Rathbone á passé tras le contrast de Morato por segnè so terzo gol te cater partides.

Al avess mess ester le terzo gol – y forsc ince la partida finida – canche Smith á sburté tras la mesadé de Forest zënza gni fermé, mo n’à nia batü la ciam slungada de Sels.

L’alenadú de Forest, Sean Dyche, á fat trëi sostituzions al intervall, cun Williams, Morgan Gibbs-White y Nicolas Dominguez mandé sö por salvé la situaziun.

Okonkwo á paré le penalti dezisif y á negó a Omari Hutchinson le gol tla seria dai ündesc metres (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

I ospic é stats da subit plü fluids, canche Okonkwo á devië sora la traversa la puniziun de Luiz y á tignü fora le tir de Nicolo Savona.

Sels á paré ben sön Broadhead, mo Forest ê al comand y á colpì canche Savona á servì Jesus, che á salté por n colp de ciaf che á tocé le pal y á passé apëna la lingia.

Le drama é cressü canche Hyam á metü te rëi cun le ciaf na splendida puniziun de George Dobson y Hudson-Odoi á segnè 60 secundes do por preparé n final al cardiopalma.

Hudson-Odoi á porté la sfida ai suplementars cun na jogada fantastica, ciapann la bala sön le pet y mandann na volada perfeta sora Okonkwo, mo a Wrexham n’é nia gnü negada sia pröma eliminaziun de na squadra de pröma liga tla FA Cup da 26 agn incà.

Sean Dyche á fat ot mudaziuns tla formaziun de Forest y á ciapé ite i so giogadus prinzipai, mo n’é nia rivé a mené a ciasa le resultat (Martin Rickett/PA Wire)

In atró tla FA Cup, Oxford United á passé al cuarto turn cun na vitöria de 4-3 ai penaltis sön MK Dons y Port Vale á batü Fleetwood 1-0.

Inoma Wigan Athletic á passé inant do na prestaziun superba a Deepdale, olache la squadra de League One á batü ince Preston North End, che coreva por i play-off dla Championship, cun 1-0.

source_doc:
This morning while walking to work I had a thought: is it possible that the reason why the perception of the #replyGuy problem being worse on #Mastodon (and the #Fediverse in general) is due to sheer (lack of) numbers?
So I came up with a simplified model to check if this was indeed sufficient to explain the phenomenon.
Let's assume that, similarly to Mario Cipolla's Basic Laws of Human Stupidity, the fraction of reply guys in a population is a given constant ρ.
1/n
#maths

Let's also assume for simplicity that reply guys operate mechanically, i.e. do not use some kind of automation to find posts to reply to. This puts an upper limit to the total number of posts a reply guy can reply to in the course of a single day. Let's call this D.
We can also assume that on average a single non-reply-guy will generally post P < D posts per day.
Ignoring for a moment larger timeframes than a single day (but the discussion is similar if we extend the observation period) …
2/n

 … and assuming replyguys select randomly the posts to reply to (i.e. they don't specifically target a person for any particular reason), can we calculate what is the probability that a given person will see at least one reply from a reply guy?
Before doing the actual math, let's look at some practical example. Let's say that 1 in 10 users are reply guys, a reply guy goes through 100 posts per day, and a regular user posts 10 messages per day.
3/n

If there are 10 users in the network, 9 are regular users and 1 is a reply guy. There are 90 regular posts per day, and the the single reply guy will see ALL of them (because they can read 100 posts per day, so they see all the posts made on that network on that day.
However, if there are 100 users in the network, 10 of which are reply guys, the network will produce 900 posts in a day, but reply guys will NOT necessarily see all of them!
4/n

In the second scenario, each reply guy will see 100 random posts of the 900. Even if there are 10 reply guys, this does NOT mean that each post will be found by a reply guy! There may be posts that are seen by multiple reply guys, and posts that will not be seen by any reply guy!
So how do we compute the probability for a post to be seen by a reply guy in this case?
One way to do this is to compute the probability of NOT being seen by ANY reply guy, and taking the complement.
5/n

Now, since each reply guy sees 100 of the 900 posts, each post has a 1/9 probability of being seen by any particular reply guy, i.e. an 8/9 probability of NOT being seen by that particular reply guy. The probability of not being seen by ANY reply guy is thus 8/9 for each reply guy and assuming that the probabilities are independent, this means that the probability of not being seen by any of the 10 reply guys is (8/9)^10, which is 0.30794....
6/n

This means that the probability for each post to be seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guy is 1-(8/9)^10 or approximately 69%.
Of course, if someone posts 10 posts per day, then the probability for them to come across a reply guy is higher than that, because it will be the probability of at least on their post being seen by at least one reply guy!
Again assuming that for each post the probabilities are independent, the math is only slightly more complex:
6/n

each post has a (8/9)^10 probability of not being seen, but for the probability for ALL posts not being seen, that has to be further elevated to the number of posts made by the same person, which is 10, so (8/9)^100, and the probability of AT LEAST ONE POST being seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guys becomes 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… which is not 100% but very close to it.
This was the case of a network 100 people, 10 of which are reply guys. Let's do one more and then go general.
7/n

Let's now assume the network has 100K users, still with the same 10% of reply guys (90K regular users, 10K reply guys).
Each reply guy still reads 100 posts per day, and the regular users still produce 10 posts per day.
This means that in a single day the regular users produce 900K posts, and each reply guys reads 100 of those 900K posts!
Still under the randomness assumption, this means that a single reply guy will only see 100/900K posts!
8/n

Alura ai fat fora n model semplifiché per controllé sce chest bastass davoi a spiegà l fenomen.
Ponon che, desche tl Leges de basa dla stupideza umana de Mario Cipolla, la fraziun di omdarisposta te na populaziun sie na costanta dada ρ.
1/n
#matematica

Ponon ence, por semplizité, che i omdarisposta lauren a moda mecanica, cioè che ai ne dovren nia automaziuns o robe de chësc sort per trové i post a chëi da risponde. Chest met na limita massima al numer total de post a chëi che n omdarisposta pò risponde te n de soul dé. Ciamon chest D.
Ponon ence che, en media, un utent normèl che n’é nia n omdarisposta publiche de solit P < D post al dé.
Lascian da pert por n momënt i perîs de temp pü gragn che n soul dé (ma la discusciun é scicheta se slargian l perî de osservaziun) …
2/n

… y ponon che i omdarisposta chiries a cajo i post a chëi da risponde (cioè che ai ne ciapa nia de mira na persona por na rajun particolara), podon calcolé ci él la probabilité che na persona dada vëde almanco na risposta da n omdarisposta?
Dan che fé la matematica vera, cianon vëi dantalc valch exempl pratich. Dijon che 1 utent sun 10 sie n omdarisposta, che n omdarisposta passe tras 100 post al dé, y che n utent regolar publiche 10 mesajes al dé.
3/n

Ma, sce al é 100 utenc tla re, 10 di chëi che é omdarisposta, la re prodüj 900 post te n dé, ma i omdarisposta ne i vëd nia per forza duc!

Donca, coche calcolon la probabilité che n post vegne odü da n omdarisposta te chest caje?
N modo por fé chest é calcolé la probabilité de NO gní odü da NISCIÜN omdarisposta, y tò si l complement.
5/n

Adess, ajache vigni omdarisposta i vëd 100 di 900 post, vigni post à na probabilité de 1/9 de gní odü da n omdarisposta particolar, cioè na probabilité de 8/9 de NO gní odü da chest omdarisposta particolar. 6/n

Chest vel dì che la probabilité por vigni post de gní odü da ALMANCO UN omdarisposta é 1-(8/9)^10 o apressimativamënter 69%.

vigni post à na probabilité de (8/9)^10 de no gní odü, ma por la probabilité che DUC i post ne vegne odüs nia, chësta mëss gní elevada ciamò al numer de post fac da chëra medema persona, che é 10, donca (8/9)^100, y la probabilité che ALMANCO UN POST vegne odü da ALMANCO UN omdarisposta deventa 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… che n’é nia 100% ma i s’ài pro pü de tant.
Chest ê l caje de na re de 100 persones, 10 de chëles che é omdarisposta. Fajon n oter y spo jion al caje general.

Chest vel dì che te n soul dé i utenc regolari prodüj 900K post, y vigni omdarisposta liesc 100 de chëi 900K post!
Ciamò sot la ponüda dla casualité, chest vel dì che n soul omdarisposta i vëd ma 100/900K post!
8/n

vigni post à na probabilité de (8/9)^10 de no gní odü, ma por la probabilité che DUC i post ne vegne odüs nia, chësta mëss gní elevada ciamò al numer de post fac da chëra medema persona, che é 10, donca (8/9)^100, y la probabilité che ALMANCO UN POST vegne odü da ALMANCO UN di reply guys deventa 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… che n’é nia 100%, ma l’é dër visin.
Chest ê l caje de na re cun 100 persones, 10 de chëles che é reply guys. Fajon ciamò un y spo jion al caje general.
7/n

Adess ponon che la re abie 100K utenc, ciamò cul medemo 10% de reply guys (90K utenc regolari, 10K reply guys).
Vigni reply guy liesc ciamò 100 post al dé, y i utenc regolari prodüj ciamò 10 post al dé.
Chest vel dì che te n soul dé i utenc regolari prodüj 900K post, y vigni reply guy liesc 100 de chëi 900K post!
Ciamò sot la ponüda dla casualité, chest vel dì che n soul reply guy i vëd demé 100/900K post!
8/n
hypo_5:
Chësta dama, mentri che jìa a lauré a pe, m’é gnüda n’idea: saral pa pussaibel che la rajun por chëla che l problem di #replyGuy para pejor sun #Mastodon (y tl #Fediverse en general) sie demé na chestiun de pura mancianza de numer?
Donca ai metü adöm n model semplifiché por controlé sce chest basta dal sigür a spiegà l fenomen.
Ponon che, coche te les Leges Fondamentales dla Stupideza Umana de Mario Cipolla, la fraziun de reply guys te na populaziun sie na costanta dada ρ.
1/n
#matematica

Ponon ence, por semplizité, che i reply guys laore a moda mecanica, cioè che ai ne dovra nia n sort de automaziun por ciafé i post a chëi da risponde. Chest met n limit superior al numer total de post a chëi che n reply guy pò risponde te n soul dé. Ciamon chest D.
Ponon ence che, en media, n singul utent che n’é nia n reply guy publiches de solit P < D post al dé.
Lascian por n momënt de pert i perî de temp pü lunges che n soul dé (ma la discusciun resta valguna de simila sce slargian l perî d’osservaziun) …
2/n

… y ponon che i reply guys chiries a cajo i post a chëi da risponde (cioè che ai ne ciapa nia de mira na persona aposta por valguna rajun), podon pa calcolé ci él la probabilité che na persona data vëde almanco na resposta da n reply guy?
Dan de fé la matematica vera, cianon n exempl pratich. Dijon che 1 utent sun 10 sie n reply guy, che n reply guy passes tras 100 post al dé, y che n utent regolar publiches 10 mesajes al dé.
3/n

Sce al é 10 utenc tla re, 9 é utenc regolari y 1 é n reply guy. Al é 90 post regolari al dé, y l soul reply guy i vëd DUC chisc (ajache al pò lieje 100 post al dé, donca al vëd duc i post fac te chëra re te chël dé).
Ma sce al é 100 utenc tla re, 10 di chëi che é reply guys, la re prodüj 900 post te n dé, ma i reply guys ne i vëd nia per forza duc!
4/n

Tel second scenario, vigni reply guy i vëd 100 post a cajo di 900. Ence sce al é 10 reply guys, chest NO vel dì che vigni post vegne ciafé da n reply guy! Pò ester post odüs da plü reply guys, y post che ne vegnarà odüs da degün reply guy!
Donca, coche calcolon la probabilité che n post vegne odü da n reply guy te chest caje?
N modo por fé chest é calcolé la probabilité de NO gní odü da NISCIÜN reply guy, y tò su l complement.
5/n

Adess, ajache vigni reply guy i vëd 100 di 900 post, vigni post à na probabilité de 1/9 de gní odü da chël reply guy particolar, cioè na probabilité de 8/9 de NO gní odü da chël medemo reply guy. La probabilité de no gní odü da NISCIÜN reply guy é donca 8/9 por vigni reply guy y, ponon che chëstes probabilités sie indepëndëntes, chest vel dì che la probabilité de no gní odü da degün di 10 reply guys é (8/9)^10, che é 0.30794....
6/n

Chest vel dì che la probabilité por vigni post de gní odü da ALMANCO UN reply guy é 1-(8/9)^10, o apressimativamënter 69%.
De segur, sce un publiches 10 post al dé, alora la probabilité che al s’imbate te n reply guy é pü auta, ajache chëra sarà la probabilité che almanco un di sü post vegne odü da almanco un reply guy!
Daré ponon che por vigni post les probabilités sie indepëndëntes, la matematica é ma n pô pü complicada:
6/n

Chest ê l caje de na re cun 100 persones, 10 de chëles che é reply guys. Fajon ciamò un y spo jion al caje general.
7/n
